    83	export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
    84	  const supabase = createClient()
    85	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    86	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    87	
    88	  const clientId = await resolveClientId(user.id)
    89	  if (!clientId) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Client not found" }, { status: 404 })
    90	
    91	  const body = schema.safeParse(await req.json())
    92	  if (!body.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: body.error }, { status: 400 })
    93	
    94	  const { amount_ml } = body.data
    95	  const db = service()
    96	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(db, clientId)
    97	  const reference = new Date()
    98	  const targetDate = body.data.date ?? computePhysiologicalDate(reference, timezone)
    99	  const loggedAt = resolveLoggedAtForPhysiologicalDate(targetDate, timezone, reference)
   100	  const drinkType: DrinkType = body.data.drink_type ?? "water"
   101	  const caffeineMg = body.data.caffeine_mg ?? estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType, amount_ml)
   102	
   103	  const { data, error } = await db.from("client_water_logs").insert({
   104	    client_id: clientId,
   105	    amount_ml,
   106	    drink_type: drinkType,
   107	    caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
   108	    logged_at: loggedAt.toISOString(),
   109	  }).select("id, amount_ml, caffeine_mg, drink_type, logged_at").single()
   110	
   111	  if (error) return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
   112	
   113	  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, ...data })
   114	}

    80	  return NextResponse.json({ logs: data ?? [] })

    83	export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
    84	  const supabase = createClient()
    85	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    86	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    87	
    88	  const clientId = await resolveClientId(user.id)
    89	  if (!clientId) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Client not found" }, { status: 404 })
    90	
    91	  const body = schema.safeParse(await req.json())
    92	  if (!body.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: body.error }, { status: 400 })
    93	
    94	  const { amount_ml } = body.data
    95	  const db = service()
    96	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(db, clientId)
    97	  const reference = new Date()
    98	  const targetDate = body.data.date ?? computePhysiologicalDate(reference, timezone)
    99	  const loggedAt = resolveLoggedAtForPhysiologicalDate(targetDate, timezone, reference)
   100	  const drinkType: DrinkType = body.data.drink_type ?? "water"
   101	  const caffeineMg = body.data.caffeine_mg ?? estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType, amount_ml)
   102	
   103	  const { data, error } = await db.from("client_water_logs").insert({
   104	    client_id: clientId,
   105	    amount_ml,
   106	    drink_type: drinkType,
   107	    caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
   108	    logged_at: loggedAt.toISOString(),
   109	  }).select("id, amount_ml, caffeine_mg, drink_type, logged_at").single()
   110	
   111	  if (error) return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
   112	
   113	  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, ...data })
   114	}

     1	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	import { createClient as createServerClient } from "@/utils/supabase/server";
     3	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from "@supabase/supabase-js";
     4	import type { NutritionClientData } from "@/lib/nutrition/types";
     5	import {
     6	  buildTrainingWeekSchedule,
     7	  normalizeProgramForSchedule,
     8	  pickActiveProgramForSchedule,
     9	} from "@/lib/nutrition/training-week-schedule";
    10	import { fetchClientDayOverride, resolveEffectiveDayKind } from '@/lib/client/day-kind'
    11	import { z } from "zod";
    12	import { getLatestClientMetrics } from "@/lib/client/latest-metrics";
    13	import {
    14	  computeRollingAverage,
    15	  getLatestValueInWindow,
    16	} from "@/lib/client/checkin/rollingSignals";
    17	import { computePhysiologicalDateInTimezone } from "@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows";
    18	import {
    19	  DEFAULT_REALTIME_WINDOW_DAYS,
    20	  canUseRealtimeSignal,
    21	  getNutritionSignalWindowDays,
    22	} from "@/lib/nutrition/dataGovernance";
    23	
    24	function serviceClient() {
    25	  return createServiceClient(
    26	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    27	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,
    28	  );
    29	}
    30	
    31	function avg(samples: number[]): number | null {
    32	  if (samples.length === 0) return null;
    33	  return (
    34	    Math.round((samples.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / samples.length) * 10) / 10
    35	  );
    36	}
    37	
    38	const OCCUPATION_MULTIPLIER_MAP: Record<string, number> = {
    39	  "Sédentaire (bureau)": 1.0,
    40	  "Légèrement actif": 1.05,
    41	  "Modérément actif": 1.1,
    42	  "Très actif (travail physique)": 1.18,
    43	};
    44	
    45	// Schema for PATCH requests
    46	const nutritionDataPatchSchema = z.object({
    47	  weight_kg: z.number().positive().optional(),
    48	  height_cm: z.number().positive().optional(),
    49	  body_fat_pct: z.number().min(0).max(100).optional(),
    50	  lean_mass_kg: z.number().positive().optional(),
    51	  muscle_mass_kg: z.number().positive().optional(),
    52	  bmr_kcal_measured: z.number().positive().optional(),
    53	  bmr_source: z.enum(["measured", "estimated", "calculated"]).optional(),
    54	  visceral_fat_level: z.number().min(0).optional(),
    55	  daily_steps: z.number().min(0).optional(),
    56	});
    57	
    58	export async function GET(
    59	  req: NextRequest,
    60	  { params }: { params: { clientId: string } },
    61	) {
    62	  const supabase = createServerClient();
    63	  const {
    64	    data: { user },
    65	  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
    66	  if (!user)
    67	    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
    68	
    69	  const db = serviceClient();
    70	  const { clientId } = params;
    71	
    72	  // Ownership check
    73	  const { data: client, error: clientError } = await db
    74	    .from("coach_clients")
    75	    .select(
    76	      "id, first_name, last_name, email, date_of_birth, gender, weekly_frequency, fitness_level, transformation_phase, training_goal, sport_practice, equipment_category, timezone",
    77	    )
    78	    .eq("id", clientId)
    79	    .eq("coach_id", user.id)
    80	    .single();
    81	
    82	  if (clientError || !client) {
    83	    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
    84	  }
    85	
    86	  // Extract submissionId from query params (optional)
    87	  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
    88	  const mode =
    89	    searchParams.get("mode") === "realtime" ? "realtime" : "bilan";
    90	  const requestedSubmissionId = searchParams.get("submissionId");
    91	
    92	  // Fetch all submissions for the bilan selector (no limit)
    93	  const { data: rawSubmissions } = await db
    94	    .from("assessment_submissions")
    95	    .select("id, submitted_at, bilan_date, status, template_snapshot")
    96	    .eq("client_id", clientId)
    97	    .eq("coach_id", user.id)
    98	    .in("status", ["completed", "in_progress"])
    99	    .order("submitted_at", { ascending: false });
   100	
   101	  const allSubmissions = (rawSubmissions ?? []).filter((submission: any) => {
   102	    const blocks = Array.isArray(submission?.template_snapshot?.blocks)
   103	      ? submission.template_snapshot.blocks
   104	      : [];
   105	    return !blocks.some((block: any) => block?.id === "checkin_realtime_block");
   106	  });
   107	
   108	  // Determine which submission to fetch data from
   109	  let selectedSubmissionId = mode === "bilan" ? requestedSubmissionId : null;
   110	  let targetSubmissionId = mode === "bilan" ? requestedSubmissionId : null;
   111	
   112	  // If no specific submission requested, use latest
   113	  if (!targetSubmissionId && allSubmissions && allSubmissions.length > 0) {
   114	    targetSubmissionId = allSubmissions[0].id;
   115	    selectedSubmissionId = targetSubmissionId;
   116	  }
   117	
   118	  const selectedSubmissionMeta =
   119	    mode === "bilan"
   120	      ? allSubmissions.find((submission: any) => submission.id === targetSubmissionId) ?? null

   689	  const { clientId } = params;

   668	      submitted_at: s.submitted_at,
   669	    })),
   670	    selectedSubmissionId: selectedSubmissionId || null,
   671	    trainingWeekSchedule,
   672	    dayOverride,
   673	    effectiveDayKind,
   674	  });
   675	}

   696	    .eq("coach_id", user.id)

   708	    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);

   710	
   711	    // Insert or upsert into manual data table
   712	    // If submissionId provided, data is tied to that bilan only
   713	    // If no submissionId, data is global fallback

   724	      );
   725	
   726	    if (upsertError) {
   727	      console.error("Upsert error:", upsertError);
   728	      return NextResponse.json(

   731	      );

   742	        { status: 400 },
   743	      );
   744	    }

   747	      { error: "Internal server error" },
   748	      { status: 500 },
   749	    );
   750	  }

FILE: app/api/clients/[clientId]/nutrition-engine/weekly-review/route.ts

127:      caffeine_daily_mg: null,

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
     2	import { createClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'
     3	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     4	import { analyzeWeek } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/weeklyAnalysis'
     5	import type { WeeklyCheckinSummary } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/types'
     6	import { buildNutritionDataQualitySummary } from '@/lib/nutrition/dataQuality'
     7	
     8	function svc() {
     9	  return createServiceClient(
    10	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    11	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,
    12	  )
    13	}
    14	
    15	function getWeekStart(date: Date): string {
    16	  const d = new Date(date)
    17	  const day = d.getUTCDay()
    18	  const diff = d.getUTCDate() - day + (day === 0 ? -6 : 1)
    19	  d.setUTCDate(diff)
    20	  return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
    21	}
    22	
    23	export async function POST(
    24	  req: NextRequest,
    25	  { params }: { params: { clientId: string } },
    26	) {
    27	  const supabase = createClient()
    28	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    29	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    30	
    31	  const db = svc()
    32	
    33	  const { data: cc } = await db
    34	    .from('coach_clients')
    35	    .select('id')
    36	    .eq('id', params.clientId)
    37	    .eq('coach_id', user.id)
    38	    .single()
    39	  if (!cc) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Forbidden' }, { status: 403 })
    40	
    41	  const today = new Date()
    42	  const weekStart = getWeekStart(today)
    43	  const sevenDaysAgo = new Date(today)
    44	  sevenDaysAgo.setDate(sevenDaysAgo.getDate() - 7)
    45	  const startDate = sevenDaysAgo.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
    46	  const prevStart = new Date(sevenDaysAgo)
    47	  prevStart.setDate(prevStart.getDate() - 7)
    48	
    49	  const [{ data: checkins }, { data: prevCheckins }, { data: mealDays }] =
    50	    await Promise.all([
    51	      db
    52	        .from('client_daily_checkins')
    53	        .select('date, flow_type, sleep_hours, energy_level, stress_level, weight_kg, hunger_level, muscle_soreness')
    54	        .eq('client_id', params.clientId)
    55	        .gte('date', startDate)
    56	        .order('date', { ascending: true }),
    57	      db
    58	        .from('client_daily_checkins')
    59	        .select('weight_kg')
    60	        .eq('client_id', params.clientId)
    61	        .gte('date', prevStart.toISOString().slice(0, 10))
    62	        .lt('date', startDate)
    63	        .not('weight_kg', 'is', null),
    64	      db
    65	        .from('nutrition_meals')
    66	        .select('physiological_date')
    67	        .eq('client_id', params.clientId)
    68	        .gte('physiological_date', startDate),
    69	    ])
    70	
    71	  const rows = checkins ?? []
    72	  const morningRows = rows.filter(r => r.flow_type === 'morning')
    73	  const eveningRows = rows.filter(r => r.flow_type === 'evening')
    74	
    75	  const weightSamples = morningRows.filter(r => r.weight_kg !== null)
    76	  const avgWeightKg =
    77	    weightSamples.length > 0
    78	      ? weightSamples.reduce((s, r) => s + Number(r.weight_kg), 0) / weightSamples.length
    79	      : null
    80	  const prevWeights = (prevCheckins ?? []).filter(r => r.weight_kg !== null)
    81	  const prevWeekAvgWeightKg =
    82	    prevWeights.length > 0
    83	      ? prevWeights.reduce((s, r) => s + Number(r.weight_kg), 0) / prevWeights.length
    84	      : null
    85	
    86	  const avg = (arr: (number | null)[]): number | null => {
    87	    const vals = arr.filter((v): v is number => v !== null)
    88	    return vals.length > 0 ? vals.reduce((s, v) => s + v, 0) / vals.length : null
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  const avgEnergyLevel = avg(morningRows.map(r => r.energy_level))
    92	  const avgSleepH = avg(
    93	    morningRows.map(r => (r.sleep_hours !== null ? Number(r.sleep_hours) : null)),
    94	  )
    95	  const avgStressLevel = avg(morningRows.map(r => r.stress_level))
    96	  const avgHungerLevel = avg(eveningRows.map(r => r.hunger_level))
    97	  const avgMuscleSoreness = avg(eveningRows.map(r => r.muscle_soreness))
    98	
    99	  const uniqueMealDays = new Set((mealDays ?? []).map(m => m.physiological_date)).size
   100	  const adherencePct = uniqueMealDays / 7
   101	  const latestWeight = weightSamples.length > 0 ? Number(weightSamples[weightSamples.length - 1].weight_kg) : null
   102	  const qualitySummary = buildNutritionDataQualitySummary({
   103	    clientData: {
   104	      id: params.clientId,
   105	      name: '',
   106	      gender: null,
   107	      age: null,
   108	      height_cm: null,
   109	      weight_kg: latestWeight,
   110	      body_fat_pct: null,
   111	      muscle_mass_kg: null,
   112	      lean_mass_kg: null,
   113	      bmr_kcal_measured: null,
   114	      visceral_fat_level: null,
   115	      weekly_frequency: null,

   120	      cardio_frequency: null,

     1	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
     2	import { createClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'

     4	import { analyzeWeek } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/weeklyAnalysis'
     5	import type { WeeklyCheckinSummary } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/types'

     7	
     8	function svc() {
     9	  return createServiceClient(
    10	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    11	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,
    12	  )
    13	}
    14	
    15	function getWeekStart(date: Date): string {
    16	  const d = new Date(date)
    17	  const day = d.getUTCDay()
    18	  const diff = d.getUTCDate() - day + (day === 0 ? -6 : 1)
    19	  d.setUTCDate(diff)
    20	  return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
    21	}
    22	
    23	export async function POST(
    24	  req: NextRequest,
    25	  { params }: { params: { clientId: string } },
    26	) {
    27	  const supabase = createClient()
    28	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    29	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    30	
    31	  const db = svc()
    32	
    33	  const { data: cc } = await db
    34	    .from('coach_clients')
    35	    .select('id')
    36	    .eq('id', params.clientId)
    37	    .eq('coach_id', user.id)
    38	    .single()
    39	  if (!cc) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Forbidden' }, { status: 403 })
    40	
    41	  const today = new Date()
    42	  const weekStart = getWeekStart(today)
    43	  const sevenDaysAgo = new Date(today)
    44	  sevenDaysAgo.setDate(sevenDaysAgo.getDate() - 7)
    45	  const startDate = sevenDaysAgo.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
    46	  const prevStart = new Date(sevenDaysAgo)
    47	  prevStart.setDate(prevStart.getDate() - 7)
    48	
    49	  const [{ data: checkins }, { data: prevCheckins }, { data: mealDays }] =
    50	    await Promise.all([
    51	      db
    52	        .from('client_daily_checkins')
    53	        .select('date, flow_type, sleep_hours, energy_level, stress_level, weight_kg, hunger_level, muscle_soreness')
    54	        .eq('client_id', params.clientId)
    55	        .gte('date', startDate)
    56	        .order('date', { ascending: true }),
    57	      db
    58	        .from('client_daily_checkins')
    59	        .select('weight_kg')
    60	        .eq('client_id', params.clientId)
    61	        .gte('date', prevStart.toISOString().slice(0, 10))
    62	        .lt('date', startDate)
    63	        .not('weight_kg', 'is', null),
    64	      db
    65	        .from('nutrition_meals')
    66	        .select('physiological_date')
    67	        .eq('client_id', params.clientId)
    68	        .gte('physiological_date', startDate),
    69	    ])
    70	
    71	  const rows = checkins ?? []
    72	  const morningRows = rows.filter(r => r.flow_type === 'morning')
    73	  const eveningRows = rows.filter(r => r.flow_type === 'evening')

   184	      weight_delta_kg:
   185	        avgWeightKg !== null && prevWeekAvgWeightKg !== null
   186	          ? Math.round((avgWeightKg - prevWeekAvgWeightKg) * 100) / 100
   187	          : null,

   197	      guardrail_triggered: result.guardrailTriggered,
   198	      reasoning: result.reasoning,
   199	      raw_data: summary,
   200	    },
   201	    { onConflict: 'client_id,week_start' },
   202	  )
   203	
   204	  return NextResponse.json({ result, summary })
   205	}

    24	const querySchema = z.object({
    25	  window: z.enum(["3", "7", "14", "30"]).default("7"),
    26	});

    28	function serviceClient() {
    29	  return createServiceClient(
    30	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    31	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,
    32	  );
    33	}
    34	
    35	function inferTrainingDay(protocolDay: Record<string, unknown> | null): boolean {
    36	  if (!protocolDay) return false;
    37	  const name = String(protocolDay.name ?? "").toLowerCase();
    38	  const cycle = String(protocolDay.carb_cycle_type ?? "").toLowerCase();
    39	
    40	  return (
    41	    name.includes("entraînement") ||
    42	    name.includes("entrainement") ||
    43	    name.includes("training") ||
    44	    cycle.includes("high")
    45	  );
    46	}
    47	
    48	type ProtocolDayRecord = {
    49	  position: number;
    50	  name?: string | null;
    51	  calories?: number | null;
    52	  protein_g?: number | null;
    53	  carbs_g?: number | null;
    54	  fat_g?: number | null;
    55	  hydration_ml?: number | null;
    56	  carb_cycle_type?: string | null;
    57	};
    58	
    59	type ScheduleSlotRecord = {
    60	  week_index: number;
    61	  dow: number;
    62	  protocol_day_position: number;
    63	};

    65	export async function GET(
    66	  req: NextRequest,
    67	  { params }: { params: Promise<{ clientId: string }> },
    68	) {
    69	  const supabase = createServerClient();
    70	  const {
    71	    data: { user },
    72	  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
    73	
    74	  if (!user) {
    75	    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
    76	  }
    77	
    78	  const parsed = querySchema.safeParse(
    79	    Object.fromEntries(new URL(req.url).searchParams),
    80	  );
    81	  if (!parsed.success) {
    82	    return NextResponse.json({ error: parsed.error.flatten() }, { status: 400 });
    83	  }
    84	
    85	  const { clientId } = await params;
    86	  const db = serviceClient();
    87	
    88	  const { data: ownedClient, error: clientError } = await db
    89	    .from("coach_clients")
    90	    .select("id, timezone")
    91	    .eq("id", clientId)
    92	    .eq("coach_id", user.id)
    93	    .maybeSingle();
    94	
    95	  if (clientError) {
    96	    return NextResponse.json({ error: clientError.message }, { status: 500 });
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  if (!ownedClient) {
   100	    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
   101	  }
   102	
   103	  const timezone =
   104	    (ownedClient as { timezone?: string | null }).timezone || "Europe/Paris";
   105	  const windowDays = Number(parsed.data.window) as 3 | 7 | 14 | 30;
   106	  const today = computePhysiologicalDateInTimezone(new Date(), timezone);
   107	  // dateKeys includes today for the agenda ("Journées observées")
   108	  const dateKeys = Array.from({ length: windowDays }, (_, index) =>
   109	    addDaysToDateKey(today, -(windowDays - index - 1)),
   110	  );
   111	  // chartDateKeys excludes today — a partial day distorts charts and KPIs
   112	  const chartDateKeys = dateKeys.filter((key) => key !== today);
   113	  const earliestRange = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(dateKeys[0], timezone);
   114	  const latestRange = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(
   115	    dateKeys[dateKeys.length - 1],
   116	    timezone,
   117	  );
   118	
   119	  const [
   120	    { data: protocol, error: protocolError },

   227	  function buildDayEntry(dateKey: string) {
   228	    const protocolDay = resolveProtocolDayByDate(
   229	      dateKey,
   230	      (protocol as any)?.schedule_start_date ?? null,
   231	      protocolDays,
   232	      scheduleSlots,
   233	    ) as ProtocolDayRecord | null;
   234	    const mealsForDay = mealsByDate.get(dateKey) ?? {
   235	      mealCount: 0,
   236	      calories: 0,
   237	      protein_g: 0,
   238	      carbs_g: 0,
   239	      fat_g: 0,
   240	    };

   242	    const dayKind: NutritionHubDayKind = inferTrainingDay(protocolDay) ? "training" : protocolDay ? "off" : "unknown";
   243	    const completeness: NutritionHubCompleteness =
   244	      mealsForDay.mealCount === 0 && hydration_ml === 0
   245	        ? "missing"
   246	        : mealsForDay.mealCount === 0 || hydration_ml === 0
   247	          ? "partial"
   248	          : "complete";
   249	
   250	    const target = {
   251	      calories: protocolDay?.calories != null ? Number(protocolDay.calories) : null,
   252	      protein_g: protocolDay?.protein_g != null ? Number(protocolDay.protein_g) : null,
   253	      carbs_g: protocolDay?.carbs_g != null ? Number(protocolDay.carbs_g) : null,
   254	      fat_g: protocolDay?.fat_g != null ? Number(protocolDay.fat_g) : null,
   255	      hydration_ml:
   256	        protocolDay?.hydration_ml != null
   257	          ? Number(protocolDay.hydration_ml)
   258	          : null,
   259	    };
   260	
   261	    return { mealsForDay, hydration_ml, dayKind, completeness, target };
   262	  }

   216	    const total = ((waterLogs ?? []) as Array<{ amount_ml: number | null; logged_at: string }>)
   217	      .filter((entry) => {
   218	        const timestamp = new Date(entry.logged_at).getTime();
   219	        return (
   220	          timestamp >= range.start.getTime() && timestamp <= range.end.getTime()
   221	        );
   222	      })
   223	      .reduce((sum, entry) => sum + Number(entry.amount_ml ?? 0), 0);
   224	    waterByDate.set(dateKey, total);
   225	  }
   226	
   227	  function buildDayEntry(dateKey: string) {
   228	    const protocolDay = resolveProtocolDayByDate(
   229	      dateKey,
   230	      (protocol as any)?.schedule_start_date ?? null,
   231	      protocolDays,
   232	      scheduleSlots,
   233	    ) as ProtocolDayRecord | null;
   234	    const mealsForDay = mealsByDate.get(dateKey) ?? {
   235	      mealCount: 0,
   236	      calories: 0,
   237	      protein_g: 0,
   238	      carbs_g: 0,
   239	      fat_g: 0,
   240	    };
   241	    const hydration_ml = waterByDate.get(dateKey) ?? 0;
   242	    const dayKind: NutritionHubDayKind = inferTrainingDay(protocolDay) ? "training" : protocolDay ? "off" : "unknown";
   243	    const completeness: NutritionHubCompleteness =
   244	      mealsForDay.mealCount === 0 && hydration_ml === 0
   245	        ? "missing"
   246	        : mealsForDay.mealCount === 0 || hydration_ml === 0
   247	          ? "partial"
   248	          : "complete";
   249	
   250	    const target = {
   251	      calories: protocolDay?.calories != null ? Number(protocolDay.calories) : null,
   252	      protein_g: protocolDay?.protein_g != null ? Number(protocolDay.protein_g) : null,
   253	      carbs_g: protocolDay?.carbs_g != null ? Number(protocolDay.carbs_g) : null,
   254	      fat_g: protocolDay?.fat_g != null ? Number(protocolDay.fat_g) : null,
   255	      hydration_ml:
   256	        protocolDay?.hydration_ml != null
   257	          ? Number(protocolDay.hydration_ml)
   258	          : null,
   259	    };
   260	
   261	    return { mealsForDay, hydration_ml, dayKind, completeness, target };
   262	  }
   263	
   264	  // Charts, KPIs, insights: exclude today (partial day skews averages)
   265	  const days: NutritionHubDayInput[] = [];
   266	  const insightInputs: NutritionHubInsightInput[] = [];
   267	  const chartAgenda = chartDateKeys.map((dateKey) => {
   268	    const { mealsForDay, hydration_ml, dayKind, completeness, target } = buildDayEntry(dateKey);
   269	
   270	    days.push({
   271	      dayKind,
   272	      completeness,
   273	      consumed: {

     1	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
     2	import { createClient as createServerClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'
     3	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     4	
     5	function serviceClient() {
     6	  return createServiceClient(
     7	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
     8	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
     9	  )
    10	}
    11	
    12	export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
    13	  const supabase = createServerClient()
    14	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    15	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    16	
    17	  const q = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get('q')?.trim()
    18	  if (!q || q.length < 1) return NextResponse.json({ clients: [] })
    19	
    20	  const db = serviceClient()
    21	
    22	  const { data: clients, error } = await db
    23	    .from('coach_clients')
    24	    .select('id, first_name, last_name, email, date_of_birth, gender, weekly_frequency, fitness_level, training_goal, sport_practice, equipment_category')
    25	    .eq('coach_id', user.id)
    26	    .or(`first_name.ilike.%${q}%,last_name.ilike.%${q}%,email.ilike.%${q}%`)
    27	    .order('first_name', { ascending: true })
    28	    .limit(8)
    29	
    30	  if (error) {
    31	    console.error('[lab/client-search] clients query error:', error)
    32	    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
    33	  }
    34	  if (!clients || clients.length === 0) return NextResponse.json({ clients: [] })
    35	
    36	  const clientIds = clients.map((c) => c.id)
    37	
    38	  const { data: submissions, error: subError } = await db
    39	    .from('assessment_submissions')
    40	    .select(`
    41	      client_id,
    42	      submitted_at,
    43	      assessment_responses(field_key, value_number, value_text, value_json)
    44	    `)
    45	    .in('client_id', clientIds)
    46	    .eq('coach_id', user.id)
    47	    .eq('status', 'completed')
    48	    .order('submitted_at', { ascending: false })
    49	    .limit(80)
    50	
    51	  if (subError) {
    52	    console.error('[lab/client-search] submissions query error:', subError)
    53	  }
    54

   203	
   204	  function avg(samples: number[]): number | null {
   205	    if (samples.length === 0) return null
   206	    return Math.round((samples.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / samples.length) * 10) / 10
   207	  }
   208	
   209	  const OCCUPATION_MULTIPLIER_MAP: Record<string, number> = {
   210	    'Sédentaire (bureau)':            1.00,
   211	    'Légèrement actif':               1.05,
   212	    'Modérément actif':               1.10,
   213	    'Très actif (travail physique)':  1.18,
   214	  }
   215	
   216	  const enriched = clients.map((c) => {
   217	    let age: number | null = null
   218	    if (c.date_of_birth) {
   219	      const dob   = new Date(c.date_of_birth)
   220	      const today = new Date()
   221	      age         = today.getFullYear() - dob.getFullYear()
   222	      const m     = today.getMonth() - dob.getMonth()
   223	      if (m < 0 || (m === 0 && today.getDate() < dob.getDate())) age--
   224	    }
   225	
   226	    const m = metricMap[c.id]
   227	
   228	    let trainingTypes: string[] | null = null
   229	    if (m?.training_types) {
   230	      try { trainingTypes = JSON.parse(m.training_types) } catch { /* ignore */ }
   231	    }
   232	
   233	    let cardioTypes: string[] | null = null
   234	    if (m?.cardio_types) {
   235	      try { cardioTypes = JSON.parse(m.cardio_types) } catch { /* ignore */ }
   236	    }
   237	
   238	    const occupationMultiplier = m?.occupation
   239	      ? (OCCUPATION_MULTIPLIER_MAP[m.occupation] ?? null)
   240	      : null
   241	
   242	    return {
   243	      id:    c.id,
   244	      name:  [c.first_name, c.last_name].filter(Boolean).join(' '),
   245	      email: c.email ?? null,
   246	      // Profile

>>> app/api/lab/client-search/route.ts:280

   251	      training_goal:    c.training_goal    ?? null,

   253	      equipment_category: c.equipment_category ?? null,
   254	      // Biometrics — most recent bilan
   255	      height_cm:          m?.height_cm          ?? null,
   256	      weight_kg:          m?.weight_kg           ?? null,
   257	      body_fat_pct:       m?.body_fat_pct        ?? null,

   259	      lean_mass_kg:       m?.lean_mass_kg        ?? null,
   260	      bmr_kcal_measured:  m?.bmr_kcal_measured   ?? null,
   261	      visceral_fat_level: m?.visceral_fat_level  ?? null,
   262	      body_water_pct:     m?.body_water_pct      ?? null,
   263	      waist_cm:           m?.waist_cm            ?? null,
   264	      // Training — most recent bilan
   265	      session_duration_min:    m?.session_duration_min    ?? null,
   266	      training_calories_weekly: m?.training_calories      ?? null,
   267	      perceived_intensity:     m?.perceived_intensity     ?? null,

   272	      cardio_duration_min: m?.cardio_duration_min ?? null,
   273	      cardio_types:        cardioTypes,

   275	      stress_level:          m ? avg(m.stress_level_samples)          : null,

   277	      sleep_quality:         m ? avg(m.sleep_quality_samples)         : null,
   278	      energy_level:          m ? avg(m.energy_level_samples)          : null,
   279	      recovery_score:        m ? avg(m.recovery_score_samples)        : null,
   280	      post_session_recovery: m ? avg(m.post_session_recovery_samples) : null,
   281	      // Lifestyle — most recent
   282	      caffeine_daily_mg:   m?.caffeine_daily_mg   ?? null,
   283	      alcohol_weekly:      m?.alcohol_weekly      ?? null,
   284	      work_hours_per_week: m?.work_hours_per_week ?? null,
   285	      menstrual_cycle:     m?.menstrual_cycle     ?? null,
   286	      // General
   287	      occupation:           m?.occupation          ?? null,
   288	      occupation_multiplier: occupationMultiplier,
   289	    }
   290	  })
   291	
   292	  return NextResponse.json({ clients: enriched })
   293	}

    26	type DraftTotals = { calories: number; protein: number; carbs: number; fat: number; count: number }
    27	type PrepSlot = 'breakfast' | 'lunch' | 'dinner' | 'snack'

    37	export default function ComposeClientPage({ consumed, target, date, todayDate, initialPreps, gender, bodyWeightKg }: ComposeClientPageProps) {

    41	  const [draftTotals, setDraftTotals] = useState<DraftTotals>(ZERO_DRAFTS)
    42	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState<'prep' | 'meal' | null>(null)
    43	  const [editingPrep, setEditingPrep] = useState<SmartNutritionPrep | null>(null)
    44	  const [headerCollapsed, setHeaderCollapsed] = useState(false)
    45	  const [contentLayer, setContentLayer] = useState<NutritionLogLayer>('category')
    46	  const [scenarioOptions, setScenarioOptions] = useState<SimulationScenarioOption[]>(() => {
    47	    const dbOptions = collectSimulationScenarios(initialPreps)
    48	    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
    49	      try {
    50	        const stored = sessionStorage.getItem(`compose-scenarios-${date}`)
    51	        if (stored) {
    52	          const parsed = JSON.parse(stored) as SimulationScenarioOption[]
    53	          const merged = new Map<string, SimulationScenarioOption>()
    54	          for (const opt of dbOptions) merged.set(opt.key, opt)
    55	          for (const opt of parsed) if (!merged.has(opt.key)) merged.set(opt.key, opt)
    56	          return Array.from(merged.values())
    57	        }
    58	      } catch {}
    59	    }
    60	    return dbOptions
    61	  })
    62	  const [showScenarioPanel, setShowScenarioPanel] = useState(false)
    63	  const [selectedSlot, setSelectedSlot] = useState<PrepSlot>('lunch')
    64	  const [prepTitle, setPrepTitle] = useState('')
    65	  const [renamingScenarioKey, setRenamingScenarioKey] = useState<string | null>(null)
    66	  const [renameValue, setRenameValue] = useState('')
    67	  const [activeScenarioKey, setActiveScenarioKey] = useState<string>(() => {
    68	    const activePrepScenario = initialPreps.find((prep) => prep.is_active)?.scenario_key
    69	    return normalizeScenarioKey(activePrepScenario)
    70	  })
    71	  const { flash, showFlash, dismiss: dismissFlash } = useFlash()
    72	
    73	  useEffect(() => {
    74	    const nextOptions = collectSimulationScenarios(initialPreps)
    75	    setScenarioOptions((prev) => {
    76	      const merged = new Map<string, SimulationScenarioOption>()
    77	      for (const option of prev) merged.set(option.key, option)
    78	      for (const option of nextOptions) merged.set(option.key, option)
    79	      return Array.from(merged.values())
    80	    })
    81	    const activePrepScenario = initialPreps.find((prep) => prep.is_active)?.scenario_key
    82	    if (!nextOptions.some((scenario) => scenario.key === activeScenarioKey)) {
    83	      setActiveScenarioKey(normalizeScenarioKey(activePrepScenario))
    84	    }
    85	  }, [activeScenarioKey, initialPreps])
    86	
    87	  // Persist ephemeral scenarios (without preps) across date navigation
    88	  useEffect(() => {
    89	    try {
    90	      sessionStorage.setItem(`compose-scenarios-${date}`, JSON.stringify(scenarioOptions))
    91	    } catch {}
    92	  }, [scenarioOptions, date])
    93	
    94	  function startRename(key: string, currentLabel: string) {
    95	    setRenamingScenarioKey(key)
    96	    setRenameValue(currentLabel)
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  function commitRename() {
   100	    if (!renamingScenarioKey || !renameValue.trim()) {
   101	      setRenamingScenarioKey(null)
   102	      return
   103	    }
   104	    const newLabel = renameValue.trim()
   105	    setScenarioOptions(prev => prev.map(s =>
   106	      s.key === renamingScenarioKey ? { ...s, label: newLabel } : s
   107	    ))
   108	    setRenamingScenarioKey(null)
   109	    // PATCH existing preps in this scenario so DB label stays in sync
   110	    const prepsToUpdate = initialPreps.filter(p => p.scenario_key === renamingScenarioKey)
   111	    prepsToUpdate.forEach(prep => {
   112	      fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/preps/${prep.id}`, {
   113	        method: 'PATCH',
   114	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   115	        body: JSON.stringify({ scenario_label: newLabel }),
   116	      }).catch(err => console.error('[rename] PATCH prep failed', err))
   117	    })
   118	  }

   121	    () => scenarioOptions.find((scenario) => scenario.key === activeScenarioKey) ?? scenarioOptions[0] ?? { key: 'default', label: "Scénario principal" },
   122	    [activeScenarioKey, scenarioOptions],
   123	  )

   133	    return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('fr-FR', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long' })
   134	      .format(new Date(Date.UTC(year, month - 1, day)))
   135	  }, [date])

   141	    activeScenarioKey,
   142	  })

   151	
   152	  const handleDraftsChange = useCallback((totals: DraftTotals) => {
   153	    setDraftTotals(totals)
   154	  }, [])
   155	  const suppressInternalRedirect = useCallback(() => {}, [])
   156	
   157	  async function handleSavePrep() {
   158	    setSaving('prep')
   159	    const ok = await logRef.current?.savePrep()
   160	    if (ok) {
   161	      logRef.current?.clearDrafts()
   162	      setEditingPrep(null)
   163	      setPrepTitle('')
   164	      router.refresh()
   165	    } else {
   166	      showFlash('Erreur lors de la sauvegarde. Réessaie.', 'error')
   167	    }
   168	    setSaving(null)
   169	  }
   170	
   171	  async function handleSaveMeal() {
   172	    setSaving('meal')
   173	    const mealOk = await logRef.current?.saveMeal()
   174	    if (!mealOk) {
   175	      showFlash('Erreur lors de la validation. Réessaie.', 'error')
   176	      setSaving(null)
   177	      return
   178	    }
   179	    const prepLogResults = await Promise.allSettled(
   180	      simulation.activePreps.map(prep =>
   181	        fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/preps/${prep.id}/log`, { method: 'POST' })
   182	      )
   183	    )
   184	    const failedCount = prepLogResults.filter(
   185	      r => r.status === 'rejected' || (r.status === 'fulfilled' && !r.value.ok)
   186	    ).length
   187	    if (failedCount > 0) {
   188	      console.error(`[handleSaveMeal] ${failedCount} prep(s) failed to log`)
   189	    }
   190	    setSaving(null)
   191	    router.push('/client/nutrition')
   192	  }
   193	
   194	  function handleCancel() {
   195	    logRef.current?.clearDrafts()
   196	    setEditingPrep(null)
   197	    setPrepTitle('')
   198	  }
   199	
   200	  const activePrepCount = simulation.activePreps.length
   201	  const activeScenarioPrepCount = initialPreps.filter((prep) => prep.scenario_key === activeScenario.key).length
   202	
   203	  // Scenario comparison totals (all preps grouped by scenario, using is_active ones)
   204	  const scenarioComparison = useMemo(() => {
   205	    return scenarioOptions.map(scenario => {
   206	      // Use ALL preps in scenario (not just active) for a true plan comparison
   207	      const allPreps = initialPreps.filter(p => p.scenario_key === scenario.key)
   208	      return {
   209	        key: scenario.key,
   210	        label: scenario.label === "Aujourd'hui" ? "Scénario principal" : scenario.label,
   211	        kcal: allPreps.reduce((s, p) => s + p.total_calories, 0),
   212	        protein: allPreps.reduce((s, p) => s + p.total_protein_g, 0),
   213	        carbs: allPreps.reduce((s, p) => s + p.total_carbs_g, 0),
   214	        fat: allPreps.reduce((s, p) => s + p.total_fat_g, 0),
   215	        prepCount: allPreps.length,
   216	        isActive: scenario.key === activeScenarioKey,
   217	      }
   218	    })
   219	  }, [scenarioOptions, initialPreps, activeScenarioKey])
   220	
   221	  function handleCreateScenario() {
   222	    const nextScenario = createNextScenarioOption(scenarioOptions)
   223	    setScenarioOptions((prev) => [...prev, nextScenario])
   224	    setActiveScenarioKey(nextScenario.key)
   225	    setShowScenarioPanel(true)
   226	    setEditingPrep(null)
   227	    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' })
   228	  }

     1	import { createClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'
     2	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     3	import { resolveClientFromUser } from '@/lib/client/resolve-client'
     4	import { resolveClientTimezone } from '@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone'
     5	import { computePhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/physiological-date'
     6	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     7	import { resolveProtocolDayByDate, resolveRestProtocolDay } from '@/lib/nutrition/protocol-schedule'
     8	import { shiftIsoDate } from '@/lib/utils/date'
     9	import type { NutritionMacros } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget'
    10	import type { SmartNutritionPrep } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionPrepList'
    11	import ComposeClientPage from './ComposeClientPage'
    12	
    13	function svc() {
    14	  return createServiceClient(
    15	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    16	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,
    17	  )
    18	}
    19	
    20	function clampComposeDate(candidate: string | null | undefined, todayIso: string): string {
    21	  if (!candidate || !/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(candidate)) return todayIso
    22	  const maxIso = shiftIsoDate(todayIso, 3)
    23	  if (candidate < todayIso) return todayIso
    24	  if (candidate > maxIso) return maxIso
    25	  return candidate
    26	}
    27	
    28	export default async function ClientNutritionComposePage({
    29	  searchParams,
    30	}: {
    31	  searchParams?: Promise<Record<string, string | string[] | undefined>> | Record<string, string | string[] | undefined>
    32	}) {
    33	  const supabase = createClient()
    34	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    35	  if (!user) return null
    36	
    37	  const client = await resolveClientFromUser(user.id, user.email, svc(), 'id, gender')
    38	  if (!client) return null
    39	  const clientRecord = client as { id: string; gender?: string | null }
    40	  const clientId = clientRecord.id
    41	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(svc(), clientId)
    42	  const todayDate = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(), timezone)
    43	  const resolvedSearchParams = searchParams ? await searchParams : {}
    44	  const rawDate = Array.isArray(resolvedSearchParams?.date) ? resolvedSearchParams.date[0] : resolvedSearchParams?.date
    45	  const date = clampComposeDate(rawDate, todayDate)
    46	  const { start, end } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(date, timezone)
    47	
    48	  const [protoResult, mealsResult, prepsResult, waterResult, weightResult, checkinWeightResult] = await Promise.allSettled([
    49	    svc()
    50	      .from('nutrition_protocols')
    51	      .select('schedule_start_date, nutrition_protocol_days(position, calories, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, hydration_ml, carb_cycle_type), nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(week_index, dow, protocol_day_position)')
    52	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    53	      .eq('status', 'shared')
    54	      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
    55	      .limit(1)
    56	      .maybeSingle(),
    57	
    58	    svc()
    59	      .from('nutrition_meals')
    60	      .select('total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g')
    61	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    62	      .eq('physiological_date', date),
    63	
    64	    svc()
    65	      .from('client_nutrition_preps')
    66	      .select('id, physiological_date, title, meal_type, meal_slot, variant_group_id, scenario_key, scenario_label, is_active, status, entries, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g, total_fiber_g, planned_for, created_at, updated_at')
    67	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    68	      .eq('physiological_date', date)
    69	      .eq('status', 'planned')
    70	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false }),
    71	
    72	    svc()
    73	      .from('client_water_logs')
    74	      .select('amount_ml, caffeine_mg')
    75	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    76	      .gte('logged_at', start)
    77	      .lt('logged_at', end),
    78	
    79	    svc()
    80	      .from('assessment_responses')
    81	      .select('numeric_value')
    82	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    83	      .eq('field_key', 'weight_kg')
    84	      .not('numeric_value', 'is', null)
    85	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    86	      .limit(1)
    87	      .maybeSingle(),
    88	
    89	    svc()
    90	      .from('client_daily_checkins')
    91	      .select('weight_kg')
    92	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    93	      .not('weight_kg', 'is', null)
    94	      .order('date', { ascending: false })
    95	      .limit(1)
    96	      .maybeSingle(),
    97	  ])
    98	
    99	  const protoData = protoResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? protoResult.value.data : null
   100	  const protocolDay = resolveProtocolDayByDate(
   101	    date,
   102	    (protoData as any)?.schedule_start_date ?? null,
   103	    (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any) ?? [],
   104	    (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots as any) ?? [],
   105	  ) ?? resolveRestProtocolDay(((protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any[]) ?? []))
   106	
   107	  const target: NutritionMacros = {
   108	    kcal: Number(protocolDay?.calories ?? 2000),
   109	    protein_g: Number(protocolDay?.protein_g ?? 150),
   110	    carbs_g: Number(protocolDay?.carbs_g ?? 200),
   111	    fat_g: Number(protocolDay?.fat_g ?? 60),
   112	    water_ml: Number(protocolDay?.hydration_ml ?? 2500),
   113	  }
   114	
   115	  const meals = mealsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (mealsResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   116	  const rawPreps = prepsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (prepsResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   117	  const waterEntries = waterResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (waterResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   118	  const bodyWeightRow = weightResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? weightResult.value.data : null
   119	  const checkinWeightRow = checkinWeightResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? checkinWeightResult.value.data : null
   120	  const bodyWeightKg = checkinWeightRow?.weight_kg != null

   154	      initialPreps={preps}
   155	      gender={clientRecord.gender ?? null}
   156	      bodyWeightKg={bodyWeightKg}
   157	    />

>>> app/client/nutrition/compose/page.tsx:145
   115	  const meals = mealsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (mealsResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   116	  const rawPreps = prepsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (prepsResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   117	  const waterEntries = waterResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (waterResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   118	  const bodyWeightRow = weightResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? weightResult.value.data : null
   119	  const checkinWeightRow = checkinWeightResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? checkinWeightResult.value.data : null
   120	  const bodyWeightKg = checkinWeightRow?.weight_kg != null
   121	    ? Number(checkinWeightRow.weight_kg)
   122	    : (bodyWeightRow?.numeric_value ? Number(bodyWeightRow.numeric_value) : null)
   123	
   124	  const preps: SmartNutritionPrep[] = (rawPreps as any[]).map((prep) => ({
   125	    ...prep,
   126	    meal_slot: prep.meal_slot ?? prep.meal_type ?? 'snack',
   127	    variant_group_id: prep.variant_group_id ?? prep.meal_slot ?? prep.meal_type ?? 'snack',
   128	    scenario_key: prep.scenario_key ?? 'default',
   129	    scenario_label: prep.scenario_label ?? "Scénario principal",
   130	    is_active: prep.is_active === true,
   131	    entries: Array.isArray(prep.entries) ? prep.entries : [],
   132	    total_calories: Number(prep.total_calories ?? 0),
   133	    total_protein_g: Number(prep.total_protein_g ?? 0),
   134	    total_carbs_g: Number(prep.total_carbs_g ?? 0),
   135	    total_fat_g: Number(prep.total_fat_g ?? 0),
   136	    total_fiber_g: Number(prep.total_fiber_g ?? 0),
   137	  }))
   138	
   139	  const consumed: NutritionMacros = {
   140	    kcal: meals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number(m.total_calories ?? 0), 0),
   141	    protein_g: meals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0), 0),
   142	    carbs_g: meals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number(m.total_carbs_g ?? 0), 0),
   143	    fat_g: meals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number(m.total_fat_g ?? 0), 0),
   144	    water_ml: waterEntries.reduce((s, w) => s + Number((w as any).amount_ml ?? 0), 0),
   145	    caffeine_mg: waterEntries.reduce((s, w) => s + Number((w as any).caffeine_mg ?? 0), 0),
   146	  }
   147	
   148	  return (
   149	    <ComposeClientPage
   150	      consumed={consumed}
   151	      target={target}
   152	      date={date}
   153	      todayDate={todayDate}
   154	      initialPreps={preps}
   155	      gender={clientRecord.gender ?? null}
   156	      bodyWeightKg={bodyWeightKg}
   157	    />
   158	  )
   159	}

     1	import { createClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'
     2	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     3	import { resolveClientFromUser } from '@/lib/client/resolve-client'
     4	import { resolveClientTimezone } from '@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone'
     5	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     6	import { computePhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/physiological-date'
     7	import { computeNutritionAlerts } from '@/lib/client/smart/nutritionAlerts'
     8	import type { NutritionMacros } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget'
     9	import type { NutritionMeal } from '@/lib/nutrition/food-items'
    10	import type { SmartNutritionPrep } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionPrepList'
    11	import type { GenericAlert } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartAlertsFeed'
    12	import { type ClientLang } from '@/lib/i18n/clientTranslations'
    13	import { computeMacroEnergy } from '@/lib/nutrition/energy'
    14	import { resolveProtocolDayByDate, resolveRestProtocolDay } from '@/lib/nutrition/protocol-schedule'
    15	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from '@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors'
    16	import { detectCurrentPhase, getCycleSyncAdjustment } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync'
    17	import type { CyclePhase, CycleSyncAdjustment } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync'
    18	import { getCycleStateFromLogs } from '@/lib/cycle/cycleEngine'
    19	import type { CycleState, CycleLog } from '@/lib/cycle/cycleEngine'
    20	import NutritionClientPage from './NutritionClientPage'
    21	import { fetchClientDayOverride } from '@/lib/client/day-kind'
    22	
    23	type SearchParams = { date?: string }
    24	
    25	function inferTrainingDay(protocolDay: Record<string, unknown> | null): boolean {
    26	  if (!protocolDay) return false
    27	  const name = String(protocolDay.name ?? '').toLowerCase()
    28	  const cycle = String(protocolDay.carb_cycle_type ?? '').toLowerCase()
    29	  return (
    30	    name.includes('entraînement') ||
    31	    name.includes('entrainement') ||
    32	    name.includes('training') ||
    33	    cycle.includes('high')
    34	  )
    35	}
    36	
    37	function svc() {
    38	  return createServiceClient(
    39	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    40	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,
    41	  )
    42	}
    43	
    44	export default async function ClientNutritionPage({ searchParams }: { searchParams: SearchParams }) {
    45	  const supabase = createClient()
    46	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    47	  if (!user) return null
    48	
    49	  const client = await resolveClientFromUser(user.id, user.email, svc(), 'id, gender')
    50	  if (!client) return null
    51	  const isFemale = (client as { gender?: string | null }).gender === 'female'
    52	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(svc(), client.id)
    53	
    54	  const date = searchParams.date ?? computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(), timezone)
    55	  const { start: physiologicalStart, end: physiologicalEnd } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(date, timezone)
    56	  const clientId = client.id
    57	
    58	  // ── Parallel fetches (all direct Supabase, no loopback HTTP) ──────────────
    59	  const [protoResult, mealsResult, prepsResult, waterResult, weightResult, checkinWeightResult, trendResult, streakResult, prefsResult, cycleResult, cycleLogsResult, dayOverrideResult] = await Promise.allSettled([
    60	    svc()
    61	      .from('nutrition_protocols')
    62	      .select('cycle_sync_enabled, tdee_adaptive, tdee_data_source, schedule_start_date, nutrition_protocol_days(position, name, calories, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, hydration_ml, carb_cycle_type, cycle_sync_phase, recommendations), nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(week_index, dow, protocol_day_position)')
    63	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    64	      .eq('status', 'shared')
    65	      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
    66	      .limit(1)
    67	      .maybeSingle(),
    68	
    69	    // Meals with full entries for the journal list
    70	    svc()
    71	      .from('nutrition_meals')
    72	      .select(`
    73	        id, meal_type, title, logged_at, physiological_date,
    74	        total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g, total_fiber_g,
    75	        photo_urls, notes,
    76	        nutrition_entries (
    77	          id, quantity_g, calories_kcal, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, fiber_g,
    78	          input_mode, confidence_score,
    79	          food_items (id, name_fr, category_l1, item_key, kcal_per_100g)
    80	        )
    81	      `)
    82	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    83	      .eq('physiological_date', date)
    84	      .neq('meal_type', 'drinks')
    85	      .order('logged_at', { ascending: true }),
    86	
    87	    svc()
    88	      .from('client_nutrition_preps')
    89	      .select('id, physiological_date, title, meal_type, meal_slot, variant_group_id, scenario_key, scenario_label, is_active, status, entries, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g, total_fiber_g, planned_for, created_at, updated_at')
    90	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    91	      .eq('physiological_date', date)
    92	      .eq('status', 'planned')
    93	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false }),
    94	
    95	    svc()
    96	      .from('client_water_logs')
    97	      .select('amount_ml, caffeine_mg, logged_at')
    98	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    99	      .gte('logged_at', physiologicalStart.toISOString())
   100	      .lte('logged_at', physiologicalEnd.toISOString()),
   101	
   102	    // Latest body weight from assessments
   103	    svc()
   104	      .from('assessment_responses')
   105	      .select('numeric_value')
   106	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   107	      .eq('field_key', 'weight_kg')
   108	      .not('numeric_value', 'is', null)
   109	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
   110	      .limit(1)
   111	      .maybeSingle(),
   112	
   113	    // Latest body weight from client check-ins (preferred when available)
   114	    svc()
   115	      .from('client_daily_checkins')
   116	      .select('weight_kg')
   117	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   118	      .not('weight_kg', 'is', null)
   119	      .order('date', { ascending: false })
   120	      .limit(1)

   327	    trendTotals[key].kcal      += computeMacroEnergy({
   328	      protein_g: Number((m as any).total_protein_g ?? 0),
   329	      carbs_g: Number((m as any).total_carbs_g ?? 0),
   330	      fat_g: Number((m as any).total_fat_g ?? 0),
   331	    })
   332	    trendTotals[key].protein_g += Number((m as any).total_protein_g ?? 0)
   333	    trendTotals[key].carbs_g   += Number((m as any).total_carbs_g   ?? 0)
   334	    trendTotals[key].fat_g     += Number((m as any).total_fat_g     ?? 0)
   335	  }
   336	  const trend = days.map(d => ({
   337	    date:      d,
   338	    consumed:  trendTotals[d].kcal,
   339	    protein_g: trendTotals[d].protein_g,
   340	    carbs_g:   trendTotals[d].carbs_g,
   341	    fat_g:     trendTotals[d].fat_g,
   342	    target:    target.kcal,
   343	    targetProtein: target.protein_g,
   344	    targetCarbs:   target.carbs_g,
   345	    targetFat:     target.fat_g,
   346	  }))
   347	
   348	  // ── Streak / logged dates ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   349	  const streakMeals = streakResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (streakResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   350	  const loggedDatesSet = new Set<string>(

    37	function avgRest(exercises: any[]): number | null {
    38	  const rests = exercises.filter(ex => ex.rest_sec != null).map(ex => ex.rest_sec as number)
    39	  if (rests.length === 0) return null
    40	  return Math.round(rests.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / rests.length)
    41	}
    42	
    43	function avgRir(exercises: any[]): number | null {
    44	  const rirs = exercises.filter(ex => ex.rir != null).map(ex => ex.rir as number)
    45	  if (rirs.length === 0) return null
    46	  return Math.round(rirs.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / rirs.length)
    47	}

   193	  async function handleConfirmSkip() {
   194	    if (!todaySession || skipSubmitting) return
   195	    setSkipSubmitting(true)
   196	    setSkipError(null)
   197	    try {
   198	      const res = await fetch('/api/client/programme/skip', {
   199	        method: 'POST',
   200	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   201	        body: JSON.stringify({
   202	          programSessionId: todaySession.id,
   203	          scheduledDate: currentDateIso,
   204	          reasonKey: skipReason,
   205	          note: skipNote.trim() || null,
   206	        }),
   207	      })
   208	      const data = await res.json().catch(() => null)
   209	      if (!res.ok) {
   210	        setSkipError(data?.error ?? 'Impossible de passer cette séance.')
   211	        return
   212	      }
   213	      setLocalSkippedIds((prev) => prev.includes(todaySession.id) ? prev : [...prev, todaySession.id])
   214	      setLocalDayOverrideKind('off')
   215	      setSkipOpen(false)
   216	      setSkipNote('')
   217	      router.refresh()
   218	    } finally {
   219	      setSkipSubmitting(false)
   220	    }
   221	  }
   222	
   223	  // Historique — 30 dernières séances
   224	  const recentSessions = useMemo(() =>
   225	    [...sessionList].sort((a, b) => b.date.localeCompare(a.date)).slice(0, 30),
   226	    [sessionList]
   227	  )

   230	  const timeline = useMemo(() => {
   231	    const map: Record<string, { date: string; volume: number }> = {}
   232	    for (const log of rawLogs) {
   233	      const date = log.logged_at.split('T')[0]
   234	      if (!map[date]) map[date] = { date, volume: 0 }
   235	      for (const s of log.client_set_logs) {
   236	        if (s.completed) {
   237	          map[date].volume += (s.actual_reps ?? 0) * (parseFloat(String(s.actual_weight_kg)) || 0)
   238	        }
   239	      }
   240	    }
   241	    return Object.values(map).sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
   242	  }, [rawLogs])

FILE: app/lib/genesis/patterns/pattern-detector.ts
------------------------------------------------------------

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	import type { Pattern } from './patterns.v1';
     2	
     3	export interface PatternEvidence {
     4	  [key: string]: any;
     5	}
     6	
     7	export interface DetectedPattern {
     8	  pattern_id: string;
     9	  severity: Pattern['severity'];
    10	  title: string;
    11	  evidence: PatternEvidence;
    12	  recommendations: string[];
    13	  do: string[];
    14	  dont: string[];
    15	}
    16	
    17	export interface PatternInput {
    18	  ipt_global: number;
    19	  axes: Record<string, { normalized: number }>;
    20	  derived?: Record<string, any>;
    21	}
    22	
    23	/**
    24	 * V1.1 — règles lisibles, purement déterministes.
    25	 * Ajoute tes patterns critiques ici (et bump version si changement).
    26	 */
    27	export function detectPatterns(input: PatternInput): DetectedPattern[] {
    28	  const out: DetectedPattern[] = [];
    29	  const a = input.axes;
    30	
    31	  // exemples: seuils simples (à calibrer)
    32	  if (a.sleep?.normalized !== undefined && a.sleep.normalized < 40) {
    33	    out.push({
    34	      pattern_id: 'sleep_low',
    35	      severity: 'high',
    36	      title: 'dette de sommeil',
    37	      evidence: { sleep_score: a.sleep.normalized },
    38	      recommendations: [
    39	        'prioriser une fenêtre de sommeil stable 7 jours',
    40	        'baisser la charge d’entraînement si possible (récupération)'
    41	      ],
    42	      do: ['heure de coucher fixe', 'lumière faible 60 min avant'],
    43	      dont: ['caféine tardive', 'écrans intenses en fin de journée']
    44	    });
    45	  }
    46	
    47	  if (a.stress?.normalized !== undefined && a.stress.normalized < 35) {
    48	    out.push({
    49	      pattern_id: 'stress_high',
    50	      severity: 'critical',
    51	      title: 'stress chronique dominant',
    52	      evidence: { stress_score: a.stress.normalized },
    53	      recommendations: [
    54	        'réduire la friction du plan (2 habitudes max)',
    55	        'mettre l’accent sur respiration / marche quotidienne'
    56	      ],
    57	      do: ['marcher 15–25 min/jour', 'respiration 5 min x2/jour'],
    58	      dont: ['augmenter volume training', 'restrictions agressives']
    59	    });
    60	  }
    61	
    62	  if (input.ipt_global < 35) {
    63	    out.push({
    64	      pattern_id: 'ipt_low_global',
    65	      severity: 'high',
    66	      title: 'potentiel de transformation faible (phase stabilisation)',
    67	      evidence: { ipt_global: input.ipt_global },
    68	      recommendations: [
    69	        'démarrer par un plan 7 jours ultra-simple',
    70	        'viser l’adhérence avant l’optimisation'
    71	      ],
    72	      do: ['1 action nutrition + 1 action sommeil'],
    73	      dont: ['changements multiples simultanés']
    74	    });
    75	  }
    76	
    77	  return out;
    78	}

    24	import { Accordion } from '@/components/ui/Accordion';
    25	// --- TYPES ---
    26	type Phase = 'menstrual' | 'follicular' | 'ovulatory' | 'luteal';
    27	type InputMode = 'day' | 'date';
    28	
    29	interface PhaseConfig {
    30	  id: Phase;

    62	function FieldLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
    63	  return (
    64	    <label className="block text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mb-1">

    70	function Input({ value, onChange, placeholder, type = 'number', step, min, max, className = '' }: {
    71	  value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; placeholder?: string;
    72	  type?: string; step?: string; min?: string; max?: string; className?: string;
    73	}) {
    74	  return (
    75	    <input
    76	      type={type} value={value} step={step} min={min} max={max}
    77	      onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    78	      placeholder={placeholder}
    79	      className={`w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-white/20 outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors ${className}`}
    80	    />
    81	  );
    82	}
    83	
    84	function Select<T extends string>({ value, onChange, options }: {
    85	  value: T;
    86	  onChange: (v: T) => void;
    87	  options: { value: T; label: string }[];
    88	}) {
    89	  return (
    90	    <select
    91	      value={value}
    92	      onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value as T)}
    93	      className="w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors appearance-none cursor-pointer"
    94	    >
    95	      {options.map((o) => <option key={o.value} value={o.value} className="bg-[#181818]">{o.label}</option>)}
    96	    </select>
    97	  );
    98	}

   100	function SectionTitle({ children, icon: Icon }: { children: React.ReactNode; icon?: React.ElementType }) {
   101	  return (
   102	    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">

   105	    </div>
   106	  );
   107	}

65:export function CaffeineGlyph({ drinkType, active = false, size = "md", className = "", color }: Props) {

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { DRINK_PRESETS, type DrinkType } from "@/lib/client/nutrition/drinks"
     4	
     5	type GlyphSize = "sm" | "md" | "lg"
     6	
     7	interface Props {
     8	  drinkType: DrinkType
     9	  active?: boolean
    10	  size?: GlyphSize
    11	  className?: string
    12	  color?: string
    13	}
    14	
    15	const SIZE_MAP: Record<GlyphSize, { glyph: number; gap: number; chip: string }> = {
    16	  sm: { glyph: 11, gap: 4, chip: "h-6 px-1.5" },
    17	  md: { glyph: 13, gap: 4, chip: "h-7 px-2" },
    18	  lg: { glyph: 15, gap: 5, chip: "h-8 px-2.5" },
    19	}
    20	
    21	function BeanGlyph({ size, color }: { size: number; color: string }) {
    22	  return (
    23	    <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 16 16" aria-hidden="true">
    24	      <path
    25	        d="M8 1.5c2.9 0 5 2.2 5 5.5S10.9 14.5 8 14.5 3 12.3 3 9 5.1 1.5 8 1.5Z"
    26	        fill="none"
    27	        stroke={color}
    28	        strokeWidth="1.7"
    29	        strokeLinecap="round"
    30	        strokeLinejoin="round"
    31	      />
    32	      <path
    33	        d="M7.9 2.5c.7 1.2 1.1 2.6 1.1 4.2 0 2.3-.8 4.3-2.3 5.8"
    34	        fill="none"
    35	        stroke={color}
    36	        strokeWidth="1.4"
    37	        strokeLinecap="round"
    38	      />
    39	    </svg>
    40	  )
    41	}
    42	
    43	function LeafGlyph({ size, color }: { size: number; color: string }) {
    44	  return (
    45	    <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 16 16" aria-hidden="true">
    46	      <path
    47	        d="M12.8 2.8c-3.6-.7-7 .9-8.8 4.4C2.6 10 2.8 12.5 3.2 13.7c1.2.4 3.7.6 6.5-.9 3.5-1.8 5.1-5.2 4.4-8.8-.1-.5-.7-.9-1.3-1Z"
    48	        fill="none"
    49	        stroke={color}
    50	        strokeWidth="1.7"
    51	        strokeLinecap="round"
    52	        strokeLinejoin="round"
    53	      />
    54	      <path
    55	        d="M4.8 11.2c1.9-2.4 4.3-4.3 7.2-5.6"
    56	        fill="none"
    57	        stroke={color}
    58	        strokeWidth="1.4"
    59	        strokeLinecap="round"
    60	      />
    61	    </svg>
    62	  )
    63	}
    64	
    65	export function CaffeineGlyph({ drinkType, active = false, size = "md", className = "", color }: Props) {
    66	  const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    67	  const dims = SIZE_MAP[size]
    68	  const count = preset.cupCount
    69	  const iconColor = color ?? (active ? "#111111" : preset.accent)
    70	  const isTea = drinkType === "tea"
    71	
    72	  return (
    73	    <div
    74	      className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border ${dims.chip} ${className}`}
    75	      style={{
    76	        background: active ? preset.accent : "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
    77	        borderColor: active ? `${preset.accent}55` : "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
    78	        boxShadow: active ? `0 0 0 1px ${preset.accent}22 inset` : "none",
    79	      }}
    80	      aria-hidden="true"
    81	    >
    82	      <div className="flex items-center justify-center" style={{ gap: dims.gap }}>
    83	        {isTea ? (
    84	          <LeafGlyph size={dims.glyph + 2} color={iconColor} />
    85	        ) : (
    86	          Array.from({ length: count }).map((_, index) => (
    87	            <BeanGlyph
    88	              key={`${drinkType}-${index}`}
    89	              size={dims.glyph}
    90	              color={iconColor}
    91	            />
    92	          ))
    93	        )}
    94	      </div>
    95	    </div>
    96	  )
    97	}

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useState } from "react"
     4	import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
     5	import { Barbell, ForkKnife, Drop, CheckCircle, Circle } from "@phosphor-icons/react"
     6	import dynamic from "next/dynamic"
     7	
     8	const QuickWaterModal = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/QuickWaterModal"), { ssr: false })
     9	
    10	interface TodayStrip {
    11	  sessions: { id: string; name: string }[]
    12	  calories: { logged: number; target: number }
    13	  water: { logged: number; target: number }
    14	  checkin: {
    15	    morning: boolean
    16	    evening: boolean
    17	    pendingCount?: number
    18	  }
    19	}
    20	
    21	interface ChatTodayStripProps {
    22	  onCheckinClick?: () => void
    23	}
    24	
    25	/**
    26	 * Semantic color for a progress bar based on completion ratio.
    27	 * lenient=true: overshooting is OK (water), stays green up to 150%
    28	 * lenient=false: strict (calories), overshooting triggers warnings
    29	 */
    30	function progressColor(pct: number, lenient = false): string {
    31	  if (pct < 0.5)  return "#b84040"  // red — very low
    32	  if (pct < 0.8)  return "#b07828"  // amber — getting there
    33	  if (pct < 1.0)  return "#4a9264"  // green — approaching goal
    34	  if (lenient) {
    35	    if (pct < 1.5) return "#4a9264"  // water: still green even if over 100%
    36	    return "#b07828"                  // water: amber only if truly excessive (>150%)
    37	  }
    38	  // Strict (calories)
    39	  if (pct < 1.1) return "#b07828"  // 100–110%: slight overshoot → amber
    40	  return "#b84040"                  // >110%: significant overshoot → red
    41	}
    42	
    43	export default function ChatTodayStrip({ onCheckinClick }: ChatTodayStripProps) {
    44	  const router = useRouter()
    45	  const [data, setData] = useState<TodayStrip | null>(null)
    46	  const [waterOpen, setWaterOpen] = useState(false)
    47	
    48	  function refresh() {
    49	    fetch("/api/client/chat/today-strip")
    50	      .then(r => r.json())
    51	      .then(setData)
    52	      .catch(() => {})
    53	  }
    54	
    55	  useEffect(() => { refresh() }, [])
    56	
    57	  if (!data || !data.checkin) {
    58	    return (
    59	      <div className="shrink-0 h-[44px] bg-[#0d0d0d] flex items-center px-4 gap-2">
    60	        {[80, 120, 100].map(w => (
    61	          <div key={w} className="h-[26px] bg-[#111111] rounded-xl animate-pulse" style={{ width: w }} />
    62	        ))}
    63	      </div>
    64	    )
    65	  }
    66	
    67	  const morningDone = data.checkin?.morning ?? false
    68	  const eveningDone = data.checkin?.evening ?? false
    69	  const pendingCount = data.checkin?.pendingCount ?? (Number(!morningDone) + Number(!eveningDone))
    70	  const checkinDone = pendingCount === 0
    71	
    72	  // Raw ratios (can exceed 1.0) — used for color; bar width is capped
    73	  const rawCalPct  = data.calories.target > 0 ? data.calories.logged / data.calories.target : 0
    74	  const rawWaterPct = data.water.target > 0 ? data.water.logged / data.water.target : 0
    75	
    76	  const calBarWidth  = Math.min(rawCalPct, 1) * 100
    77	  const waterBarWidth = Math.min(rawWaterPct, 1) * 100
    78	
    79	  const calColor   = progressColor(rawCalPct, false)
    80	  const waterColor = progressColor(rawWaterPct, true)
    81	
    82	  return (
    83	    <>
    84	      <div className="shrink-0 bg-[#0d0d0d]">
    85	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 overflow-x-auto scrollbar-none">
    86	
    87	          {/* Check-in */}
    88	          <button
    89	            data-tour-strip="checkin"
    90	            onClick={onCheckinClick}
    91	            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-xl shrink-0 active:opacity-70 transition-all ${
    92	              checkinDone ? "bg-[#222222]" : "bg-[#1a1a1a]"
    93	            }`}
    94	          >
    95	            {checkinDone
    96	              ? <CheckCircle size={13} weight="fill" className="text-[#f2f2f2]" />
    97	              : <Circle size={13} className="text-[#808080]" />
    98	            }
    99	            <span className={`text-[11px] font-barlow font-semibold whitespace-nowrap ${checkinDone ? "text-[#f2f2f2]" : "text-[#808080]"}`}>
   100	              {checkinDone ? "Check-ins ✓" : pendingCount === 2 ? "Check-ins (2)" : "Check-in (1)"}
   101	            </span>
   102	          </button>
   103	
   104	          {/* Sessions */}
   105	          {data.sessions.map((s, idx) => (
   106	            <button
   107	              key={s.id}
   108	              {...(idx === 0 ? { 'data-tour-strip': 'program' } : {})}
   109	              onClick={() => router.push("/client/programme")}
   110	              className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-xl bg-[#111111] shrink-0 active:opacity-70"
   111	            >
   112	              <Barbell size={13} className="text-[#5a5a5a]" />
   113	              <span className="text-[11px] font-barlow font-medium text-[#808080] whitespace-nowrap max-w-[100px] truncate">
   114	                {s.name}

----- autour des inserts/logs -----

>>> components/client/ChatTodayStrip.tsx:49
    19	}
    20	
    21	interface ChatTodayStripProps {
    22	  onCheckinClick?: () => void
    23	}
    24	
    25	/**
    26	 * Semantic color for a progress bar based on completion ratio.
    27	 * lenient=true: overshooting is OK (water), stays green up to 150%
    28	 * lenient=false: strict (calories), overshooting triggers warnings
    29	 */
    30	function progressColor(pct: number, lenient = false): string {
    31	  if (pct < 0.5)  return "#b84040"  // red — very low
    32	  if (pct < 0.8)  return "#b07828"  // amber — getting there
    33	  if (pct < 1.0)  return "#4a9264"  // green — approaching goal
    34	  if (lenient) {
    35	    if (pct < 1.5) return "#4a9264"  // water: still green even if over 100%
    36	    return "#b07828"                  // water: amber only if truly excessive (>150%)
    37	  }
    38	  // Strict (calories)
    39	  if (pct < 1.1) return "#b07828"  // 100–110%: slight overshoot → amber
    40	  return "#b84040"                  // >110%: significant overshoot → red
    41	}
    42	
    43	export default function ChatTodayStrip({ onCheckinClick }: ChatTodayStripProps) {
    44	  const router = useRouter()
    45	  const [data, setData] = useState<TodayStrip | null>(null)
    46	  const [waterOpen, setWaterOpen] = useState(false)
    47	
    48	  function refresh() {
    49	    fetch("/api/client/chat/today-strip")
    50	      .then(r => r.json())
    51	      .then(setData)
    52	      .catch(() => {})
    53	  }
    54	
    55	  useEffect(() => { refresh() }, [])
    56	
    57	  if (!data || !data.checkin) {
    58	    return (
    59	      <div className="shrink-0 h-[44px] bg-[#0d0d0d] flex items-center px-4 gap-2">
    60	        {[80, 120, 100].map(w => (
    61	          <div key={w} className="h-[26px] bg-[#111111] rounded-xl animate-pulse" style={{ width: w }} />
    62	        ))}
    63	      </div>
    64	    )
    65	  }
    66	
    67	  const morningDone = data.checkin?.morning ?? false
    68	  const eveningDone = data.checkin?.evening ?? false
    69	  const pendingCount = data.checkin?.pendingCount ?? (Number(!morningDone) + Number(!eveningDone))
    70	  const checkinDone = pendingCount === 0
    71	
    72	  // Raw ratios (can exceed 1.0) — used for color; bar width is capped
    73	  const rawCalPct  = data.calories.target > 0 ? data.calories.logged / data.calories.target : 0
    74	  const rawWaterPct = data.water.target > 0 ? data.water.logged / data.water.target : 0
    75	
    76	  const calBarWidth  = Math.min(rawCalPct, 1) * 100
    77	  const waterBarWidth = Math.min(rawWaterPct, 1) * 100
    78	
    79	  const calColor   = progressColor(rawCalPct, false)
    80	  const waterColor = progressColor(rawWaterPct, true)
    81	
    82	  return (
    83	    <>
    84	      <div className="shrink-0 bg-[#0d0d0d]">
    85	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 overflow-x-auto scrollbar-none">
    86	
    87	          {/* Check-in */}
    88	          <button
    89	            data-tour-strip="checkin"
    90	            onClick={onCheckinClick}
    91	            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-xl shrink-0 active:opacity-70 transition-all ${
    92	              checkinDone ? "bg-[#222222]" : "bg-[#1a1a1a]"
    93	            }`}
    94	          >
    95	            {checkinDone
    96	              ? <CheckCircle size={13} weight="fill" className="text-[#f2f2f2]" />
    97	              : <Circle size={13} className="text-[#808080]" />
    98	            }
    99	            <span className={`text-[11px] font-barlow font-semibold whitespace-nowrap ${checkinDone ? "text-[#f2f2f2]" : "text-[#808080]"}`}>

   160	    if (stepIndex < visibleSteps.length - 1) {
   161	      setStepIndex(i => i + 1)

   174	  const isFABStep = !!step.isFAB
