----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"
     4	import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
     5	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion"
     6	import { Minus, Plus, Trash2, X } from "lucide-react"
     7	import { DRINK_PRESETS, estimateCaffeineMg, type DrinkType } from "@/lib/client/nutrition/drinks"
     8	import { CaffeineGlyph } from "@/components/client/CaffeineGlyph"
     9	
    10	type CaffeineLog = {
    11	  id: string
    12	  amount_ml: number
    13	  caffeine_mg: number
    14	  drink_type: DrinkType
    15	  logged_at: string
    16	}
    17	
    18	interface Props {
    19	  open: boolean
    20	  onClose: () => void
    21	  date?: string
    22	  onLogged?: (mg: number) => void
    23	  onDeleted?: (mg: number) => void
    24	}
    25	
    26	function formatTime(iso: string): string {
    27	  return new Date(iso).toLocaleTimeString("fr-FR", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" })
    28	}
    29	
    30	export default function QuickCaffeineModal({ open, onClose, date, onLogged, onDeleted }: Props) {
    31	  const router = useRouter()
    32	  const [drinkType, setDrinkType] = useState<DrinkType>("coffee")
    33	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(DRINK_PRESETS.coffee.baseAmountMl)
    34	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    35	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    36	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    37	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<CaffeineLog[]>([])
    38	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    39	
    40	  useEffect(() => {
    41	    if (!open) return
    42	    const url = new URL("/api/client/water", window.location.origin)
    43	    url.searchParams.set("kind", "caffeine")
    44	    if (date) url.searchParams.set("date", date)
    45	    fetch(url)
    46	      .then(r => r.json())
    47	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    48	      .catch(() => {})
    49	  }, [open, date])
    50	
    51	  useEffect(() => {
    52	    if (!open) return
    53	    const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    54	    setMl(preset.baseAmountMl)
    55	  }, [drinkType, open])
    56	
    57	  const caffeineMg = useMemo(() => estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType, ml), [drinkType, ml])
    58	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
    59	  const totalMg = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.caffeine_mg, 0)
    60	
    61	  async function log() {
    62	    if (saving) return
    63	    setSaving(true)
    64	    setError(null)
    65	    onLogged?.(caffeineMg)
    66	
    67	    try {
    68	      const res = await fetch("/api/client/water", {
    69	        method: "POST",
    70	        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    71	        body: JSON.stringify({
    72	          amount_ml: ml,
    73	          caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    74	          drink_type: drinkType,
    75	          date,
    76	        }),
    77	      })
    78	
    79	      if (!res.ok) {
    80	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    81	        setError(json.error ?? "Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
    82	        setSaving(false)
    83	        return
    84	      }
    85	
    86	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    87	      const newLog: CaffeineLog = {
    88	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    89	        amount_ml: ml,
    90	        caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    91	        drink_type: drinkType,
    92	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    93	      }
    94	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    95	      setDone(true)
    96	      setTimeout(() => {
    97	        setDone(false)
    98	        setSaving(false)
    99	        router.refresh()
   100	      }, 700)
   101	    } catch {
   102	      setError("Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
   103	      setSaving(false)
   104	    }
   105	  }
   106	
   107	  async function deleteLog(log: CaffeineLog) {
   108	    setDeletingId(log.id)
   109	    try {
   110	      const res = await fetch(`/api/client/water/${log.id}`, { method: "DELETE" })
   111	      if (res.ok) {
   112	        setLogs(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== log.id))
   113	        onDeleted?.(log.caffeine_mg)
   114	        router.refresh()
   115	      }
   116	    } finally {
   117	      setDeletingId(null)
   118	    }
   119	  }
   120	

----- autour des inserts/logs -----

>>> components/client/QuickCaffeineModal.tsx:12
     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"
     4	import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
     5	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion"
     6	import { Minus, Plus, Trash2, X } from "lucide-react"
     7	import { DRINK_PRESETS, estimateCaffeineMg, type DrinkType } from "@/lib/client/nutrition/drinks"
     8	import { CaffeineGlyph } from "@/components/client/CaffeineGlyph"
     9	
    10	type CaffeineLog = {
    11	  id: string
    12	  amount_ml: number
    13	  caffeine_mg: number
    14	  drink_type: DrinkType
    15	  logged_at: string
    16	}
    17	
    18	interface Props {
    19	  open: boolean
    20	  onClose: () => void
    21	  date?: string
    22	  onLogged?: (mg: number) => void
    23	  onDeleted?: (mg: number) => void
    24	}
    25	
    26	function formatTime(iso: string): string {
    27	  return new Date(iso).toLocaleTimeString("fr-FR", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" })
    28	}
    29	
    30	export default function QuickCaffeineModal({ open, onClose, date, onLogged, onDeleted }: Props) {
    31	  const router = useRouter()
    32	  const [drinkType, setDrinkType] = useState<DrinkType>("coffee")
    33	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(DRINK_PRESETS.coffee.baseAmountMl)
    34	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    35	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    36	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    37	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<CaffeineLog[]>([])
    38	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    39	
    40	  useEffect(() => {
    41	    if (!open) return
    42	    const url = new URL("/api/client/water", window.location.origin)
    43	    url.searchParams.set("kind", "caffeine")
    44	    if (date) url.searchParams.set("date", date)
    45	    fetch(url)
    46	      .then(r => r.json())
    47	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    48	      .catch(() => {})
    49	  }, [open, date])
    50	
    51	  useEffect(() => {
    52	    if (!open) return
    53	    const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    54	    setMl(preset.baseAmountMl)
    55	  }, [drinkType, open])
    56	
    57	  const caffeineMg = useMemo(() => estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType, ml), [drinkType, ml])
    58	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
    59	  const totalMg = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.caffeine_mg, 0)
    60	
    61	  async function log() {
    62	    if (saving) return

>>> components/client/QuickCaffeineModal.tsx:13
     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"
     4	import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
     5	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion"
     6	import { Minus, Plus, Trash2, X } from "lucide-react"
     7	import { DRINK_PRESETS, estimateCaffeineMg, type DrinkType } from "@/lib/client/nutrition/drinks"
     8	import { CaffeineGlyph } from "@/components/client/CaffeineGlyph"
     9	
    10	type CaffeineLog = {
    11	  id: string
    12	  amount_ml: number
    13	  caffeine_mg: number
    14	  drink_type: DrinkType
    15	  logged_at: string
    16	}
    17	
    18	interface Props {
    19	  open: boolean
    20	  onClose: () => void
    21	  date?: string
    22	  onLogged?: (mg: number) => void
    23	  onDeleted?: (mg: number) => void
    24	}
    25	
    26	function formatTime(iso: string): string {
    27	  return new Date(iso).toLocaleTimeString("fr-FR", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" })
    28	}
    29	
    30	export default function QuickCaffeineModal({ open, onClose, date, onLogged, onDeleted }: Props) {
    31	  const router = useRouter()
    32	  const [drinkType, setDrinkType] = useState<DrinkType>("coffee")
    33	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(DRINK_PRESETS.coffee.baseAmountMl)
    34	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    35	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    36	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    37	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<CaffeineLog[]>([])
    38	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    39	
    40	  useEffect(() => {
    41	    if (!open) return
    42	    const url = new URL("/api/client/water", window.location.origin)
    43	    url.searchParams.set("kind", "caffeine")
    44	    if (date) url.searchParams.set("date", date)
    45	    fetch(url)
    46	      .then(r => r.json())
    47	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    48	      .catch(() => {})
    49	  }, [open, date])
    50	
    51	  useEffect(() => {
    52	    if (!open) return
    53	    const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    54	    setMl(preset.baseAmountMl)
    55	  }, [drinkType, open])
    56	
    57	  const caffeineMg = useMemo(() => estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType, ml), [drinkType, ml])
    58	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
    59	  const totalMg = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.caffeine_mg, 0)
    60	
    61	  async function log() {
    62	    if (saving) return
    63	    setSaving(true)

>>> components/client/QuickCaffeineModal.tsx:45
    15	  logged_at: string
    16	}
    17	
    18	interface Props {
    19	  open: boolean
    20	  onClose: () => void
    21	  date?: string
    22	  onLogged?: (mg: number) => void
    23	  onDeleted?: (mg: number) => void
    24	}
    25	
    26	function formatTime(iso: string): string {
    27	  return new Date(iso).toLocaleTimeString("fr-FR", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" })
    28	}
    29	
    30	export default function QuickCaffeineModal({ open, onClose, date, onLogged, onDeleted }: Props) {
    31	  const router = useRouter()
    32	  const [drinkType, setDrinkType] = useState<DrinkType>("coffee")
    33	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(DRINK_PRESETS.coffee.baseAmountMl)
    34	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    35	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    36	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    37	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<CaffeineLog[]>([])
    38	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    39	
    40	  useEffect(() => {
    41	    if (!open) return
    42	    const url = new URL("/api/client/water", window.location.origin)
    43	    url.searchParams.set("kind", "caffeine")
    44	    if (date) url.searchParams.set("date", date)
    45	    fetch(url)
    46	      .then(r => r.json())
    47	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    48	      .catch(() => {})
    49	  }, [open, date])
    50	
    51	  useEffect(() => {
    52	    if (!open) return
    53	    const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    54	    setMl(preset.baseAmountMl)
    55	  }, [drinkType, open])
    56	
    57	  const caffeineMg = useMemo(() => estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType, ml), [drinkType, ml])
    58	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
    59	  const totalMg = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.caffeine_mg, 0)
    60	
    61	  async function log() {
    62	    if (saving) return
    63	    setSaving(true)
    64	    setError(null)
    65	    onLogged?.(caffeineMg)
    66	
    67	    try {
    68	      const res = await fetch("/api/client/water", {
    69	        method: "POST",
    70	        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    71	        body: JSON.stringify({
    72	          amount_ml: ml,
    73	          caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    74	          drink_type: drinkType,
    75	          date,
    76	        }),
    77	      })
    78	
    79	      if (!res.ok) {
    80	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    81	        setError(json.error ?? "Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
    82	        setSaving(false)
    83	        return
    84	      }
    85	
    86	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    87	      const newLog: CaffeineLog = {
    88	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    89	        amount_ml: ml,
    90	        caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    91	        drink_type: drinkType,
    92	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    93	      }
    94	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    95	      setDone(true)

>>> components/client/QuickCaffeineModal.tsx:58
    28	}
    29	
    30	export default function QuickCaffeineModal({ open, onClose, date, onLogged, onDeleted }: Props) {
    31	  const router = useRouter()
    32	  const [drinkType, setDrinkType] = useState<DrinkType>("coffee")
    33	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(DRINK_PRESETS.coffee.baseAmountMl)
    34	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    35	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    36	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    37	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<CaffeineLog[]>([])
    38	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    39	
    40	  useEffect(() => {
    41	    if (!open) return
    42	    const url = new URL("/api/client/water", window.location.origin)
    43	    url.searchParams.set("kind", "caffeine")
    44	    if (date) url.searchParams.set("date", date)
    45	    fetch(url)
    46	      .then(r => r.json())
    47	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    48	      .catch(() => {})
    49	  }, [open, date])
    50	
    51	  useEffect(() => {
    52	    if (!open) return
    53	    const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    54	    setMl(preset.baseAmountMl)
    55	  }, [drinkType, open])
    56	
    57	  const caffeineMg = useMemo(() => estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType, ml), [drinkType, ml])
    58	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
    59	  const totalMg = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.caffeine_mg, 0)
    60	
    61	  async function log() {
    62	    if (saving) return
    63	    setSaving(true)
    64	    setError(null)
    65	    onLogged?.(caffeineMg)
    66	
    67	    try {
    68	      const res = await fetch("/api/client/water", {
    69	        method: "POST",
    70	        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    71	        body: JSON.stringify({
    72	          amount_ml: ml,
    73	          caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    74	          drink_type: drinkType,
    75	          date,
    76	        }),
    77	      })
    78	
    79	      if (!res.ok) {
    80	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    81	        setError(json.error ?? "Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
    82	        setSaving(false)
    83	        return
    84	      }
    85	
    86	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    87	      const newLog: CaffeineLog = {
    88	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    89	        amount_ml: ml,
    90	        caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    91	        drink_type: drinkType,
    92	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    93	      }
    94	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    95	      setDone(true)
    96	      setTimeout(() => {
    97	        setDone(false)
    98	        setSaving(false)
    99	        router.refresh()
   100	      }, 700)
   101	    } catch {
   102	      setError("Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
   103	      setSaving(false)
   104	    }
   105	  }
   106	
   107	  async function deleteLog(log: CaffeineLog) {
   108	    setDeletingId(log.id)

>>> components/client/QuickCaffeineModal.tsx:59
    29	
    30	export default function QuickCaffeineModal({ open, onClose, date, onLogged, onDeleted }: Props) {
    31	  const router = useRouter()
    32	  const [drinkType, setDrinkType] = useState<DrinkType>("coffee")
    33	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(DRINK_PRESETS.coffee.baseAmountMl)
    34	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    35	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    36	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    37	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<CaffeineLog[]>([])
    38	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    39	
    40	  useEffect(() => {
    41	    if (!open) return
    42	    const url = new URL("/api/client/water", window.location.origin)
    43	    url.searchParams.set("kind", "caffeine")
    44	    if (date) url.searchParams.set("date", date)
    45	    fetch(url)
    46	      .then(r => r.json())
    47	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    48	      .catch(() => {})
    49	  }, [open, date])
    50	
    51	  useEffect(() => {
    52	    if (!open) return
    53	    const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    54	    setMl(preset.baseAmountMl)
    55	  }, [drinkType, open])
    56	
    57	  const caffeineMg = useMemo(() => estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType, ml), [drinkType, ml])
    58	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
    59	  const totalMg = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.caffeine_mg, 0)
    60	
    61	  async function log() {
    62	    if (saving) return
    63	    setSaving(true)
    64	    setError(null)
    65	    onLogged?.(caffeineMg)
    66	
    67	    try {
    68	      const res = await fetch("/api/client/water", {
    69	        method: "POST",
    70	        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    71	        body: JSON.stringify({
    72	          amount_ml: ml,
    73	          caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    74	          drink_type: drinkType,
    75	          date,
    76	        }),
    77	      })
    78	
    79	      if (!res.ok) {
    80	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    81	        setError(json.error ?? "Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
    82	        setSaving(false)
    83	        return
    84	      }
    85	
    86	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    87	      const newLog: CaffeineLog = {
    88	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    89	        amount_ml: ml,
    90	        caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    91	        drink_type: drinkType,
    92	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    93	      }
    94	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    95	      setDone(true)
    96	      setTimeout(() => {
    97	        setDone(false)
    98	        setSaving(false)
    99	        router.refresh()
   100	      }, 700)
   101	    } catch {
   102	      setError("Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
   103	      setSaving(false)
   104	    }
   105	  }
   106	
   107	  async function deleteLog(log: CaffeineLog) {
   108	    setDeletingId(log.id)
   109	    try {

>>> components/client/QuickCaffeineModal.tsx:68

    40	  useEffect(() => {
    41	    if (!open) return
    42	    const url = new URL("/api/client/water", window.location.origin)
    43	    url.searchParams.set("kind", "caffeine")
    44	    if (date) url.searchParams.set("date", date)
    45	    fetch(url)
    46	      .then(r => r.json())
    47	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    48	      .catch(() => {})
    49	  }, [open, date])
    50	
    51	  useEffect(() => {
    52	    if (!open) return
    53	    const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    54	    setMl(preset.baseAmountMl)
    55	  }, [drinkType, open])
    56

    58	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
    59	  const totalMg = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.caffeine_mg, 0)
    60	
    61	  async function log() {
    62	    if (saving) return
    63	    setSaving(true)
    64	    setError(null)
    65	    onLogged?.(caffeineMg)
    66	
    67	    try {
    68	      const res = await fetch("/api/client/water", {
    69	        method: "POST",
    70	        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    71	        body: JSON.stringify({
    72	          amount_ml: ml,
    73	          caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    74	          drink_type: drinkType,
    75	          date,
    76	        }),
    77	      })
    78	
    79	      if (!res.ok) {
    80	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    81	        setError(json.error ?? "Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
    82	        setSaving(false)
    83	        return
    84	      }
    85	
    86	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    87	      const newLog: CaffeineLog = {
    88	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    89	        amount_ml: ml,
    90	        caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    91	        drink_type: drinkType,
    92	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    93	      }
    94	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    95	      setDone(true)
    96	      setTimeout(() => {
    97	        setDone(false)
    98	        setSaving(false)
    99	        router.refresh()
   100	      }, 700)
   101	    } catch {
   102	      setError("Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
   103	      setSaving(false)
   104	    }
   105	  }
   106	
   107	  async function deleteLog(log: CaffeineLog) {
   108	    setDeletingId(log.id)
   109	    try {
   110	      const res = await fetch(`/api/client/water/${log.id}`, { method: "DELETE" })
   111	      if (res.ok) {
   112	        setLogs(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== log.id))
   113	        onDeleted?.(log.caffeine_mg)
   114	        router.refresh()
   115	      }
   116	    } finally {
   117	      setDeletingId(null)
   118	    }

    61	  async function log() {
    62	    if (saving) return
    63	    setSaving(true)
    64	    setError(null)
    65	    onLogged?.(caffeineMg)
    66	
    67	    try {
    68	      const res = await fetch("/api/client/water", {
    69	        method: "POST",
    70	        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    71	        body: JSON.stringify({
    72	          amount_ml: ml,
    73	          caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    74	          drink_type: drinkType,
    75	          date,
    76	        }),
    77	      })
    78	
    79	      if (!res.ok) {
    80	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    81	        setError(json.error ?? "Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
    82	        setSaving(false)
    83	        return
    84	      }
    85	
    86	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    87	      const newLog: CaffeineLog = {
    88	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    89	        amount_ml: ml,
    90	        caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    91	        drink_type: drinkType,
    92	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    93	      }
    94	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    95	      setDone(true)
    96	      setTimeout(() => {
    97	        setDone(false)
    98	        setSaving(false)
    99	        router.refresh()
   100	      }, 700)
   101	    } catch {
   102	      setError("Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
   103	      setSaving(false)
   104	    }
   105	  }
   106	
   107	  async function deleteLog(log: CaffeineLog) {
   108	    setDeletingId(log.id)
   109	    try {
   110	      const res = await fetch(`/api/client/water/${log.id}`, { method: "DELETE" })
   111	      if (res.ok) {
   112	        setLogs(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== log.id))
   113	        onDeleted?.(log.caffeine_mg)
   114	        router.refresh()
   115	      }
   116	    } finally {
   117	      setDeletingId(null)
   118	    }
   119	  }
   120	
   121	  const options: DrinkType[] = ["espresso", "coffee", "lungo", "tea"]
   122

   176	                            <span className="text-[10px] text-white/20 shrink-0">{formatTime(log.logged_at)}</span>

   204	                      }`}
   205	                      style={active ? { boxShadow: `0 0 0 1px ${preset.accent}22 inset` } : undefined}
   206	                    >
   207	                      <CaffeineGlyph drinkType={type} active={active} size="lg" className="mx-auto" color={active ? "#111111" : preset.accent} />

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
     4	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
     5	import { X, Drop, ForkKnife, Lightning } from "@phosphor-icons/react";
     6	import dynamic from "next/dynamic";
     7	import type { CycleState } from "@/lib/cycle/cycleEngine";
     8	import type { NutritionMacros } from "@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget";
     9	import { CaffeineGlyph } from "@/components/client/CaffeineGlyph";
    10	
    11	const QuickWaterModal   = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/QuickWaterModal"),           { ssr: false });
    12	const QuickCaffeineModal = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/QuickCaffeineModal"),       { ssr: false });
    13	const FreeActivitySheet = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/smart/FreeActivitySheet"),   { ssr: false });
    14	const LogPeriodSheet    = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/cycle/LogPeriodSheet"),      { ssr: false });
    15	const MealLogSheet      = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/smart/MealLogSheet"),        { ssr: false });
    16	const VoiceLogSheet     = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/smart/VoiceLogSheet"),       { ssr: false });
    17	
    18	interface Props {
    19	  open: boolean;
    20	  onClose: () => void;
    21	}
    22	
    23	type BalanceContext = {
    24	  consumed: NutritionMacros
    25	  target: NutritionMacros
    26	}
    27	
    28	type SubSheet = "water" | "caffeine" | "activity" | "cycle" | "meal" | "meal-voice" | null;
    29	
    30	const BASE_ACTIONS = [
    31	  {
    32	    key: "water" as const,
    33	    Icon: Drop,
    34	    label: "Eau",
    35	    sub: "Logger ma consommation d'eau",
    36	  },
    37	  {
    38	    key: "caffeine" as const,
    39	    Icon: Drop,
    40	    label: "Café & thé",
    41	    sub: "Espresso, normal, lungo",
    42	  },
    43	  {
    44	    key: "meal" as const,
    45	    Icon: ForkKnife,
    46	    label: "Repas",
    47	    sub: "Ajouter un repas ou aliment",
    48	  },
    49	  {
    50	    key: "activity" as const,
    51	    Icon: Lightning,
    52	    label: "Activité",
    53	    sub: "Course, marche, sport libre…",
    54	  },
    55	];
    56	
    57	export default function QuickLogSheet({ open, onClose }: Props) {
    58	  const [sub, setSub] = useState<SubSheet>(null);
    59	  const [cycleState, setCycleState] = useState<CycleState | null>(null);
    60	  const [balanceContext, setBalanceContext] = useState<BalanceContext | null>(null);
    61	
    62	  useEffect(() => {
    63	    if (!open) return;
    64	    // Cycle state
    65	    fetch("/api/client/cycle/status")
    66	      .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
    67	      .then(data => { if (data?.cycleState) setCycleState(data.cycleState); })
    68	      .catch(() => {});
    69	    // Nutrition balance du jour pour les jauges live
    70	    fetch("/api/client/nutrition/today-progress")
    71	      .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
    72	      .then(data => {
    73	        if (!data?.target) return;
    74	        const toMacros = (d: { calories: number; protein_g: number; carbs_g: number; fat_g: number }): NutritionMacros => ({
    75	          kcal: d.calories,
    76	          protein_g: d.protein_g,
    77	          carbs_g: d.carbs_g,
    78	          fat_g: d.fat_g,
    79	          water_ml: 0,
    80	        });
    81	        setBalanceContext({ consumed: toMacros(data.consumed), target: toMacros(data.target) });
    82	      })
    83	      .catch(() => {});
    84	  }, [open]);
    85	
    86	  function handleClose() {
    87	    setSub(null);
    88	    onClose();
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  function handleAction(key: string) {
    92	    if (key === "water")    { setSub("water"); return; }
    93	    if (key === "caffeine") { setSub("caffeine"); return; }
    94	    if (key === "activity") { setSub("activity"); return; }
    95	    if (key === "cycle")    { setSub("cycle"); return; }
    96	    // "meal" → ouvrir directement MealLogSheet standard, pas de sélecteur intermédiaire
    97	    if (key === "meal")     { setSub("meal"); return; }
    98	  }
    99	
   100	  const actions = [
   101	    ...BASE_ACTIONS,
   102	    ...(cycleState?.hasActiveCycle ? [{
   103	      key: "cycle" as const,
   104	      Icon: Drop,
   105	      label: "Cycle",
   106	      sub: "Début ou fin de règles",
   107	    }] : []),
   108	  ];
   109	
   110	  return (
   111	    <>
   112	      {/* Main quick-log sheet */}
   113	      <AnimatePresence>
   114	        {open && sub === null && (
   115	          <>
   116	            <motion.div
   117	              key="overlay"
   118	              className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-[2px]"
   119	              initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   120	              animate={{ opacity: 1 }}

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
     4	import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
     5	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'
     6	import { X, Droplets, Plus, Minus, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react'
     7	import { useClientT } from '@/components/client/ClientI18nProvider'
     8	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from '@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors'
     9	
    10	const QUICK_AMOUNTS = [150, 250, 330, 500]
    11	
    12	type WaterLog = { id: string; amount_ml: number; logged_at: string }
    13	
    14	interface Props {
    15	  open: boolean
    16	  onClose: () => void
    17	  onLogged?: (ml: number) => void
    18	  onDeleted?: (ml: number) => void
    19	  date?: string
    20	}
    21	
    22	function formatTime(iso: string): string {
    23	  return new Date(iso).toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
    24	}
    25	
    26	export default function QuickWaterModal({ open, onClose, onLogged, onDeleted, date }: Props) {
    27	  const { t } = useClientT()
    28	  const router = useRouter()
    29	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(250)
    30	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    31	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    32	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    33	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<WaterLog[]>([])
    34	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    35	
    36	  useEffect(() => {
    37	    if (!open) return
    38	    const url = new URL('/api/client/water', window.location.origin)
    39	    if (date) url.searchParams.set('date', date)
    40	    url.searchParams.set('kind', 'water')
    41	    fetch(url)
    42	      .then(r => r.json())
    43	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    44	      .catch(() => {})
    45	  }, [open, date])
    46	
    47	  async function log() {
    48	    if (saving) return
    49	    setSaving(true)
    50	    setError(null)
    51	    onLogged?.(ml)
    52	
    53	    try {
    54	      const res = await fetch('/api/client/water', {
    55	        method: 'POST',
    56	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    57	        body: JSON.stringify({ amount_ml: ml, date }),
    58	      })
    59	
    60	      if (!res.ok) {
    61	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    62	        setError(json.error ?? t('water.error'))
    63	        setSaving(false)
    64	        return
    65	      }
    66	
    67	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    68	      const newLog: WaterLog = {
    69	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    70	        amount_ml: ml,
    71	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    72	      }
    73	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    74	      setDone(true)
    75	      setTimeout(() => {
    76	        setDone(false)
    77	        setSaving(false)
    78	        router.refresh()
    79	      }, 700)
    80	    } catch {
    81	      setError(t('water.error'))
    82	      setSaving(false)
    83	    }
    84	  }
    85	
    86	  async function deleteLog(log: WaterLog) {
    87	    setDeletingId(log.id)
    88	    try {
    89	      const res = await fetch(`/api/client/water/${log.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
    90	      if (res.ok) {
    91	        setLogs(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== log.id))
    92	        onDeleted?.(log.amount_ml)
    93	        router.refresh()
    94	      }
    95	    } finally {
    96	      setDeletingId(null)
    97	    }
    98	  }
    99	
   100	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
   101	
   102	  return (
   103	    <AnimatePresence>
   104	      {open && (
   105	        <>
   106	          <motion.div
   107	            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   108	            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   109	            exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
   110	            onClick={onClose}

    12	type WaterLog = { id: string; amount_ml: number; logged_at: string }
    13	
    14	interface Props {
    15	  open: boolean
    16	  onClose: () => void
    17	  onLogged?: (ml: number) => void
    18	  onDeleted?: (ml: number) => void
    19	  date?: string
    20	}

    26	export default function QuickWaterModal({ open, onClose, onLogged, onDeleted, date }: Props) {
    27	  const { t } = useClientT()
    28	  const router = useRouter()
    29	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(250)
    30	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    31	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    32	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    33	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<WaterLog[]>([])
    34	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    35	
    36	  useEffect(() => {
    37	    if (!open) return
    38	    const url = new URL('/api/client/water', window.location.origin)
    39	    if (date) url.searchParams.set('date', date)
    40	    url.searchParams.set('kind', 'water')
    41	    fetch(url)
    42	      .then(r => r.json())
    43	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    44	      .catch(() => {})
    45	  }, [open, date])
    46	
    47	  async function log() {
    48	    if (saving) return
    49	    setSaving(true)
    50	    setError(null)
    51	    onLogged?.(ml)
    52	
    53	    try {
    54	      const res = await fetch('/api/client/water', {
    55	        method: 'POST',
    56	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    57	        body: JSON.stringify({ amount_ml: ml, date }),
    58	      })
    59

    61	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))

>>> components/client/QuickWaterModal.tsx:41
    11	
    12	type WaterLog = { id: string; amount_ml: number; logged_at: string }
    13	
    14	interface Props {
    15	  open: boolean
    16	  onClose: () => void
    17	  onLogged?: (ml: number) => void
    18	  onDeleted?: (ml: number) => void
    19	  date?: string
    20	}
    21	
    22	function formatTime(iso: string): string {
    23	  return new Date(iso).toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
    24	}
    25	
    26	export default function QuickWaterModal({ open, onClose, onLogged, onDeleted, date }: Props) {
    27	  const { t } = useClientT()
    28	  const router = useRouter()
    29	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(250)
    30	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    31	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    32	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    33	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<WaterLog[]>([])
    34	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    35	
    36	  useEffect(() => {
    37	    if (!open) return
    38	    const url = new URL('/api/client/water', window.location.origin)
    39	    if (date) url.searchParams.set('date', date)
    40	    url.searchParams.set('kind', 'water')
    41	    fetch(url)
    42	      .then(r => r.json())
    43	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    44	      .catch(() => {})
    45	  }, [open, date])
    46	
    47	  async function log() {
    48	    if (saving) return
    49	    setSaving(true)
    50	    setError(null)
    51	    onLogged?.(ml)
    52	
    53	    try {
    54	      const res = await fetch('/api/client/water', {
    55	        method: 'POST',
    56	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    57	        body: JSON.stringify({ amount_ml: ml, date }),
    58	      })
    59	
    60	      if (!res.ok) {
    61	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    62	        setError(json.error ?? t('water.error'))
    63	        setSaving(false)
    64	        return
    65	      }
    66	
    67	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    68	      const newLog: WaterLog = {
    69	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    70	        amount_ml: ml,
    71	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    72	      }
    73	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    74	      setDone(true)
    75	      setTimeout(() => {
    76	        setDone(false)
    77	        setSaving(false)
    78	        router.refresh()
    79	      }, 700)
    80	    } catch {
    81	      setError(t('water.error'))
    82	      setSaving(false)
    83	    }
    84	  }
    85	
    86	  async function deleteLog(log: WaterLog) {
    87	    setDeletingId(log.id)
    88	    try {
    89	      const res = await fetch(`/api/client/water/${log.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
    90	      if (res.ok) {
    91	        setLogs(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== log.id))

>>> components/client/QuickWaterModal.tsx:54

    25	
    26	export default function QuickWaterModal({ open, onClose, onLogged, onDeleted, date }: Props) {
    27	  const { t } = useClientT()
    28	  const router = useRouter()
    29	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(250)
    30	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    31	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    32	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    33	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<WaterLog[]>([])
    34	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    35	
    36	  useEffect(() => {
    37	    if (!open) return
    38	    const url = new URL('/api/client/water', window.location.origin)
    39	    if (date) url.searchParams.set('date', date)
    40	    url.searchParams.set('kind', 'water')
    41	    fetch(url)
    42	      .then(r => r.json())
    43	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    44	      .catch(() => {})
    45	  }, [open, date])
    46	
    47	  async function log() {
    48	    if (saving) return
    49	    setSaving(true)
    50	    setError(null)
    51	    onLogged?.(ml)
    52	
    53	    try {
    54	      const res = await fetch('/api/client/water', {
    55	        method: 'POST',
    56	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    57	        body: JSON.stringify({ amount_ml: ml, date }),
    58	      })
    59	
    60	      if (!res.ok) {
    61	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    62	        setError(json.error ?? t('water.error'))
    63	        setSaving(false)
    64	        return
    65	      }
    66	
    67	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    68	      const newLog: WaterLog = {
    69	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    70	        amount_ml: ml,
    71	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    72	      }
    73	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    74	      setDone(true)
    75	      setTimeout(() => {
    76	        setDone(false)
    77	        setSaving(false)
    78	        router.refresh()
    79	      }, 700)
    80	    } catch {
    81	      setError(t('water.error'))
    82	      setSaving(false)
    83	    }
    84	  }
    85	
    86	  async function deleteLog(log: WaterLog) {
    87	    setDeletingId(log.id)
    88	    try {
    89	      const res = await fetch(`/api/client/water/${log.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
    90	      if (res.ok) {
    91	        setLogs(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== log.id))
    92	        onDeleted?.(log.amount_ml)
    93	        router.refresh()
    94	      }
    95	    } finally {
    96	      setDeletingId(null)
    97	    }
    98	  }
    99	
   100	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
   101	
   102	  return (
   103	    <AnimatePresence>
   104	      {open && (

    26	export default function QuickWaterModal({ open, onClose, onLogged, onDeleted, date }: Props) {
    27	  const { t } = useClientT()
    28	  const router = useRouter()
    29	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(250)
    30	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    31	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    32	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    33	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<WaterLog[]>([])
    34	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    35	
    36	  useEffect(() => {
    37	    if (!open) return
    38	    const url = new URL('/api/client/water', window.location.origin)
    39	    if (date) url.searchParams.set('date', date)
    40	    url.searchParams.set('kind', 'water')
    41	    fetch(url)
    42	      .then(r => r.json())
    43	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    44	      .catch(() => {})
    45	  }, [open, date])
    46

    49	    setSaving(true)
    50	    setError(null)

    54	      const res = await fetch('/api/client/water', {
    55	        method: 'POST',
    56	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    57	        body: JSON.stringify({ amount_ml: ml, date }),
    58	      })
    59	
    60	      if (!res.ok) {
    61	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    62	        setError(json.error ?? t('water.error'))
    63	        setSaving(false)
    64	        return
    65	      }
    66	
    67	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    68	      const newLog: WaterLog = {
    69	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    70	        amount_ml: ml,
    71	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    72	      }
    73	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    74	      setDone(true)
    75	      setTimeout(() => {
    76	        setDone(false)
    77	        setSaving(false)
    78	        router.refresh()
    79	      }, 700)
    80	    } catch {
    81	      setError(t('water.error'))
    82	      setSaving(false)
    83	    }
    84	  }
    85	
    86	  async function deleteLog(log: WaterLog) {
    87	    setDeletingId(log.id)
    88	    try {
    89	      const res = await fetch(`/api/client/water/${log.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
    90	      if (res.ok) {
    91	        setLogs(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== log.id))
    92	        onDeleted?.(log.amount_ml)
    93	        router.refresh()
    94	      }
    95	    } finally {
    96	      setDeletingId(null)
    97	    }
    98	  }

    79	      }, 700)
    80	    } catch {
    81	      setError(t('water.error'))
    82	      setSaving(false)

    86	  async function deleteLog(log: WaterLog) {
    87	    setDeletingId(log.id)
    88	    try {
    89	      const res = await fetch(`/api/client/water/${log.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
    90	      if (res.ok) {
    91	        setLogs(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== log.id))
    92	        onDeleted?.(log.amount_ml)
    93	        router.refresh()
    94	      }
    95	    } finally {
    96	      setDeletingId(null)
    97	    }
    98	  }
    99

    17	const SLOTS: { key: SmartPrepSlot; label: string; Icon: React.ElementType }[] = [
    18	  { key: "breakfast", label: "P.Déj",    Icon: Coffee },
    19	  { key: "lunch",     label: "Déjeuner", Icon: Sun },
    20	  { key: "dinner",    label: "Dîner",    Icon: Moon },
    21	  { key: "snack",     label: "Collation",Icon: Apple },
    22	]

    24	function getDefaultSlot(): SmartPrepSlot {
    25	  const h = new Date().getHours()
    26	  if (h < 10) return "breakfast"
    27	  if (h < 14) return "lunch"
    28	  if (h < 18) return "snack"
    29	  return "dinner"
    30	}
    31	
    32	function getTomorrowDate(): string {
    33	  const d = new Date()
    34	  d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1)
    35	  return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
    36	}
    37	
    38	function getTodayDate(): string {
    39	  return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)
    40	}
    41	
    42	// ─── Live macro header ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    43	
    44	interface LiveMacroHeaderProps {
    45	  consumed: NutritionMacros
    46	  target: NutritionMacros
    47	  /** Draft totals from NutritionLogContent (not yet saved) */
    48	  drafts: { calories: number; protein: number; carbs: number; fat: number; count: number }
    49	}
    50	
    51	function MacroBar({ value, max, color }: { value: number; max: number; color: string }) {
    52	  const pct = max > 0 ? Math.min((value / max) * 100, 100) : 0
    53	  const over = max > 0 && value > max
    54	  return (
    55	    <div className="h-[3px] rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-white/[0.08] flex-1">
    56	      <div
    57	        className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-300"
    58	        style={{ width: `${pct}%`, backgroundColor: over ? "#ef4444" : color }}
    59	      />
    60	    </div>
    61	  )
    62	}
    63	
    64	function LiveMacroHeader({ consumed, target, drafts }: LiveMacroHeaderProps) {
    65	  // Total = déjà consommé + drafts en cours (simulation live)
    66	  const totalKcal   = consumed.kcal        + drafts.calories
    67	  const totalProt   = consumed.protein_g   + drafts.protein
    68	  const totalCarbs  = consumed.carbs_g     + drafts.carbs
    69	  const totalFat    = consumed.fat_g       + drafts.fat
    70	
    71	  const kcalPct = target.kcal > 0 ? Math.min((totalKcal / target.kcal) * 100, 100) : 0
    72	  const kcalOver = totalKcal > target.kcal
    73	
    74	  // Arc SVG — 200° arc, r=28
    75	  const r = 28
    76	  const cx = 36
    77	  const cy = 36
    78	  const startAngle = -200
    79	  const endAngle   = 20
    80	  const totalDeg   = endAngle - startAngle
    81	  const toRad = (d: number) => (d * Math.PI) / 180
    82	  const arcX = (a: number) => cx + r * Math.cos(toRad(a))
    83	  const arcY = (a: number) => cy + r * Math.sin(toRad(a))
    84	
    85	  function arcPath(fromDeg: number, toDeg: number) {
    86	    const large = toDeg - fromDeg > 180 ? 1 : 0
    87	    return `M ${arcX(fromDeg)} ${arcY(fromDeg)} A ${r} ${r} 0 ${large} 1 ${arcX(toDeg)} ${arcY(toDeg)}`
    88	  }
    89	
    90	  const fillDeg = startAngle + (totalDeg * kcalPct) / 100
    91	
    92	  return (
    93	    <div className="flex items-center gap-4 px-4 py-3 shrink-0" style={{ borderBottom: "0.3px solid rgba(129,140,248,0.14)" }}>
    94	      {/* Arc gauge kcal */}
    95	      <div className="shrink-0 relative w-[72px] h-[72px]">
    96	        <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 72 72">
    97	          {/* Track */}
    98	          <path
    99	            d={arcPath(startAngle, endAngle)}
   100	            fill="none"
   101	            stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"
   102	            strokeWidth="5"
   103	            strokeLinecap="round"
   104	          />
   105	          {/* Fill */}
   106	          {kcalPct > 0 && (
   107	            <path
   108	              d={arcPath(startAngle, fillDeg)}
   109	              fill="none"
   110	              stroke={kcalOver ? "#ef4444" : NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.calories}
   111	              strokeWidth="5"
   112	              strokeLinecap="round"
   113	            />
   114	          )}
   115	        </svg>
   116	        {/* Center text */}
   117	        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
   118	          <span className="text-[13px] font-black text-white leading-none tabular-nums">
   119	            {Math.round(totalKcal)}
   120	          </span>

    45	function formatTime(iso: string): string {

    47	}
    48	
    49	function MacroStrip({ p, g, f }: { p: number; g: number; f: number }) {
    50	  const pK = p * 4, gK = g * 4, fK = f * 9
    51	  const total = pK + gK + fK || 1
    52	  return (
    53	    <div className="flex h-[4px] rounded-full overflow-hidden gap-[2px]">
    54	      <div className="rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(pK / total) * 100}%`, backgroundColor: MC.prot }} />
    55	      <div className="rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(gK / total) * 100}%`, backgroundColor: MC.carb }} />
    56	      <div className="rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(fK / total) * 100}%`, backgroundColor: MC.fat }} />
    57	    </div>
    58	  )
    59	}

    61	// ─── Meal components ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    62	
    63	function MealTypeChooser({ mealId, current, onChange }: { mealId: string; current: string; onChange: (t: string) => void }) {
    64	  const { t } = useClientT()
    65	  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)
    66	  const types = ["breakfast", "lunch", "dinner", "snack"] as const
    67	
    68	  async function pick(type: string) {
    69	    setOpen(false)
    70	    onChange(type)
    71	    await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/meals/${mealId}`, {
    72	      method: "PATCH",
    73	      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    74	      body: JSON.stringify({ meal_type: type }),
    75	    })
    76	  }
    77	
    78	  return (
    79	    <div className="relative">
    80	      <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setOpen(o => !o) }} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 group">
    81	        {(() => { const Icon = MEAL_TYPE_ICON[current] ?? Coffee; return <Icon size={11} className="text-white/50 group-hover:text-white/80 transition-colors" /> })()}
    82	        <span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white/70 group-hover:text-white transition-colors">
    83	          {MEAL_TYPE_KEYS[current] ? t(MEAL_TYPE_KEYS[current]) : current}
    84	        </span>
    85	        <svg width="8" height="8" viewBox="0 0 8 8" className="text-white/20 group-hover:text-white/50 transition-colors" fill="currentColor"><path d="M4 5L1 2h6L4 5z"/></svg>
    86	      </button>
    87	      <AnimatePresence>
    88	        {open && (
    89	          <>
    90	            <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40" onClick={() => setOpen(false)} />
    91	            <motion.div
    92	              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -6, scale: 0.96 }}
    93	              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1 }}
    94	              exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -4, scale: 0.97 }}
    95	              transition={{ duration: 0.15 }}
    96	              onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
    97	              className="absolute left-0 top-6 z-50 bg-[#111111] rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.7)] min-w-[140px]"
    98	            >
    99	              {types.map(type => (
   100	                <button
   101	                  key={type}
   102	                  onClick={() => pick(type)}
   103	                  className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[12px] transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.06] ${
   104	                    type === current ? "text-[#f2f2f2] font-bold" : "text-white/70"
   105	                  }`}
   106	                >
   107	                  {(() => { const Icon = MEAL_TYPE_ICON[type] ?? Coffee; return <Icon size={12} className="text-white/40" /> })()}
   108	                  {MEAL_TYPE_KEYS[type] ? t(MEAL_TYPE_KEYS[type]) : type}
   109	                  {type === current && <Check size={10} className="ml-auto text-[#f2f2f2]" />}
   110	                </button>
   111	              ))}

   114	        )}

   117	  )

    49	function MacroStrip({ p, g, f }: { p: number; g: number; f: number }) {
    50	  const pK = p * 4, gK = g * 4, fK = f * 9
    51	  const total = pK + gK + fK || 1
    52	  return (
    53	    <div className="flex h-[4px] rounded-full overflow-hidden gap-[2px]">
    54	      <div className="rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(pK / total) * 100}%`, backgroundColor: MC.prot }} />
    55	      <div className="rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(gK / total) * 100}%`, backgroundColor: MC.carb }} />
    56	      <div className="rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(fK / total) * 100}%`, backgroundColor: MC.fat }} />
    57	    </div>
    58	  )
    59	}

    63	function MealTypeChooser({ mealId, current, onChange }: { mealId: string; current: string; onChange: (t: string) => void }) {
    64	  const { t } = useClientT()
    65	  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)
    66	  const types = ["breakfast", "lunch", "dinner", "snack"] as const
    67	
    68	  async function pick(type: string) {
    69	    setOpen(false)
    70	    onChange(type)
    71	    await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/meals/${mealId}`, {
    72	      method: "PATCH",
    73	      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    74	      body: JSON.stringify({ meal_type: type }),
    75	    })
    76	  }
    77	
    78	  return (
    79	    <div className="relative">
    80	      <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setOpen(o => !o) }} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 group">
    81	        {(() => { const Icon = MEAL_TYPE_ICON[current] ?? Coffee; return <Icon size={11} className="text-white/50 group-hover:text-white/80 transition-colors" /> })()}
    82	        <span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white/70 group-hover:text-white transition-colors">
    83	          {MEAL_TYPE_KEYS[current] ? t(MEAL_TYPE_KEYS[current]) : current}
    84	        </span>
    85	        <svg width="8" height="8" viewBox="0 0 8 8" className="text-white/20 group-hover:text-white/50 transition-colors" fill="currentColor"><path d="M4 5L1 2h6L4 5z"/></svg>
    86	      </button>
    87	      <AnimatePresence>
    88	        {open && (
    89	          <>
    90	            <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40" onClick={() => setOpen(false)} />
    91	            <motion.div
    92	              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -6, scale: 0.96 }}
    93	              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1 }}
    94	              exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -4, scale: 0.97 }}
    95	              transition={{ duration: 0.15 }}
    96	              onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
    97	              className="absolute left-0 top-6 z-50 bg-[#111111] rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.7)] min-w-[140px]"
    98	            >
    99	              {types.map(type => (
   100	                <button
   101	                  key={type}
   102	                  onClick={() => pick(type)}
   103	                  className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 text-left text-[12px] transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.06] ${
   104	                    type === current ? "text-[#f2f2f2] font-bold" : "text-white/70"
   105	                  }`}
   106	                >
   107	                  {(() => { const Icon = MEAL_TYPE_ICON[type] ?? Coffee; return <Icon size={12} className="text-white/40" /> })()}

   113	          </>
   114	        )}

   116	    </div>
   117	  )

   119	
   120	function TimeEditor({ mealId, loggedAt, onUpdated }: { mealId: string; loggedAt: string; onUpdated: (iso: string) => void }) {
   121	  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)
   122	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
   123	  const d = new Date(loggedAt)
   124	  const currentVal = `${String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0')}`
   125	  const timeStr = d.toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
   126	
   127	  async function handleChange(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) {
   128	    const timeVal = e.target.value
   129	    if (!timeVal) return
   130	    setSaving(true)
   131	    setOpen(false)
   132	    const base = new Date(loggedAt)
   133	    const [h, m] = timeVal.split(':').map(Number)
   134	    base.setHours(h, m, 0, 0)
   135	    const iso = base.toISOString()
   136	    await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/meals/${mealId}`, {
   137	      method: 'PATCH',
   138	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   139	      body: JSON.stringify({ logged_at: iso }),
   140	    })
   141	    onUpdated(iso)
   142	    setSaving(false)
   143	  }
   144	
   145	  return (
   146	    <div className="relative" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
   147	      <button onClick={() => setOpen(o => !o)} className="flex items-center gap-1 group mt-0.5">
   148	        <span className={`text-[10px] text-white/25 group-hover:text-white/50 transition-colors ${saving ? 'opacity-40' : ''}`}>
   149	          {saving ? '…' : timeStr}
   150	        </span>
   151	        <Pencil size={8} className="text-white/15 group-hover:text-white/40 transition-colors" />
   152	      </button>
   153	      <AnimatePresence>
   154	        {open && (
   155	          <>
   156	            <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40" onClick={() => setOpen(false)} />
   157	            <motion.div
   158	              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -4, scale: 0.97 }}
   159	              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1 }}
   160	              exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -3, scale: 0.97 }}
   161	              transition={{ duration: 0.13 }}
   162	              className="absolute left-0 top-6 z-50 bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.7)]"
   163	              onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   164	            >
   165	              <p className="text-[9px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/30 mb-2">Heure</p>
   166	              <input
   167	                type="time"
   168	                defaultValue={currentVal}
   169	                onChange={handleChange}
   170	                className="bg-transparent text-white border-none outline-none"
   171	                style={{ fontSize: 16, colorScheme: 'dark' }}
   172	              />
   173	            </motion.div>
   174	          </>
   175	        )}
   176	      </AnimatePresence>
   177	    </div>
   178	  )
   179	}

>>> components/client/smart/NutritionMealsList.tsx:200
   170	                className="bg-transparent text-white border-none outline-none"

   180	
   181	function EntryRow({
   182	  entry, mealId, onDeleted, onUpdated,
   183	}: {
   184	  entry: NutritionEntry & { food_items?: { name_fr?: string } }
   185	  mealId: string
   186	  onDeleted: (entryId: string) => void
   187	  onUpdated: (entryId: string, quantity_g: number, newMealTotals: Record<string, number>) => void
   188	}) {
   189	  const name = entry.food_items?.name_fr ?? (entry as any).food_item?.name_fr ?? "—"
   190	  const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false)
   191	  const [qty, setQty] = useState(String(entry.quantity_g))
   192	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
   193	  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false)
   194	
   195	  async function saveQty(e: React.FormEvent) {
   196	    e.preventDefault()
   197	    const q = parseFloat(qty)
   198	    if (!q || q <= 0 || q === entry.quantity_g) { setEditing(false); return }
   199	    setSaving(true)
   200	    const res = await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/entries/${entry.id}`, {
   201	      method: 'PATCH',
   202	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   203	      body: JSON.stringify({ quantity_g: q }),
   204	    })
   205	    if (res.ok) {
   206	      const json = await res.json()
   207	      onUpdated(entry.id, q, json.meal?.totals ?? {})
   208	    }
   209	    setSaving(false)
   210	    setEditing(false)
   211	  }
   212	
   213	  async function deleteEntry(e: React.MouseEvent) {
   214	    e.stopPropagation()
   215	    setDeleting(true)
   216	    const res = await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/entries/${entry.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
   217	    if (res.ok) onDeleted(entry.id)
   218	    else setDeleting(false)
   219	  }
   220	
   221	  return (
   222	    <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 transition-opacity ${deleting ? 'opacity-30' : ''}`}>
   223	      <div className="w-1 h-1 rounded-full bg-white/20 shrink-0 mt-[1px]" />
   224	      <span className="text-[12px] text-white/65 truncate flex-1 min-w-0">{name}</span>
   225	      {editing ? (
   226	        <form onSubmit={saveQty} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
   227	          <input
   228	            autoFocus
   229	            type="number"
   230	            min={1}
   231	            max={5000}
   232	            step={1}
   233	            value={qty}
   234	            onChange={e => setQty(e.target.value)}
   235	            className="w-14 h-6 bg-white/[0.08] border border-white/[0.12] rounded-lg text-[11px] text-white text-center tabular-nums outline-none focus:border-white/30"
   236	          />
   237	          <span className="text-[10px] text-white/30">g</span>
   238	          <button type="submit" disabled={saving} className="h-6 px-2 bg-white/[0.1] rounded-lg text-[10px] text-white/70 hover:text-white active:scale-95 transition-all disabled:opacity-40">
   239	            {saving ? '…' : '✓'}
   240	          </button>
   241	          <button type="button" onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditing(false) }} className="h-6 px-2 bg-white/[0.05] rounded-lg text-[10px] text-white/40 hover:text-white/70">
   242	            ✕
   243	          </button>
   244	        </form>
   245	      ) : (
   246	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
   247	          <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditing(true) }} className="flex items-center gap-1 group">
   248	            <span className="text-[11px] text-white/30 group-hover:text-white/60 transition-colors tabular-nums">{entry.quantity_g}g</span>
   249	            <Pencil size={8} className="text-white/15 group-hover:text-white/40 transition-colors" />
   250	          </button>

>>> components/client/smart/NutritionMealsList.tsx:201
   171	                style={{ fontSize: 16, colorScheme: 'dark' }}
   172	              />
   173	            </motion.div>
   174	          </>
   175	        )}
   176	      </AnimatePresence>
   177	    </div>
   178	  )
   179	}
   180	
   181	function EntryRow({
   182	  entry, mealId, onDeleted, onUpdated,
   183	}: {
   184	  entry: NutritionEntry & { food_items?: { name_fr?: string } }
   185	  mealId: string
   186	  onDeleted: (entryId: string) => void
   187	  onUpdated: (entryId: string, quantity_g: number, newMealTotals: Record<string, number>) => void
   188	}) {
   189	  const name = entry.food_items?.name_fr ?? (entry as any).food_item?.name_fr ?? "—"
   190	  const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false)
   191	  const [qty, setQty] = useState(String(entry.quantity_g))
   192	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
   193	  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false)
   194	
   195	  async function saveQty(e: React.FormEvent) {
   196	    e.preventDefault()
   197	    const q = parseFloat(qty)
   198	    if (!q || q <= 0 || q === entry.quantity_g) { setEditing(false); return }
   199	    setSaving(true)
   200	    const res = await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/entries/${entry.id}`, {
   201	      method: 'PATCH',
   202	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   203	      body: JSON.stringify({ quantity_g: q }),
   204	    })
   205	    if (res.ok) {
   206	      const json = await res.json()
   207	      onUpdated(entry.id, q, json.meal?.totals ?? {})
   208	    }
   209	    setSaving(false)

   186	  onDeleted: (entryId: string) => void
   187	  onUpdated: (entryId: string, quantity_g: number, newMealTotals: Record<string, number>) => void
   188	}) {
   189	  const name = entry.food_items?.name_fr ?? (entry as any).food_item?.name_fr ?? "—"
   190	  const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false)
   191	  const [qty, setQty] = useState(String(entry.quantity_g))
   192	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
   193	  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false)
   194	
   195	  async function saveQty(e: React.FormEvent) {
   196	    e.preventDefault()
   197	    const q = parseFloat(qty)
   198	    if (!q || q <= 0 || q === entry.quantity_g) { setEditing(false); return }
   199	    setSaving(true)
   200	    const res = await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/entries/${entry.id}`, {
   201	      method: 'PATCH',
   202	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   203	      body: JSON.stringify({ quantity_g: q }),
   204	    })
   205	    if (res.ok) {
   206	      const json = await res.json()
   207	      onUpdated(entry.id, q, json.meal?.totals ?? {})
   208	    }
   209	    setSaving(false)
   210	    setEditing(false)
   211	  }
   212	
   213	  async function deleteEntry(e: React.MouseEvent) {
   214	    e.stopPropagation()
   215	    setDeleting(true)
   216	    const res = await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/entries/${entry.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
   217	    if (res.ok) onDeleted(entry.id)
   218	    else setDeleting(false)
   219	  }
   220	
   221	  return (
   222	    <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 transition-opacity ${deleting ? 'opacity-30' : ''}`}>
   223	      <div className="w-1 h-1 rounded-full bg-white/20 shrink-0 mt-[1px]" />
   224	      <span className="text-[12px] text-white/65 truncate flex-1 min-w-0">{name}</span>
   225	      {editing ? (
   226	        <form onSubmit={saveQty} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
   227	          <input
   228	            autoFocus
   229	            type="number"
   230	            min={1}
   231	            max={5000}
   232	            step={1}
   233	            value={qty}
   234	            onChange={e => setQty(e.target.value)}
   235	            className="w-14 h-6 bg-white/[0.08] border border-white/[0.12] rounded-lg text-[11px] text-white text-center tabular-nums outline-none focus:border-white/30"
   236	          />
   237	          <span className="text-[10px] text-white/30">g</span>
   238	          <button type="submit" disabled={saving} className="h-6 px-2 bg-white/[0.1] rounded-lg text-[10px] text-white/70 hover:text-white active:scale-95 transition-all disabled:opacity-40">
   239	            {saving ? '…' : '✓'}
   240	          </button>

   249	            <Pencil size={8} className="text-white/15 group-hover:text-white/40 transition-colors" />

   252	            {Math.round(entry.calories_kcal)} kcal
   253	          </span>
   254	          <button
   255	            onClick={deleteEntry}
   256	            disabled={deleting}

   395	// ─── Prep entry row (Planning view) — inline quantity edit, delete ────────────
   396	
   397	type PrepEntry = SmartNutritionPrep['entries'][number]
   398	
   399	function PrepEntryRow({
   400	  entry,
   401	  prepId,
   402	  allEntries,
   403	  onEntriesUpdated,
   404	}: {
   405	  entry: PrepEntry
   406	  prepId: string
   407	  allEntries: PrepEntry[]
   408	  onEntriesUpdated: (entries: PrepEntry[], totals: { total_calories: number; total_protein_g: number; total_carbs_g: number; total_fat_g: number }) => void
   409	}) {
   410	  const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false)
   411	  const [qty, setQty] = useState(String(Math.round(entry.quantity_g)))
   412	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
   413	  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false)
   414	
   415	  async function patchEntries(nextEntries: PrepEntry[]) {
   416	    const res = await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/preps/${prepId}`, {
   417	      method: "PATCH",
   418	      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   419	      body: JSON.stringify({
   420	        entries: nextEntries.map(e => ({ food_item_id: e.food_item_id, quantity_g: e.quantity_g })),
   421	      }),
   422	    })
   423	    if (res.ok) {
   424	      const json = await res.json()
   425	      const updated: SmartNutritionPrep = json.data
   426	      onEntriesUpdated(updated.entries, {
   427	        total_calories: updated.total_calories,
   428	        total_protein_g: updated.total_protein_g,
   429	        total_carbs_g: updated.total_carbs_g,
   430	        total_fat_g: updated.total_fat_g,
   431	      })
   432	    }
   433	  }
   434	
   435	  async function saveQty(e: React.FormEvent) {
   436	    e.preventDefault()
   437	    const q = parseFloat(qty)
   438	    if (!q || q <= 0 || q === entry.quantity_g) { setEditing(false); return }
   439	    setSaving(true)
   440	    const next = allEntries.map(en =>
   441	      en.food_item_id === entry.food_item_id ? { ...en, quantity_g: q } : en
   442	    )
   443	    await patchEntries(next)
   444	    setSaving(false)
   445	    setEditing(false)
   446	  }
   447	
   448	  async function deleteEntry(e: React.MouseEvent) {
   449	    e.stopPropagation()
   450	    setDeleting(true)
   451	    const next = allEntries.filter(en => en.food_item_id !== entry.food_item_id)
   452	    await patchEntries(next)
   453	    // onEntriesUpdated will remove this entry from parent state
   454	  }
   455	
   456	  return (
   457	    <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 transition-opacity ${deleting ? 'opacity-30' : ''}`}>
   458	      <div className="w-1 h-1 rounded-full bg-white/20 shrink-0 mt-[1px]" />
   459	      <span className="text-[12px] text-white/65 truncate flex-1 min-w-0">{entry.name_fr}</span>
   460	      {editing ? (
   461	        <form onSubmit={saveQty} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
   462	          <input
   463	            autoFocus
   464	            type="number"
   465	            min={1}

>>> components/client/smart/NutritionMealsList.tsx:416
   386	              </button>
   387	            </div>
   388	          </motion.div>
   389	        )}
   390	      </AnimatePresence>
   391	    </motion.div>
   392	  )
   393	}

   451	    const next = allEntries.filter(en => en.food_item_id !== entry.food_item_id)

   453	    // onEntriesUpdated will remove this entry from parent state
   454	  }
   455	
   456	  return (
   457	    <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 transition-opacity ${deleting ? 'opacity-30' : ''}`}>
   458	      <div className="w-1 h-1 rounded-full bg-white/20 shrink-0 mt-[1px]" />
   459	      <span className="text-[12px] text-white/65 truncate flex-1 min-w-0">{entry.name_fr}</span>
   460	      {editing ? (
   461	        <form onSubmit={saveQty} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
   462	          <input
   463	            autoFocus
   464	            type="number"
   465	            min={1}
   466	            max={5000}
   467	            step={1}
   468	            value={qty}
   469	            onChange={e => setQty(e.target.value)}
   470	            className="w-14 h-6 bg-white/[0.08] border border-white/[0.12] rounded-lg text-[11px] text-white text-center tabular-nums outline-none focus:border-white/30"
   471	          />
   472	          <span className="text-[10px] text-white/30">g</span>
   473	          <button type="submit" disabled={saving} className="h-6 px-2 bg-white/[0.1] rounded-lg text-[10px] text-white/70 active:scale-95 transition-all disabled:opacity-40">
   474	            {saving ? '…' : '✓'}
   475	          </button>
   476	          <button type="button" onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditing(false) }} className="h-6 px-2 bg-white/[0.05] rounded-lg text-[10px] text-white/40">
   477	            ✕
   478	          </button>
   479	        </form>
   480	      ) : (
   481	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
   482	          <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditing(true) }} className="flex items-center gap-1 group">
   483	            <span className="text-[11px] text-white/30 group-hover:text-white/60 transition-colors tabular-nums">{Math.round(entry.quantity_g)}g</span>
   484	            <Pencil size={8} className="text-white/15 group-hover:text-white/40 transition-colors" />
   485	          </button>
   486	          <span className="text-[11px] text-white/40 font-semibold w-14 text-right tabular-nums">
   487	            {Math.round(entry.calories_kcal)} kcal
   488	          </span>
   489	          <button
   490	            onClick={deleteEntry}
   491	            disabled={deleting}
   492	            className="h-6 w-6 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-red-500/0 hover:bg-red-500/15 text-white/20 hover:text-red-400 active:scale-95 transition-all disabled:opacity-40"
   493	          >
   494	            <Trash2 size={10} />
   495	          </button>
   496	        </div>
   497	      )}
   498	    </div>
   499	  )
   500	}

>>> components/client/smart/NutritionMealsList.tsx:804
   774	  const handlePrepUpdated = (
   775	    prepId: string,
   776	    nextEntries: PrepEntry[],
   777	    newTotals: { total_calories: number; total_protein_g: number; total_carbs_g: number; total_fat_g: number }
   778	  ) => {
   779	    setPreps(prev => prev.map(p => {
   780	      if (p.id === prepId) {
   781	        return {
   782	          ...p,
   783	          entries: nextEntries,
   784	          ...newTotals,
   785	        }
   786	      }
   787	      return p
   788	    }))
   789	  }
   790	
   791	  function toggleExpand(id: string) {
   792	    setExpanded(prev => {
   793	      const s = new Set(prev)
   794	      s.has(id) ? s.delete(id) : s.add(id)
   795	      return s
   796	    })
   797	  }
   798	
   799	  async function executeDelete() {
   800	    if (!confirmTarget) return
   801	    const { id } = confirmTarget
   802	    setConfirmTarget(null)
   803	    setDeletingId(id)
   804	    const res = await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/meals/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" })
   805	    if (res.ok) {
   806	      setMeals(prev => prev.filter(m => m.id !== id))
   807	      router.refresh()
   808	    }
   809	    setDeletingId(null)
   810	  }
   811	
   812	  function updateMealType(id: string, mealType: string) {
   813	    setMeals(prev => prev.map(m => m.id === id ? { ...m, meal_type: mealType as any } : m))
   814	  }
   815	
   816	  const [expandedPreps, setExpandedPreps] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set())
   817	  const [validatingId, setValidatingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
   818	
   819	  function toggleExpandPrep(id: string) {
   820	    setExpandedPreps(prev => {
   821	      const s = new Set(prev)
   822	      s.has(id) ? s.delete(id) : s.add(id)
   823	      return s
   824	    })
   825	  }
   826	
   827	  function handlePrepDeleted(id: string) {
   828	    setPreps(prev => prev.filter(p => p.id !== id))
   829	    router.refresh()
   830	  }
   831	
   832	  function handlePrepValidated(id: string) {
   833	    setValidatingId(id)

   837	      router.refresh()

   839	  }
