     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { useState } from 'react'
     4	import Link from 'next/link'
     5	import { Plus } from 'lucide-react'
     6	import QuickWaterModal from '../QuickWaterModal'
     7	import { useClientT } from '@/components/client/ClientI18nProvider'
     8	import { getNutritionProgressMeta, type NutritionProgressState } from '@/lib/nutrition/progress'
     9	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from '@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors'
    10	
    11	export type NutritionMacros = {
    12	  kcal: number
    13	  protein_g: number
    14	  carbs_g: number
    15	  fat_g: number
    16	  water_ml: number
    17	  caffeine_mg?: number
    18	}
    19	
    20	export type SmartNutritionWidgetProps = {
    21	  consumed: NutritionMacros
    22	  target: NutritionMacros
    23	  proteinStreakDays?: number
    24	}
    25	
    26	function formatOverflow(value: number, unit: 'g' | 'L'): string | null {
    27	  if (value <= 0) return null
    28	  return unit === 'L'
    29	    ? `+${value.toFixed(1)} ${unit} au-dessus`
    30	    : `+${Math.round(value)}${unit} au-dessus`
    31	}
    32	
    33	export default function SmartNutritionWidget({ consumed, target, proteinStreakDays }: SmartNutritionWidgetProps) {
    34	  const { t } = useClientT()
    35	  const MACROS = [
    36	    { key: 'protein_g' as const, label: t('smart.nutrition.protein'), color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.protein },
    37	    { key: 'carbs_g'   as const, label: t('smart.nutrition.carbs'),   color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.carbs },
    38	    { key: 'fat_g'     as const, label: t('smart.nutrition.fat'),     color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.fat },
    39	  ]
    40	  const [waterOpen, setWaterOpen] = useState(false)
    41	  const [waterDelta, setWaterDelta] = useState(0)
    42	  const effectiveWaterMl = consumed.water_ml + waterDelta
    43	
    44	  function getStateColor(state: NutritionProgressState, baseColor: string): string {
    45	    if (state === 'over')       return '#ef4444'
    46	    if (state === 'near_limit') return '#f59e0b'
    47	    return baseColor
    48	  }
    49	
    50	  const kcalMeta = getNutritionProgressMeta(consumed.kcal, target.kcal)
    51	  const waterMeta = getNutritionProgressMeta(effectiveWaterMl, target.water_ml)
    52	  const waterOverflowLabel = formatOverflow((effectiveWaterMl - target.water_ml) / 1000, 'L')
    53	  const kcalPct = Math.min(kcalMeta.ratio, 1)
    54	  const r = 80
    55	  const arcTotal = Math.PI * r
    56	  const arcOffset = arcTotal * (1 - kcalPct)
    57	  const kcalStroke = getStateColor(kcalMeta.state, NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.calories)
    58	
    59	  return (
    60	    <>
    61	      <QuickWaterModal
    62	        open={waterOpen}
    63	        onClose={() => setWaterOpen(false)}
    64	        onLogged={ml => setWaterDelta(d => d + ml)}
    65	        onDeleted={ml => setWaterDelta(d => d - ml)}
    66	      />
    67	      <Link
    68	        href="/client/nutrition"
    69	        className="block bg-[#111111] rounded-2xl p-5 active:scale-[0.99] transition-transform"
    70	      >
    71	        <div className="flex items-baseline justify-between mb-3">
    72	          <span className="font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-[11px] text-white/30">Nutrition</span>
    73	          <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-[#f2f2f2]">→</span>
    74	        </div>
    75	
    76	        {/* Arc demi-cercle */}
    77	        <div className="relative" style={{ height: 110 }}>
    78	          <svg viewBox="0 0 200 110" className="w-full h-full">
    79	            <path
    80	              d={`M ${100 - r} 100 A ${r} ${r} 0 0 1 ${100 + r} 100`}
    81	              fill="none"
    82	              stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"
    83	              strokeWidth={12}
    84	              strokeLinecap="round"
    85	            />
    86	            <path
    87	              d={`M ${100 - r} 100 A ${r} ${r} 0 0 1 ${100 + r} 100`}
    88	              fill="none"
    89	              stroke={kcalStroke}
    90	              strokeWidth={12}
    91	              strokeLinecap="round"
    92	              strokeDasharray={arcTotal}
    93	              strokeDashoffset={arcOffset}
    94	              style={{ transition: 'stroke-dashoffset 0.6s ease' }}
    95	            />
    96	          </svg>
    97	          <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-end pb-1">
    98	            <div className="font-black leading-none text-white tabular-nums text-[28px]">
    99	              {Math.round(consumed.kcal)}
   100	            </div>
   101	            <div className="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white/35 mt-1">Calories consommées</div>
   102	            <div className="text-[10px] text-white/50 tabular-nums">/ {target.kcal} kcal</div>
   103	          </div>
   104	        </div>
   105	
   106	        {/* Barres macros */}
   107	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 mt-3">
   108	          {MACROS.map(m => {
   109	            const c = (consumed[m.key] as number) ?? 0
   110	            const tg = (target[m.key] as number) ?? 0
   111	            const meta = getNutritionProgressMeta(c, tg)
   112	            const fillColor = getStateColor(meta.state, m.color)
   113	            const overflowLabel = formatOverflow(c - tg, 'g')
   114	            return (
   115	              <div key={m.key}>
   116	                <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] mb-1">
   117	                  <span className="text-white/50 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-bold">{m.label}</span>
   118	                  <span className="font-bold tabular-nums" style={{ color: fillColor }}>
   119	                    {Math.round(c)}/{tg}g
   120	                  </span>

----- autour des inserts/logs -----

    52	  const waterOverflowLabel = formatOverflow((effectiveWaterMl - target.water_ml) / 1000, 'L')
    53	  const kcalPct = Math.min(kcalMeta.ratio, 1)
    54	  const r = 80
    55	  const arcTotal = Math.PI * r
    56	  const arcOffset = arcTotal * (1 - kcalPct)
    57	  const kcalStroke = getStateColor(kcalMeta.state, NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.calories)
    58	
    59	  return (
    60	    <>
    61	      <QuickWaterModal
    62	        open={waterOpen}
    63	        onClose={() => setWaterOpen(false)}
    64	        onLogged={ml => setWaterDelta(d => d + ml)}
    65	        onDeleted={ml => setWaterDelta(d => d - ml)}
    66	      />
    67	      <Link

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useState } from "react"
     4	import { Coffee, Sun, Moon, Apple, Pencil, Sparkles } from "lucide-react"
     5	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from "@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors"
     6	import type { SmartNutritionPrep } from "@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionPrepList"
     7	import type { SmartPrepSlot } from "@/lib/nutrition/simulation-state"
     8	
     9	const SLOT_ICON: Record<SmartPrepSlot, React.ElementType> = {
    10	  breakfast: Coffee,
    11	  lunch: Sun,
    12	  dinner: Moon,
    13	  snack: Apple,
    14	}
    15	
    16	const SLOT_LABEL: Record<SmartPrepSlot, string> = {
    17	  breakfast: "P.Déj",
    18	  lunch: "Déjeuner",
    19	  dinner: "Dîner",
    20	  snack: "Collation",
    21	}
    22	
    23	function MacroStrip({ p, g, f }: { p: number; g: number; f: number }) {
    24	  const pK = p * 4, gK = g * 4, fK = f * 9
    25	  const total = pK + gK + fK || 1
    26	  return (
    27	    <div className="flex h-[3px] rounded-full overflow-hidden gap-[2px]">
    28	      <div className="rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(pK / total) * 100}%`, backgroundColor: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.protein }} />
    29	      <div className="rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(gK / total) * 100}%`, backgroundColor: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.carbs }} />
    30	      <div className="rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(fK / total) * 100}%`, backgroundColor: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.fat }} />
    31	    </div>
    32	  )
    33	}
    34	
    35	function PrepRow({
    36	  prep,
    37	  onEdit,
    38	  onValidated,
    39	}: {
    40	  prep: SmartNutritionPrep
    41	  onEdit: (prep: SmartNutritionPrep) => void
    42	  onValidated: () => void
    43	}) {
    44	  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false)
    45	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    46	  const Icon = SLOT_ICON[prep.meal_slot] ?? Apple
    47	
    48	  async function handleValidate() {
    49	    setBusy(true)
    50	    setError(null)
    51	    const res = await fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/preps/${prep.id}/log`, { method: "POST" })
    52	    if (res.ok) {
    53	      onValidated()
    54	    } else {
    55	      setError("Erreur — réessaie")
    56	      setBusy(false)
    57	    }
    58	  }
    59	
    60	  return (
    61	    <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/[0.05]">
    62	      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    63	        {/* Slot icon */}
    64	        <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-[#818cf8]/10 shrink-0">
    65	          <Icon size={14} className="text-[#818cf8]" />
    66	        </div>
    67	
    68	        {/* Title + slot */}
    69	        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
    70	          <p className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white truncate leading-tight">
    71	            {prep.title || "Repas composé"}
    72	          </p>
    73	          <p className="text-[10px] text-white/35 uppercase tracking-[0.10em]">
    74	            {SLOT_LABEL[prep.meal_slot]} · {Math.round(prep.total_calories)} kcal
    75	          </p>
    76	        </div>
    77	
    78	        {/* Macro pills */}
    79	        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0">
    80	          <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold" style={{ color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.protein }}>
    81	            P{Math.round(prep.total_protein_g)}
    82	          </span>
    83	          <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold" style={{ color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.carbs }}>
    84	            G{Math.round(prep.total_carbs_g)}
    85	          </span>
    86	          <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold" style={{ color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.fat }}>
    87	            L{Math.round(prep.total_fat_g)}
    88	          </span>
    89	        </div>
    90	
    91	        {/* Actions */}
    92	        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0">
    93	          <button
    94	            onClick={() => onEdit(prep)}
    95	            className="w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white/[0.05] text-white/35 active:bg-white/[0.08] transition-colors"
    96	          >
    97	            <Pencil size={11} />
    98	          </button>
    99	          <button
   100	            onClick={handleValidate}
   101	            disabled={busy}
   102	            className="h-7 px-2.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f2f2f2] text-[#080808] text-[10px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-wide active:scale-[0.97] transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
   103	          >
   104	            {busy ? "…" : "Valider"}
   105	          </button>
   106	        </div>
   107	      </div>
   108	
   109	      <MacroStrip
   110	        p={prep.total_protein_g}
   111	        g={prep.total_carbs_g}
   112	        f={prep.total_fat_g}
   113	      />
   114	
   115	      {error && (
   116	        <p className="text-[10px] text-red-400">{error}</p>
   117	      )}
   118	    </div>
   119	  )
   120	}

    47	}

    49	export default function NutritionCycleSyncSection({ day, onDayChange }: Props) {

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { useMemo } from 'react'
     4	import { calculateMacros, type MacroGoal, type MacroGender } from '@/lib/formulas/macros'
     5	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from '@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors'
     6	import type { DayDraft, NutritionClientData } from '@/lib/nutrition/types'
     7	
     8	const GOAL_OPTIONS: { value: MacroGoal; label: string }[] = [
     9	  { value: 'deficit',     label: 'Déficit — Perte de gras' },
    10	  { value: 'maintenance', label: 'Maintenance' },
    11	  { value: 'surplus',     label: 'Surplus — Prise de muscle' },
    12	]
    13	
    14	interface Props {
    15	  day: DayDraft
    16	  clientData: NutritionClientData | null
    17	  goal: MacroGoal
    18	  onGoalChange: (g: MacroGoal) => void
    19	  onDayChange: (updates: Partial<DayDraft>) => void
    20	}
    21	
    22	function FieldLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
    23	  return <label className="block text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mb-1">{children}</label>
    24	}
    25	
    26	function NumInput({ value, onChange, placeholder }: { value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; placeholder?: string }) {
    27	  return (
    28	    <input
    29	      type="number" value={value} onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value)} placeholder={placeholder}
    30	      className="w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-white/20 outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors"
    31	    />
    32	  )
    33	}
    34	
    35	export default function NutritionMacrosSection({ day, clientData, goal, onGoalChange, onDayChange }: Props) {
    36	  const autoCalc = useMemo(() => {
    37	    if (!clientData?.weight_kg || !clientData?.age || !clientData?.height_cm) return null
    38	    try {
    39	      return calculateMacros({
    40	        gender: (clientData.gender === 'female' ? 'female' : 'male') as MacroGender,
    41	        age: clientData.age,
    42	        weight: clientData.weight_kg,
    43	        height: clientData.height_cm,
    44	        bodyFat: clientData.body_fat_pct ?? undefined,
    45	        muscleMassKg: clientData.muscle_mass_kg ?? undefined,
    46	        workouts: clientData.weekly_frequency ?? 3,
    47	        goal,
    48	        bmrKcalMeasured: clientData.bmr_kcal_measured ?? undefined,
    49	        steps: clientData.daily_steps ?? undefined,
    50	        stressLevel: clientData.stress_level ?? undefined,
    51	        sleepDurationH: clientData.sleep_duration_h ?? undefined,
    52	        caffeineDaily: clientData.caffeine_daily_mg ?? undefined,
    53	        alcoholWeekly: clientData.alcohol_weekly ?? undefined,
    54	        workHoursPerWeek: clientData.work_hours_per_week ?? undefined,
    55	        sessionDurationMin: clientData.session_duration_min ?? undefined,
    56	      })
    57	    } catch {
    58	      return null
    59	    }
    60	  }, [clientData, goal])
    61	
    62	  function applyAutoCalc() {
    63	    if (!autoCalc) return
    64	    onDayChange({
    65	      calories: String(Math.round(autoCalc.calories)),
    66	      protein_g: String(Math.round(autoCalc.macros.p)),
    67	      carbs_g: String(Math.round(autoCalc.macros.c)),
    68	      fat_g: String(Math.round(autoCalc.macros.f)),
    69	    })
    70	  }
    71	
    72	  const protein = Number(day.protein_g) || 0
    73	  const carbs   = Number(day.carbs_g) || 0
    74	  const fat     = Number(day.fat_g) || 0
    75	  const total   = protein * 4 + carbs * 4 + fat * 9
    76	
    77	  return (
    78	    <div className="space-y-4">
    79	      <div>
    80	        <FieldLabel>Objectif nutritionnel</FieldLabel>
    81	        <select
    82	          value={goal}
    83	          onChange={e => onGoalChange(e.target.value as MacroGoal)}
    84	          className="w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white outline-none appearance-none"
    85	        >
    86	          {GOAL_OPTIONS.map(o => <option key={o.value} value={o.value} className="bg-[#181818]">{o.label}</option>)}
    87	        </select>
    88	      </div>
    89	
    90	      {autoCalc && (
    91	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between bg-[#1f8a65]/[0.06] border-[0.3px] border-[#1f8a65]/20 rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5">
    92	          <div>
    93	            <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-[#1f8a65]">Calcul automatique disponible</p>
    94	            <p className="text-[10px] text-white/40 mt-0.5">
    95	              {Math.round(autoCalc.calories)} kcal · P {Math.round(autoCalc.macros.p)}g · G {Math.round(autoCalc.macros.c)}g · L {Math.round(autoCalc.macros.f)}g
    96	            </p>
    97	          </div>
    98	          <button
    99	            onClick={applyAutoCalc}
   100	            className="h-7 px-3 rounded-lg bg-[#1f8a65]/20 text-[#1f8a65] text-[11px] font-bold hover:bg-[#1f8a65]/30 transition-colors"
   101	          >
   102	            Appliquer
   103	          </button>
   104	        </div>
   105	      )}
   106	
   107	      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   108	        <div>
   109	          <FieldLabel>Calories (kcal)</FieldLabel>
   110	          <NumInput value={day.calories} onChange={v => onDayChange({ calories: v })} placeholder="ex: 2200" />
   111	        </div>
   112	        <div>
   113	          <FieldLabel>Protéines (g)</FieldLabel>
   114	          <NumInput value={day.protein_g} onChange={v => onDayChange({ protein_g: v })} placeholder="ex: 180" />
   115	        </div>
   116	        <div>
   117	          <FieldLabel>Glucides (g)</FieldLabel>
   118	          <NumInput value={day.carbs_g} onChange={v => onDayChange({ carbs_g: v })} placeholder="ex: 250" />
   119	        </div>
   120	        <div>

    96	}
    97	
    98	function calculateCyclePhase(dayOfCycle: number, cycleLength: number): CyclePhase {
    99	  if (dayOfCycle >= 1 && dayOfCycle <= 5) return 'menstrual'
   100	  if (dayOfCycle >= 6 && dayOfCycle <= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) - 1) return 'follicular'
   101	  if (dayOfCycle >= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) && dayOfCycle <= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) + 1) return 'ovulatory'
   102	  return 'luteal'
   103	}
   104	
   105	// ─── Petits composants UI ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   106	
   107	function FieldLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
   108	  return <label className="block text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mb-1">{children}</label>
   109	}
   110	
   111	function NumInput({ value, onChange, placeholder, step, min, max, className = '' }: {
   112	  value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; placeholder?: string
   113	  step?: string; min?: string; max?: string; className?: string
   114	}) {
   115	  return (
   116	    <input
   117	      type="number" value={value} step={step} min={min} max={max}
   118	      onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value)} placeholder={placeholder}
   119	      className={`w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-white/20 outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors ${className}`}
   120	    />

   646	      id: d.dbId, name: d.name, position: i,
   647	      calories:         d.calories         ? Number(d.calories)         : null,
   648	      protein_g:        d.protein_g        ? Number(d.protein_g)        : null,
   649	      carbs_g:          d.carbs_g          ? Number(d.carbs_g)          : null,
   650	      fat_g:            d.fat_g            ? Number(d.fat_g)            : null,
   651	      hydration_ml:     d.hydration_ml     ? Number(d.hydration_ml)     : null,
   652	      carb_cycle_type:  d.carb_cycle_type  || null,
   653	      cycle_sync_phase: d.cycle_sync_phase || null,
   654	      recommendations:  d.recommendations  || null,
   655	    }))
   656	  }
   657	
   658	  async function handleSave() {
   659	    setSaving(true); setError('')
   660	    try {
   661	      const payload = { name: protocolName, days: daysPayload() }
   662	      const url = isEditing && existingProtocol
   663	        ? `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${existingProtocol.id}`
   664	        : `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols`
   665	      const method = isEditing ? 'PATCH' : 'POST'
   666	      const res = await fetch(url, { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) })
   667	      if (!res.ok) { const e = await res.json(); setError(e.error ?? 'Erreur'); return }
   668	      router.push(`/coach/clients/${clientId}/protocoles/nutrition`)
   669	    } catch { setError('Erreur réseau') } finally { setSaving(false) }
   670	  }
   671	
   672	  async function handleSaveAndShare() {
   673	    setSaving(true); setSharing(true); setError('')
   674	    try {
   675	      const payload = { name: protocolName, days: daysPayload() }
   676	      let protocolId = existingProtocol?.id
   677	      if (isEditing && protocolId) {
   678	        const res = await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${protocolId}`, {
   679	          method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload),
   680	        })
   681	        if (!res.ok) { setError('Erreur'); return }
   682	      } else {
   683	        const res = await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols`, {
   684	          method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload),
   685	        })
   686	        if (!res.ok) { setError('Erreur'); return }
   687	        const data = await res.json(); protocolId = data.protocol.id
   688	      }
   689	      if (protocolId) await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${protocolId}/share`, { method: 'POST' })
   690	      router.push(`/coach/clients/${clientId}/protocoles/nutrition`)
   691	    } catch { setError('Erreur réseau') } finally { setSaving(false); setSharing(false) }
   692	  }
   693	
   694	  // ─── Render ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   695	
   696	  return (
   697	    <main className="min-h-screen bg-[#121212]">
   698	      <div className="max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-6 pb-24 space-y-5 pt-4">
   699	
   700	        {/* ── Protocol name + actions ── */}

   702	          <div className="flex-1">
   703	            <FieldLabel>Nom du protocole</FieldLabel>
   704	            <input
   705	              value={protocolName}
   706	              onChange={e => setProtocolName(e.target.value)}
   707	              placeholder="ex: Protocole Avril 2026"
   708	              className="w-full h-10 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-4 text-[14px] font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-white/20 outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors"
   709	            />
   710	          </div>
   711	        </div>
   712	
   713	        {/* ── Day tabs ── */}

   659	    setSaving(true); setError('')
   660	    try {
   661	      const payload = { name: protocolName, days: daysPayload() }
   662	      const url = isEditing && existingProtocol
   663	        ? `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${existingProtocol.id}`
   664	        : `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols`
   665	      const method = isEditing ? 'PATCH' : 'POST'
   666	      const res = await fetch(url, { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) })
   667	      if (!res.ok) { const e = await res.json(); setError(e.error ?? 'Erreur'); return }
   668	      router.push(`/coach/clients/${clientId}/protocoles/nutrition`)
   669	    } catch { setError('Erreur réseau') } finally { setSaving(false) }
   670	  }
   671	
   672	  async function handleSaveAndShare() {
   673	    setSaving(true); setSharing(true); setError('')
   674	    try {
   675	      const payload = { name: protocolName, days: daysPayload() }
   676	      let protocolId = existingProtocol?.id
   677	      if (isEditing && protocolId) {
   678	        const res = await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${protocolId}`, {
   679	          method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload),
   680	        })
   681	        if (!res.ok) { setError('Erreur'); return }
   682	      } else {
   683	        const res = await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols`, {
   684	          method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload),
   685	        })
   686	        if (!res.ok) { setError('Erreur'); return }
   687	        const data = await res.json(); protocolId = data.protocol.id
   688	      }
   689	      if (protocolId) await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${protocolId}/share`, { method: 'POST' })
   690	      router.push(`/coach/clients/${clientId}/protocoles/nutrition`)
   691	    } catch { setError('Erreur réseau') } finally { setSaving(false); setSharing(false) }
   692	  }
   693	
   694	  // ─── Render ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   695	
   696	  return (
   697	    <main className="min-h-screen bg-[#121212]">
   698	      <div className="max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-6 pb-24 space-y-5 pt-4">
   699	
   700	        {/* ── Protocol name + actions ── */}

   702	          <div className="flex-1">
   703	            <FieldLabel>Nom du protocole</FieldLabel>
   704	            <input

    80	function parseNumber(value: string) {
    81	  if (value.trim() === '') return null;
    82	  const parsed = Number(value);
    83	  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
    84	}
    85	
    86	function toStringValue(value: number | null | undefined) {
    87	  return value == null ? '' : String(value);
    88	}
    89	
    90	function useCopyState() {
    91	  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
    92	
    93	  async function copy(text: string) {
    94	    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    95	    setCopied(true);
    96	    window.setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 1500);
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  return { copied, copy };
   100	}
   101	
   102	function FieldLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
   103	  return <label className="mb-1 block text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">{children}</label>;
   104	}

   119	  min?: string;
   120	  max?: string;

   112	          type="number"

>>> components/nutrition/studio/ClientIntelligencePanel.tsx:165
   135	  onBiometricsChange,
   136	  macroResult,
   137	  submissions,
   138	  dataMode = "bilan",
   139	  anchorDate,
   140	  realtimeWindowDays = 7,
   141	  onDataModeChange,
   142	  selectedSubmissionId,
   143	  onSubmissionChange,
   144	  dataSource = {},
   145	  focusMissingDataKey,
   146	  onFocusHandled,
   147	}: Props) {
   148	  const [panelOpen, setPanelOpen] = useState(false);
   149	  const [showBilanDropdown, setShowBilanDropdown] = useState(false);
   150	  const [selectedMissingData, setSelectedMissingData] = useState<MissingDataKey | null>(null);
   151	  const [completing, setCompleting] = useState(false);
   152	
   153	  useEffect(() => {
   154	    if (!focusMissingDataKey) return;
   155	    setSelectedMissingData(focusMissingDataKey);
   156	    setPanelOpen(true);
   157	    onFocusHandled?.();
   158	  }, [focusMissingDataKey, onFocusHandled]);
   159	
   160	  const handleMissingDataSave = useCallback(
   161	    async (fieldValue: Record<string, unknown>) => {
   162	      if (!clientId) return;
   163	      setCompleting(true);
   164	      try {
   165	        // Build PATCH URL with submission ID (ties data to specific bilan)
   166	        const patchUrl = new URL(
   167	          `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-data`,
   168	          typeof window !== "undefined" ? window.location.origin : "",
   169	        );
   170	        patchUrl.searchParams.set("mode", dataMode);
   171	        if (dataMode === "bilan" && selectedSubmissionId) {
   172	          patchUrl.searchParams.set("submissionId", selectedSubmissionId);
   173	        }
   174	
   175	        const res = await fetch(patchUrl.toString(), {
   176	          method: "PATCH",
   177	          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   178	          body: JSON.stringify(fieldValue),
   179	        });
   180	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Erreur lors de la sauvegarde");
   181	
   182	        // Refetch updated client data with same submission ID
   183	        const refetchUrl = new URL(
   184	          `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-data`,
   185	          typeof window !== "undefined" ? window.location.origin : "",
   186	        );
   187	        refetchUrl.searchParams.set("mode", dataMode);
   188	        if (dataMode === "bilan" && selectedSubmissionId) {
   189	          refetchUrl.searchParams.set("submissionId", selectedSubmissionId);
   190	        }
   191	        const refetchRes = await fetch(refetchUrl.toString());
   192	        const refetchData = await refetchRes.json();
   193	        const freshClient: NutritionClientData = refetchData.client;
   194	
   195	        onClientDataChange?.(freshClient);
   196	        onBiometricsChange({
   197	          weight_kg: freshClient.weight_kg,
   198	          height_cm: freshClient.height_cm,
   199	          body_fat_pct: freshClient.body_fat_pct,
   200	          lean_mass_kg: freshClient.lean_mass_kg,
   201	          muscle_mass_kg: freshClient.muscle_mass_kg,
   202	          visceral_fat_level: freshClient.visceral_fat_level,
   203	          bmr_kcal_measured: freshClient.bmr_kcal_measured,
   204	        } as Partial<BiometricsConfig>);
   205	
   206	        setSelectedMissingData(null);
   207	      } catch (err) {
   208	        console.error("Failed to save missing data:", err);
   209	      } finally {
   210	        setCompleting(false);
   211	      }
   212	    },
   213	    [clientId, dataMode, selectedSubmissionId, onBiometricsChange]
   214	  );
   215

   164	      try {
   165	        // Build PATCH URL with submission ID (ties data to specific bilan)
   166	        const patchUrl = new URL(
   167	          `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-data`,
   168	          typeof window !== "undefined" ? window.location.origin : "",
   169	        );
   170	        patchUrl.searchParams.set("mode", dataMode);
   171	        if (dataMode === "bilan" && selectedSubmissionId) {
   172	          patchUrl.searchParams.set("submissionId", selectedSubmissionId);
   173	        }
   174	
   175	        const res = await fetch(patchUrl.toString(), {
   176	          method: "PATCH",
   177	          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   178	          body: JSON.stringify(fieldValue),
   179	        });
   180	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Erreur lors de la sauvegarde");
   181	
   182	        // Refetch updated client data with same submission ID
   183	        const refetchUrl = new URL(
   184	          `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-data`,
   185	          typeof window !== "undefined" ? window.location.origin : "",
   186	        );
   187	        refetchUrl.searchParams.set("mode", dataMode);
   188	        if (dataMode === "bilan" && selectedSubmissionId) {
   189	          refetchUrl.searchParams.set("submissionId", selectedSubmissionId);
   190	        }
   191	        const refetchRes = await fetch(refetchUrl.toString());
   192	        const refetchData = await refetchRes.json();
   193	        const freshClient: NutritionClientData = refetchData.client;
   194	
   195	        onClientDataChange?.(freshClient);
   196	        onBiometricsChange({
   197	          weight_kg: freshClient.weight_kg,
   198	          height_cm: freshClient.height_cm,
   199	          body_fat_pct: freshClient.body_fat_pct,
   200	          lean_mass_kg: freshClient.lean_mass_kg,
   201	          muscle_mass_kg: freshClient.muscle_mass_kg,
   202	          visceral_fat_level: freshClient.visceral_fat_level,
   203	          bmr_kcal_measured: freshClient.bmr_kcal_measured,
   204	        } as Partial<BiometricsConfig>);
   205	
   206	        setSelectedMissingData(null);
   207	      } catch (err) {
   208	        console.error("Failed to save missing data:", err);
   209	      } finally {
   210	        setCompleting(false);
   211	      }
   212	    },
   213	    [clientId, dataMode, selectedSubmissionId, onBiometricsChange]
   214	  );

   162	      if (!clientId) return;
   163	      setCompleting(true);
   164	      try {
   165	        // Build PATCH URL with submission ID (ties data to specific bilan)
   166	        const patchUrl = new URL(
   167	          `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-data`,
   168	          typeof window !== "undefined" ? window.location.origin : "",
   169	        );
   170	        patchUrl.searchParams.set("mode", dataMode);
   171	        if (dataMode === "bilan" && selectedSubmissionId) {
   172	          patchUrl.searchParams.set("submissionId", selectedSubmissionId);
   173	        }
   174	
   175	        const res = await fetch(patchUrl.toString(), {
   176	          method: "PATCH",
   177	          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   178	          body: JSON.stringify(fieldValue),
   179	        });
   180	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Erreur lors de la sauvegarde");
   181	
   182	        // Refetch updated client data with same submission ID
   183	        const refetchUrl = new URL(
   184	          `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-data`,
   185	          typeof window !== "undefined" ? window.location.origin : "",
   186	        );
   187	        refetchUrl.searchParams.set("mode", dataMode);
   188	        if (dataMode === "bilan" && selectedSubmissionId) {
   189	          refetchUrl.searchParams.set("submissionId", selectedSubmissionId);
   190	        }
   191	        const refetchRes = await fetch(refetchUrl.toString());
   192	        const refetchData = await refetchRes.json();
   193	        const freshClient: NutritionClientData = refetchData.client;

   197	          weight_kg: freshClient.weight_kg,

   197	          weight_kg: freshClient.weight_kg,

   207	      } catch (err) {

   210	        setCompleting(false);
   211	      }

   163	      setCompleting(true);
   164	      try {
   165	        // Build PATCH URL with submission ID (ties data to specific bilan)

   169	        );

   173	        }

   177	          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   178	          body: JSON.stringify(fieldValue),
   179	        });
   180	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Erreur lors de la sauvegarde");

   182	        // Refetch updated client data with same submission ID
   183	        const refetchUrl = new URL(

   186	        );

    39	function NumberInput({
    40	  label,
    41	  value,
    42	  onChange,
    43	  unit,
    44	  onBlur,
    45	}: {
    46	  label: string;
    47	  value: string | number | null;
    48	  onChange: (v: string) => void;
    49	  unit?: string;
    50	  onBlur?: () => void;
    51	}) {
    52	  return (
    53	    <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-white/[0.03]">
    54	      <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-white/50">{label}</span>
    55	      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
    56	        <input
    57	          type="number"
    58	          value={value ?? ""}
    59	          onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    60	          onBlur={onBlur}
    61	          placeholder="—"
    62	          className="w-20 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-2 py-1 text-[11px] text-white text-right outline-none placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-[#1f8a65]/40"
    63	        />
    64	        {unit && <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35 w-6">{unit}</span>}
    65	      </div>
    66	    </div>
    67	  );
    68	}
    69	
    70	function SectionLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
    71	  return (
    72	    <p className="text-[9px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mt-4 mb-2">
    73	      {children}
    74	    </p>
    75	  );
    76	}

    78	function SourceBadge({ source }: { source: BMRSource }) {
    79	  const colors = {
    80	    measured: "bg-green-500/20 text-green-400",
    81	    estimated: "bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400",
    82	    calculated: "bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400",
    83	  };
    84	  const labels = {
    85	    measured: "Mesurée",
    86	    estimated: "Estimée",
    87	    calculated: "Calculée",
    88	  };
    89	  return (
    90	    <span
    91	      className={`inline-block px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[8px] font-semibold ${colors[source]}`}
    92	    >
    93	      {labels[source]}
    94	    </span>
    95	  );
    96	}

   939	        protein_g: d.protein_g ? Number(d.protein_g) : null,
   940	        carbs_g: d.carbs_g ? Number(d.carbs_g) : null,
   941	        fat_g: d.fat_g ? Number(d.fat_g) : null,

   947	    }),

   950	
   951	  const save = useCallback(async (): Promise<string | null> => {
   952	    setSaving(true);
   953	    try {
   954	      // Include tdee_reference when saving so apply-adaptive-tdee can compute
   955	      // ratios against the real TDEE, not the post-deficit absolute day calories.
   956	      const payload = {
   957	        ...buildPayload(),
   958	        ...(goalCalories != null ? { tdee_reference: Math.round(goalCalories) } : {}),
   959	      };
   960	      const currentId = savedProtocolId ?? existingProtocol?.id;
   961	      if (currentId) {
   962	        await fetch(
   963	          `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${currentId}`,
   964	          {
   965	            method: "PATCH",
   966	            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   967	            body: JSON.stringify(payload),
   968	          },
   969	        );
   970	        return currentId;
   971	      } else {
   972	        const r = await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols`, {
   973	          method: "POST",
   974	          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   975	          body: JSON.stringify(payload),
   976	        });
   977	        const d = await r.json();
   978	        const newId = d.protocol?.id ?? null;
   979	        if (newId) setSavedProtocolId(newId);
   980	        return newId;
   981	      }
   982	    } finally {
   983	      setSaving(false);
   984	    }
   985	  }, [buildPayload, clientId, existingProtocol, savedProtocolId]);
   986	
   987	  const share = useCallback(async () => {
   988	    if (!canShare) {
   989	      const blocking = shareIssues
   990	        .filter((issue) => issue.severity === "blocking")
   991	        .map((issue) => `- ${issue.message}`)
   992	        .join("\n");
   993	      throw new Error(blocking || "Le protocole n'est pas prêt à être partagé.");
   994	    }
   995	    setSharing(true);
   996	    try {
   997	      const id = await save();
   998	      if (!id) return;
   999	      await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${id}/share`, {
  1000	        method: "POST",
  1001	      });
  1002	    } finally {
  1003	      setSharing(false);
  1004	    }
  1005	  }, [canShare, shareIssues, save, clientId]);

  1007	  // Step 1: Calculate TDEE — returns preview, does NOT modify protocol days
  1008	  const applyAdaptiveTdee = useCallback(async () => {
  1009	    const currentId = savedProtocolId ?? existingProtocol?.id;
  1010	    if (!currentId) return;
  1011	    setApplyingAdaptive(true);
  1012	    setTdeePreview(null);
  1013	    try {
  1014	      const res = await fetch(
  1015	        `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${currentId}/apply-adaptive-tdee`,
  1016	        { method: 'POST' }
  1017	      );
  1018	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(await res.text());
  1019	      const data = await res.json();
  1020	      setTdeeAdaptive(data.tdeeAdaptive);
  1021	      setTdeeAdaptiveAt(new Date());
  1022	      setTdeePreview(data);
  1023	      fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-tdee-history`)
  1024	        .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : [])
  1025	        .then(setTdeeHistory)
  1026	        .catch(() => {});
  1027	    } finally {
  1028	      setApplyingAdaptive(false);
  1029	    }
  1030	  }, [clientId, savedProtocolId, existingProtocol]);
  1031	
  1032	  // Step 2: Confirm — actually rescale protocol days
  1033	  const confirmApplyTdee = useCallback(async () => {
  1034	    const currentId = savedProtocolId ?? existingProtocol?.id;
  1035	    if (!currentId || !tdeePreview) return;
  1036	    setApplyingTdeeConfirm(true);
  1037	    try {
  1038	      const res = await fetch(
  1039	        `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${currentId}/apply-adaptive-tdee`,
  1040	        { method: 'PUT' }
  1041	      );
  1042	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(await res.text());
  1043	      setTdeePreview(null);
  1044	    } finally {
  1045	      setApplyingTdeeConfirm(false);
  1046	    }
  1047	  }, [clientId, savedProtocolId, existingProtocol, tdeePreview]);

  1016	        { method: 'POST' }
  1017	      );
  1018	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(await res.text());

  1021	      setTdeeAdaptiveAt(new Date());
  1022	      setTdeePreview(data);
  1023	      fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-tdee-history`)
  1024	        .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : [])
  1025	        .then(setTdeeHistory)
  1026	        .catch(() => {});

  1028	      setApplyingAdaptive(false);
  1029	    }

   986	
   987	  const share = useCallback(async () => {
   988	    if (!canShare) {
   989	      const blocking = shareIssues
   990	        .filter((issue) => issue.severity === "blocking")
   991	        .map((issue) => `- ${issue.message}`)
   992	        .join("\n");
   993	      throw new Error(blocking || "Le protocole n'est pas prêt à être partagé.");
   994	    }
   995	    setSharing(true);
   996	    try {
   997	      const id = await save();
   998	      if (!id) return;
   999	      await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${id}/share`, {
  1000	        method: "POST",
  1001	      });
  1002	    } finally {
  1003	      setSharing(false);
  1004	    }
  1005	  }, [canShare, shareIssues, save, clientId]);
  1006	
  1007	  // Step 1: Calculate TDEE — returns preview, does NOT modify protocol days
  1008	  const applyAdaptiveTdee = useCallback(async () => {
  1009	    const currentId = savedProtocolId ?? existingProtocol?.id;
  1010	    if (!currentId) return;
  1011	    setApplyingAdaptive(true);
  1012	    setTdeePreview(null);
  1013	    try {
  1014	      const res = await fetch(
  1015	        `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${currentId}/apply-adaptive-tdee`,
  1016	        { method: 'POST' }
  1017	      );
  1018	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(await res.text());
  1019	      const data = await res.json();
  1020	      setTdeeAdaptive(data.tdeeAdaptive);
  1021	      setTdeeAdaptiveAt(new Date());
  1022	      setTdeePreview(data);
  1023	      fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-tdee-history`)
  1024	        .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : [])
  1025	        .then(setTdeeHistory)
  1026	        .catch(() => {});
  1027	    } finally {
  1028	      setApplyingAdaptive(false);
  1029	    }
  1030	  }, [clientId, savedProtocolId, existingProtocol]);

  1040	        { method: 'PUT' }
  1041	      );
  1042	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(await res.text());
  1043	      setTdeePreview(null);
  1044	    } finally {
  1045	      setApplyingTdeeConfirm(false);
  1046	    }
  1047	  }, [clientId, savedProtocolId, existingProtocol, tdeePreview]);
  1048	
  1049	  const onTdeeAutoToggle = useCallback(async (enabled: boolean) => {
  1050	    const currentId = savedProtocolId ?? existingProtocol?.id;
  1051	    if (!currentId) return;
  1052	    setTdeeAutoEnabled(enabled);
  1053	    await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${currentId}`, {
  1054	      method: 'PATCH',
  1055	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  1056	      body: JSON.stringify({ tdee_auto_enabled: enabled }),
  1057	    });

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     2	import { computePhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/physiological-date'
     3	import { resolveClientTimezone } from '@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone'
     4	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     5	import { computeDailySignals } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/chatSignals'
     6	import { resolveTone } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/resolveTone'
     7	
     8	function svc() {
     9	  return createServiceClient(
    10	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    11	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
    12	  )
    13	}
    14	
    15	function pct(val: number, total: number): string {
    16	  if (!total) return '0%'
    17	  return `${Math.round((val / total) * 100)}%`
    18	}
    19	
    20	function fmtDate(date: string): string {
    21	  const [, m, d] = date.split('-')
    22	  const months = ['jan', 'fév', 'mar', 'avr', 'mai', 'jun', 'jul', 'aoû', 'sep', 'oct', 'nov', 'déc']
    23	  return `${parseInt(d)} ${months[parseInt(m) - 1]}`
    24	}
    25	
    26	export async function buildSystemPrompt(clientId: string): Promise<string> {
    27	  const db = svc()
    28	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(db, clientId)
    29	  const today = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(), timezone)
    30	  const { start: physiologicalStart, end: physiologicalEnd } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(today, timezone)
    31	  const dayStart = physiologicalStart.toISOString()
    32	  const dayEnd   = physiologicalEnd.toISOString()
    33	  const nowTime  = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
    34	  const nextPhysioStart = new Date(physiologicalEnd.getTime() + 1).toISOString()
    35	
    36	  const threeDaysAgo = (() => {
    37	    const d = new Date(`${today}T00:00:00`)
    38	    d.setDate(d.getDate() - 3)
    39	    return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    40	  })()
    41	
    42	  // Sequential first: need coach_id before running parallel queries
    43	  const { data: profileData } = await db
    44	    .from('coach_clients')
    45	    .select('first_name, goal, tdee, fitness_level, coach_id, display_lang')
    46	    .eq('id', clientId)
    47	    .single()
    48	
    49	  const firstName    = profileData?.first_name   ?? 'le client'
    50	  const goal         = profileData?.goal          ?? 'non renseigné'
    51	  const tdee         = profileData?.tdee          ?? 0
    52	  const fitnessLevel = profileData?.fitness_level ?? 'intermédiaire'
    53	  const coachId      = profileData?.coach_id      ?? null
    54	  const clientDisplayLang = (profileData?.display_lang ?? 'fr') as 'fr' | 'es' | 'en'
    55	
    56	  const [
    57	    coachProfileResult,
    58	    nutritionProtocol,
    59	    mealsResult,
    60	    legacyMealsResult,
    61	    waterResult,
    62	    sessionResult,
    63	    activitiesResult,
    64	    restrictionsResult,
    65	    bodyCompResult,
    66	    nutritionTrendsResult,
    67	    checkinsResult,
    68	    activeProgramResult,
    69	    perClientToneResult,
    70	    globalToneResult,
    71	    plannedPrepsResult,
    72	  ] = await Promise.allSettled([
    73	    coachId
    74	      ? db.from('user_profiles').select('first_name, last_name').eq('id', coachId).single()
    75	      : Promise.resolve({ data: null }),
    76	    db.from('nutrition_protocols')
    77	      .select('name, nutrition_protocol_days(calories, protein_g, fat_g, carbs_g, hydration_ml)')
    78	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    79	      .eq('status', 'shared')
    80	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    81	      .limit(1)
    82	      .maybeSingle(),
    83	    // Nutrition Composer meals (correct columns)
    84	    db.from('nutrition_meals')
    85	      .select('total_calories, total_protein_g, total_fat_g, total_carbs_g, meal_type, title, logged_at')
    86	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    87	      .eq('physiological_date', today)
    88	      .order('logged_at', { ascending: true }),
    89	    // Legacy meal_logs
    90	    db.from('meal_logs')
    91	      .select('estimated_macros, logged_at, meal_name')
    92	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    93	      .gte('logged_at', physiologicalStart.toISOString())
    94	      .lt('logged_at', nextPhysioStart)
    95	      .eq('ai_status', 'done'),
    96	    db.from('client_water_logs')
    97	      .select('amount_ml, caffeine_mg')
    98	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    99	      .gte('logged_at', dayStart)
   100	      .lte('logged_at', dayEnd),
   101	    db.from('client_session_logs')
   102	      .select('id, completed_at')
   103	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   104	      .not('completed_at', 'is', null)
   105	      .gte('completed_at', dayStart)
   106	      .lte('completed_at', dayEnd)
   107	      .order('completed_at', { ascending: false })
   108	      .limit(1)
   109	      .maybeSingle(),
   110	    db.from('client_activity_logs')
   111	      .select('activity_type, custom_label, duration_min')
   112	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   113	      .gte('started_at', dayStart)
   114	      .lte('started_at', dayEnd),
   115	    db.from('metric_annotations')
   116	      .select('label, body_part, severity')
   117	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   118	      .eq('event_type', 'injury')
   119	      .not('body_part', 'is', null),
   120	    // Full bilan history — ascending (oldest first) for correct progression delta

FILE: lib/client/ai-coach/dailyFacts.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
24:  caffeineMg?: number
36:    caffeineMg?: number
72:      caffeineMg: input.caffeineMg != null ? Math.round(input.caffeineMg) : undefined,

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	export type DayKind = 'training' | 'rest' | 'cancelled'
     2	export type SessionStatus = 'completed' | 'skipped' | 'cancelled' | 'rest' | 'none'
     3	export type NutritionStatus = 'under' | 'on_track' | 'over'
     4	
     5	const OVER_KCAL = 200   // delta above target -> over
     6	const UNDER_KCAL = -300 // delta below target -> under
     7	const PROTEIN_SHORT_RATIO = 0.8
     8	
     9	export type CheckinSignals = {
    10	  sleepHours?: number; sleepQuality?: number; energy?: number
    11	  stress?: number; soreness?: number; rhr?: number; weight?: number
    12	}
    13	
    14	export type DailyFactsInput = {
    15	  dayKind: DayKind
    16	  sessionStatus: SessionStatus
    17	  plannedSessionName: string | null
    18	  kcalLogged: number
    19	  kcalTarget: number
    20	  proteinLogged: number
    21	  proteinTarget: number
    22	  hydrationMl: number
    23	  hydrationTargetMl: number
    24	  caffeineMg?: number
    25	  steps: number | null
    26	  checkin: CheckinSignals
    27	}
    28	
    29	export type DailyFacts = {
    30	  dayKind: DayKind
    31	  session: { planned: string | null; status: SessionStatus }
    32	  nutrition: {
    33	    kcalLogged: number; kcalTarget: number; deltaKcal: number; pctKcal: number
    34	    proteinLogged: number; proteinTarget: number; proteinShort: boolean
    35	    status: NutritionStatus
    36	    caffeineMg?: number
    37	  }
    38	  hydration: { ml: number; targetMl: number; pct: number }
    39	  steps: number | null
    40	  checkin: CheckinSignals
    41	}
    42	
    43	function pct(value: number, total: number): number {
    44	  if (!total) return 0
    45	  return Math.round((value / total) * 100)
    46	}
    47	
    48	function nutritionStatus(deltaKcal: number): NutritionStatus {
    49	  if (deltaKcal > OVER_KCAL) return 'over'
    50	  if (deltaKcal < UNDER_KCAL) return 'under'
    51	  return 'on_track'
    52	}
    53	
    54	export function computeDailyFacts(input: DailyFactsInput): DailyFacts {
    55	  const deltaKcal = Math.round(input.kcalLogged - input.kcalTarget)
    56	  const proteinShort = input.proteinTarget > 0
    57	    ? input.proteinLogged < input.proteinTarget * PROTEIN_SHORT_RATIO
    58	    : false
    59	
    60	  return {
    61	    dayKind: input.dayKind,
    62	    session: { planned: input.plannedSessionName, status: input.sessionStatus },
    63	    nutrition: {
    64	      kcalLogged: Math.round(input.kcalLogged),
    65	      kcalTarget: Math.round(input.kcalTarget),
    66	      deltaKcal,
    67	      pctKcal: pct(input.kcalLogged, input.kcalTarget),
    68	      proteinLogged: Math.round(input.proteinLogged),
    69	      proteinTarget: Math.round(input.proteinTarget),
    70	      proteinShort,
    71	      status: nutritionStatus(deltaKcal),
    72	      caffeineMg: input.caffeineMg != null ? Math.round(input.caffeineMg) : undefined,
    73	    },
    74	    hydration: { ml: input.hydrationMl, targetMl: input.hydrationTargetMl, pct: pct(input.hydrationMl, input.hydrationTargetMl) },
    75	    steps: input.steps,
    76	    checkin: input.checkin,
    77	  }
    78	}
    79	
    80	export type DayKindInput = {
    81	  plannedSessionName: string | null
    82	  completed: boolean
    83	  skipped: boolean
    84	  overrideOff: boolean
    85	}
    86	
    87	export function computeDayKind(input: DayKindInput): { dayKind: DayKind; sessionStatus: SessionStatus } {
    88	  if (!input.plannedSessionName) return { dayKind: 'rest', sessionStatus: 'rest' }
    89	  if (input.completed) return { dayKind: 'training', sessionStatus: 'completed' }
    90	  if (input.skipped) return { dayKind: 'cancelled', sessionStatus: 'skipped' }
    91	  if (input.overrideOff) return { dayKind: 'cancelled', sessionStatus: 'cancelled' }
    92	  return { dayKind: 'training', sessionStatus: 'none' }
    93	}

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	import type { SupabaseClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     2	import { computeDailyFacts, computeDayKind, type DailyFacts, type CheckinSignals } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/dailyFacts'
     3	import { resolveTone, type Tone } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/resolveTone'
     4	import type { Freedom, AdviceTrend } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/adviceRules'
     5	import { resolveProtocolDayByDate, resolveRestProtocolDay } from '@/lib/nutrition/protocol-schedule'
     6	import { fetchClientDayOverride } from '@/lib/client/day-kind'
     7	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate, addDaysToDateKey, getLocalWeekday } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     8	import { filterSessionsForJsWeekday } from '@/lib/client/plannedSessions'
     9	
    10	const OVER_KCAL = 200
    11	const PROTEIN_SHORT_RATIO = 0.8
    12	
    13	export type DailyCoachContext = {
    14	  facts: DailyFacts
    15	  trend: AdviceTrend
    16	  tone: Tone
    17	  freedom: Freedom
    18	  enabledMorningFields: string[]
    19	  coachId: string | null
    20	}
    21	
    22	/**
    23	 * Single loader: assembles the deterministic DailyFacts + trend + tone + freedom for a client/day.
    24	 * Pure cores (computeDailyFacts/computeDayKind) do the logic; this only fetches.
    25	 */
    26	export async function loadDailyCoachContext(
    27	  db: SupabaseClient,
    28	  clientId: string,
    29	  date: string,
    30	  timezone: string,
    31	  submittedCheckin?: CheckinSignals,
    32	  steps?: number | null,
    33	): Promise<DailyCoachContext> {
    34	  const { start, end } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(date, timezone)
    35	  const dayDate = new Date(`${date}T12:00:00.000Z`)
    36	  const weekday = getLocalWeekday(dayDate, timezone)
    37	  const threeDaysAgo = addDaysToDateKey(date, -3)
    38	  const yesterday = addDaysToDateKey(date, -1)
    39	
    40	  const [
    41	    { data: composerMeals },
    42	    { data: legacyMeals },
    43	    { data: waterRows },
    44	    { data: protocol },
    45	    { data: plannedSessions },
    46	    { data: completedSessions },
    47	    { data: skips },
    48	    { data: trendMeals },
    49	    { data: perClientAi },
    50	    { data: cfgRow },
    51	  ] = await Promise.all([
    52	    db.from('nutrition_meals').select('total_calories, total_protein_g').eq('client_id', clientId).eq('physiological_date', date),
    53	    db.from('meal_logs').select('estimated_macros').eq('client_id', clientId).gte('logged_at', start.toISOString()).lt('logged_at', new Date(end.getTime() + 1).toISOString()).eq('ai_status', 'done'),
    54	    db.from('client_water_logs').select('amount_ml, caffeine_mg').eq('client_id', clientId).gte('logged_at', start.toISOString()).lte('logged_at', end.toISOString()),
    55	    db.from('nutrition_protocols').select('schedule_start_date, nutrition_protocol_days(position, calories, protein_g, hydration_ml, name, carb_cycle_type), nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(week_index, dow, protocol_day_position)').eq('client_id', clientId).eq('status', 'shared').order('updated_at', { ascending: false }).limit(1).maybeSingle(),
    56	    db.from('program_sessions').select('id, name, day_of_week, days_of_week, programs!inner(status, client_id)').eq('programs.client_id', clientId).eq('programs.status', 'active'),
    57	    db.from('client_session_logs').select('id').eq('client_id', clientId).not('completed_at', 'is', null).gte('completed_at', start.toISOString()).lte('completed_at', end.toISOString()).limit(1),
    58	    db.from('client_workout_skips').select('program_session_id').eq('client_id', clientId).eq('scheduled_date', date),
    59	    db.from('nutrition_meals').select('physiological_date, total_calories, total_protein_g').eq('client_id', clientId).gte('physiological_date', threeDaysAgo).lte('physiological_date', yesterday),
    60	    db.from('coach_ai_settings_per_client').select('ai_tone, coach_id, coaching_freedom').eq('client_id', clientId).maybeSingle(),
    61	    db.from('daily_checkin_configs').select('moments').eq('client_id', clientId).maybeSingle(),
    62	  ])
    63	
    64	  // Global tone needs coach_id (from per-client settings row)
    65	  const coachId = (perClientAi as { coach_id?: string } | null)?.coach_id ?? null
    66	  const { data: coachProfile } = coachId
    67	    ? await db.from('coach_profiles').select('ai_tone').eq('coach_id', coachId).maybeSingle()
    68	    : { data: null }
    69	
    70	  // ── Nutrition ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    71	  const kcalLogged =
    72	    (composerMeals ?? []).reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number(m.total_calories ?? 0), 0) +
    73	    (legacyMeals ?? []).reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number((m.estimated_macros as any)?.calories_kcal ?? 0), 0)
    74	  const proteinLogged =
    75	    (composerMeals ?? []).reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0), 0) +
    76	    (legacyMeals ?? []).reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number((m.estimated_macros as any)?.protein_g ?? 0), 0)
    77	  const hydrationMl = (waterRows ?? []).reduce((s: number, w: any) => s + Number(w.amount_ml ?? 0), 0)
    78	  const caffeineMg = (waterRows ?? []).reduce((s: number, w: any) => s + Number(w.caffeine_mg ?? 0), 0)
    79	
    80	  // ── Day kind / session ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    81	  const dayOverride = await fetchClientDayOverride(db, clientId, date)
    82	  const protocolDays = (protocol as any)?.nutrition_protocol_days ?? []
    83	  const rawProtocolDay = resolveProtocolDayByDate(
    84	    date,
    85	    (protocol as any)?.schedule_start_date ?? null,
    86	    protocolDays,
    87	    (protocol as any)?.nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots ?? [],
    88	  ) as any
    89	  const isOff = dayOverride?.kind === 'off'
    90	  const protocolDay = isOff ? (resolveRestProtocolDay(protocolDays) ?? rawProtocolDay) : rawProtocolDay
    91	
    92	  const kcalTarget = Number(protocolDay?.calories ?? 0)
    93	  const proteinTarget = Number(protocolDay?.protein_g ?? 0)
    94	  const hydrationTargetMl = Number(protocolDay?.hydration_ml ?? 2500)
    95	
    96	  const plannedList = filterSessionsForJsWeekday(
    97	    (plannedSessions ?? []) as Array<{ id: string; name?: string | null; day_of_week?: number | null; days_of_week?: number[] | null }>,
    98	    weekday,
    99	  )
   100	  const plannedSessionName = plannedList[0]?.name ?? null
   101	  const completed = ((completedSessions ?? []) as any[]).length > 0
   102	  const skipped = ((skips ?? []) as any[]).length > 0
   103	  const { dayKind, sessionStatus } = computeDayKind({
   104	    plannedSessionName,
   105	    completed,
   106	    skipped,
   107	    overrideOff: isOff,
   108	  })
   109	
   110	  // ── Trend (3 days) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   111	  const byDay = new Map<string, { kcal: number; protein: number }>()
   112	  for (const m of (trendMeals ?? []) as any[]) {
   113	    const d = m.physiological_date as string
   114	    const cur = byDay.get(d) ?? { kcal: 0, protein: 0 }
   115	    cur.kcal += Number(m.total_calories ?? 0)
   116	    cur.protein += Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0)
   117	    byDay.set(d, cur)
   118	  }
   119	  let kcalOverDays = 0
   120	  let proteinShortDays = 0

----- autour des inserts/logs -----

FILE: lib/client/ai-coach/patternDetector.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
66:    db.from('client_water_logs')

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	import { SupabaseClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     2	import { computePhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/physiological-date'
     3	import { resolveClientTimezone } from '@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone'
     4	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     5	import { resolveProtocolDayByDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/protocol-schedule'
     6	
     7	export interface PatternResult {
     8	  code: string
     9	  statement: string
    10	  question: string
    11	  options: { label: string; value: number }[]
    12	}
    13	
    14	/**
    15	 * Returns a date string YYYY-MM-DD offset by X days
    16	 */
    17	function getOffsetDateStr(dateStr: string, offsetDays: number): string {
    18	  const d = new Date(dateStr)
    19	  d.setDate(d.getDate() + offsetDays)
    20	  return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    21	}
    22	
    23	export async function evaluateClientPatterns(clientId: string, db: SupabaseClient): Promise<PatternResult | null> {
    24	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(db as any, clientId)
    25	  const today = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(), timezone)
    26	  const todayDateObj = new Date(today)
    27	  const sevenDaysAgoObj = new Date(today)
    28	  sevenDaysAgoObj.setDate(sevenDaysAgoObj.getDate() - 7)
    29	  const sevenDaysAgo = sevenDaysAgoObj.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    30	  const { start: sevenDaysAgoStart } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(sevenDaysAgo, timezone)
    31	  const { start: todayStart } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(today, timezone)
    32	
    33	  // 1. Fetch data
    34	  const [
    35	    { data: protocol },
    36	    { data: meals },
    37	    { data: legacyMeals },
    38	    { data: checkins },
    39	    { data: waterLogs },
    40	    { data: activeProgram },
    41	    { data: sessionLogs },
    42	  ] = await Promise.all([
    43	    db.from('nutrition_protocols')
    44	      .select('schedule_start_date, nutrition_protocol_days(position, calories, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, hydration_ml), nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(week_index, dow, protocol_day_position)')
    45	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    46	      .eq('status', 'shared')
    47	      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
    48	      .limit(1)
    49	      .maybeSingle(),
    50	    db.from('nutrition_meals')
    51	      .select('physiological_date, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g')
    52	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    53	      .gte('physiological_date', sevenDaysAgo)
    54	      .lt('physiological_date', today),
    55	    db.from('meal_logs')
    56	      .select('logged_at, estimated_macros')
    57	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    58	      .gte('logged_at', sevenDaysAgoStart.toISOString())
    59	      .lt('logged_at', todayStart.toISOString())
    60	      .eq('ai_status', 'done'),
    61	    db.from('client_daily_checkins')
    62	      .select('date, flow_type, sleep_hours, energy_level, stress_level')
    63	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    64	      .gte('date', sevenDaysAgo)
    65	      .lte('date', today), // we include today for check-ins (e.g., morning checkin already done)
    66	    db.from('client_water_logs')
    67	      .select('logged_at, amount_ml')
    68	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    69	      .gte('logged_at', `${sevenDaysAgo}T00:00:00.000Z`),
    70	    db.from('programs')
    71	      .select('id, name, weeks, frequency, program_sessions(id, name, day_of_week, days_of_week)')
    72	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    73	      .eq('status', 'active')
    74	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    75	      .limit(1)
    76	      .maybeSingle(),
    77	    db.from('client_session_logs')
    78	      .select('completed_at')
    79	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    80	      .not('completed_at', 'is', null)
    81	      .gte('completed_at', `${sevenDaysAgo}T00:00:00.000Z`)
    82	      .order('completed_at', { ascending: false }),
    83	  ])
    84	
    85	  // 2. Aggregate Data per day
    86	  const dailyStats: Record<string, any> = {}
    87	  for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {
    88	    const d = getOffsetDateStr(today, -i)
    89	    dailyStats[d] = {
    90	      target: null, consumedKcal: 0, consumedProt: 0, consumedCarbs: 0, consumedFat: 0, consumedWater: 0,
    91	      sleep: null, energy: null, stress: null,
    92	    }
    93	  }
    94	
    95	  // Assign targets
    96	  const pDays = (protocol as any)?.nutrition_protocol_days ?? []
    97	  const pSlots = (protocol as any)?.nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots ?? []
    98	  const startDate = (protocol as any)?.schedule_start_date ?? null
    99	
   100	  for (const d of Object.keys(dailyStats)) {
   101	    const dayProtocol = resolveProtocolDayByDate(d, startDate, pDays, pSlots) as any
   102	    if (dayProtocol) {
   103	      dailyStats[d].target = {
   104	        kcal: Number(dayProtocol.calories ?? 0),
   105	        prot: Number(dayProtocol.protein_g ?? 0),
   106	        carbs: Number(dayProtocol.carbs_g ?? 0),
   107	        fat: Number(dayProtocol.fat_g ?? 0),
   108	        water: Number(dayProtocol.hydration_ml ?? 2500)
   109	      }
   110	    }
   111	  }
   112	
   113	  // Aggregate macros
   114	  for (const m of (meals ?? [])) {
   115	    const d = m.physiological_date
   116	    if (dailyStats[d]) {
   117	      dailyStats[d].consumedKcal += Number(m.total_calories ?? 0)
   118	      dailyStats[d].consumedProt += Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0)
   119	      dailyStats[d].consumedCarbs += Number(m.total_carbs_g ?? 0)
   120	      dailyStats[d].consumedFat += Number(m.total_fat_g ?? 0)

>>> lib/client/ai-coach/patternDetector.ts:33
     3	import { resolveClientTimezone } from '@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone'
     4	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     5	import { resolveProtocolDayByDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/protocol-schedule'
     6	
     7	export interface PatternResult {
     8	  code: string
     9	  statement: string
    10	  question: string
    11	  options: { label: string; value: number }[]
    12	}
    13	
    14	/**
    15	 * Returns a date string YYYY-MM-DD offset by X days
    16	 */
    17	function getOffsetDateStr(dateStr: string, offsetDays: number): string {
    18	  const d = new Date(dateStr)
    19	  d.setDate(d.getDate() + offsetDays)
    20	  return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    21	}
    22	
    23	export async function evaluateClientPatterns(clientId: string, db: SupabaseClient): Promise<PatternResult | null> {
    24	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(db as any, clientId)
    25	  const today = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(), timezone)
    26	  const todayDateObj = new Date(today)
    27	  const sevenDaysAgoObj = new Date(today)
    28	  sevenDaysAgoObj.setDate(sevenDaysAgoObj.getDate() - 7)
    29	  const sevenDaysAgo = sevenDaysAgoObj.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    30	  const { start: sevenDaysAgoStart } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(sevenDaysAgo, timezone)
    31	  const { start: todayStart } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(today, timezone)
    32	
    33	  // 1. Fetch data
    34	  const [
    35	    { data: protocol },
    36	    { data: meals },
    37	    { data: legacyMeals },
    38	    { data: checkins },
    39	    { data: waterLogs },
    40	    { data: activeProgram },
    41	    { data: sessionLogs },
    42	  ] = await Promise.all([
    43	    db.from('nutrition_protocols')
    44	      .select('schedule_start_date, nutrition_protocol_days(position, calories, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, hydration_ml), nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(week_index, dow, protocol_day_position)')
    45	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    46	      .eq('status', 'shared')
    47	      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
    48	      .limit(1)
    49	      .maybeSingle(),
    50	    db.from('nutrition_meals')
    51	      .select('physiological_date, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g')
    52	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    53	      .gte('physiological_date', sevenDaysAgo)
    54	      .lt('physiological_date', today),
    55	    db.from('meal_logs')
    56	      .select('logged_at, estimated_macros')
    57	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    58	      .gte('logged_at', sevenDaysAgoStart.toISOString())
    59	      .lt('logged_at', todayStart.toISOString())
    60	      .eq('ai_status', 'done'),
    61	    db.from('client_daily_checkins')
    62	      .select('date, flow_type, sleep_hours, energy_level, stress_level')
    63	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    64	      .gte('date', sevenDaysAgo)
    65	      .lte('date', today), // we include today for check-ins (e.g., morning checkin already done)
    66	    db.from('client_water_logs')
    67	      .select('logged_at, amount_ml')
    68	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    69	      .gte('logged_at', `${sevenDaysAgo}T00:00:00.000Z`),
    70	    db.from('programs')
    71	      .select('id, name, weeks, frequency, program_sessions(id, name, day_of_week, days_of_week)')
    72	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    73	      .eq('status', 'active')
    74	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    75	      .limit(1)
    76	      .maybeSingle(),
    77	    db.from('client_session_logs')
    78	      .select('completed_at')
    79	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    80	      .not('completed_at', 'is', null)
    81	      .gte('completed_at', `${sevenDaysAgo}T00:00:00.000Z`)
    82	      .order('completed_at', { ascending: false }),
    83	  ])

    99

   101	    const dayProtocol = resolveProtocolDayByDate(d, startDate, pDays, pSlots) as any

   106	        carbs: Number(dayProtocol.carbs_g ?? 0),
   107	        fat: Number(dayProtocol.fat_g ?? 0),
   108	        water: Number(dayProtocol.hydration_ml ?? 2500)
   109	      }
   110	    }
   111	  }
   112	
   113	  // Aggregate macros
   114	  for (const m of (meals ?? [])) {
   115	    const d = m.physiological_date
   116	    if (dailyStats[d]) {
   117	      dailyStats[d].consumedKcal += Number(m.total_calories ?? 0)
   118	      dailyStats[d].consumedProt += Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0)
   119	      dailyStats[d].consumedCarbs += Number(m.total_carbs_g ?? 0)
   120	      dailyStats[d].consumedFat += Number(m.total_fat_g ?? 0)
   121	    }
   122	  }
   123	  for (const m of (legacyMeals ?? [])) {
   124	    const d = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(m.logged_at), timezone)
   125	    if (dailyStats[d]) {
   126	      const em = (m.estimated_macros ?? {}) as any
   127	      dailyStats[d].consumedKcal += Number(em.calories ?? 0)
   128	      dailyStats[d].consumedProt += Number(em.protein_g ?? 0)
   129	      dailyStats[d].consumedCarbs += Number(em.carbs_g ?? 0)
   130	      dailyStats[d].consumedFat += Number(em.fats_g ?? em.fat_g ?? 0)
   131	    }
   132	  }
   133	  for (const w of (waterLogs ?? [])) {
   134	    const d = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(w.logged_at))
   135	    if (dailyStats[d]) {
   136	      dailyStats[d].consumedWater += Number(w.amount_ml ?? 0)
   137	    }
   138	  }
   139	  for (const c of (checkins ?? [])) {
   140	    const d = c.date
   141	    if (dailyStats[d] || d === today) {
   142	      const target = dailyStats[d] || {}
   143	      if (c.flow_type === 'morning') {
   144	        if (c.sleep_hours != null) target.sleep = c.sleep_hours
   145	        if (c.energy_level != null) target.energy = c.energy_level
   146	      } else if (c.flow_type === 'evening') {
   147	        if (c.stress_level != null) target.stress = c.stress_level
   148	      }
   149	    }
   150	  }
   151	
   152	  // 3. Evaluate Patterns
   153	  const daysDesc = Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, i) => getOffsetDateStr(today, -(i + 1)))
   154	
   155	  const checkSequence = (count: number, condition: (stats: any) => boolean) => {
   156	    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   157	      const d = daysDesc[i]
   158	      const st = dailyStats[d]
   159	      if (!st || !st.target) return false // Missing data prevents triggering
   160	      if (!condition(st)) return false
   161	    }
   162	    return true
   163	  }
   164	
   165	  const checkCheckinsSequence = (count: number, flow: 'morning'|'evening', condition: (c: any) => boolean) => {
   166	    // Collect the last `count` days where checkin was supposed to happen, we look at the last `count` days chronologically ending today or yesterday.
   167	    const relevantDates = [today, ...daysDesc].slice(0, count + 1)
   168	    let validDays = 0
   169	    let matchDays = 0
   170	    for (const d of relevantDates) {
   171	      const st = dailyStats[d] || {}
   172	      const c = checkins?.find(x => x.date === d && x.flow_type === flow)
   173	      if (c) {
   174	        validDays++
   175	        if (condition(c)) matchDays++
   176	      }
   177	    }
   178	    return validDays >= count && matchDays >= count
   179	  }
   180	
   181	  // 1. Calories dépassées > 110% (3j)
   182	  if (checkSequence(3, s => s.consumedKcal > s.target.kcal * 1.1)) {
   183	    return {
   184	      code: 'calories_high', statement: "J'ai vu que tes calories dépassaient ta cible ces 3 derniers jours.",
   185	      question: "Qu'est-ce qui se passe en ce moment ?",
   186	      options: [

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	export type DrinkType = "water" | "espresso" | "coffee" | "lungo" | "tea"
     2	export type DrinkLogKind = "all" | "water" | "caffeine"
     3	
     4	export type DrinkPreset = {
     5	  drinkType: DrinkType
     6	  label: string
     7	  shortLabel: string
     8	  baseAmountMl: number
     9	  baseCaffeineMg: number
    10	  accent: string
    11	  cupCount: 1 | 2 | 3
    12	  strengthLabel: string
    13	}
    14	
    15	export const DRINK_PRESETS: Record<DrinkType, DrinkPreset> = {
    16	  water: {
    17	    drinkType: "water",
    18	    label: "Eau",
    19	    shortLabel: "Eau",
    20	    baseAmountMl: 250,
    21	    baseCaffeineMg: 0,
    22	    accent: "#60a5fa",
    23	    cupCount: 1,
    24	    strengthLabel: "hydratation",
    25	  },
    26	  espresso: {
    27	    drinkType: "espresso",
    28	    label: "Espresso",
    29	    shortLabel: "Espresso",
    30	    baseAmountMl: 40,
    31	    baseCaffeineMg: 80,
    32	    accent: "#c08457",
    33	    cupCount: 1,
    34	    strengthLabel: "concentré",
    35	  },
    36	  coffee: {
    37	    drinkType: "coffee",
    38	    label: "Café",
    39	    shortLabel: "Café",
    40	    baseAmountMl: 180,
    41	    baseCaffeineMg: 95,
    42	    accent: "#c08457",
    43	    cupCount: 2,
    44	    strengthLabel: "classique",
    45	  },
    46	  lungo: {
    47	    drinkType: "lungo",
    48	    label: "Lungo",
    49	    shortLabel: "Lungo",
    50	    baseAmountMl: 120,
    51	    baseCaffeineMg: 110,
    52	    accent: "#c08457",
    53	    cupCount: 3,
    54	    strengthLabel: "allongé",
    55	  },
    56	  tea: {
    57	    drinkType: "tea",
    58	    label: "Thé",
    59	    shortLabel: "Thé",
    60	    baseAmountMl: 250,
    61	    baseCaffeineMg: 35,
    62	    accent: "#34d399",
    63	    cupCount: 1,
    64	    strengthLabel: "infusé",
    65	  },
    66	}
    67	
    68	const CAFFEINATED_TYPES: Exclude<DrinkType, "water">[] = ["espresso", "coffee", "lungo", "tea"]
    69	
    70	export function isCaffeinatedDrinkType(type: DrinkType): type is Exclude<DrinkType, "water"> {
    71	  return CAFFEINATED_TYPES.includes(type as Exclude<DrinkType, "water">)
    72	}
    73	
    74	export function getDrinkPreset(drinkType: DrinkType): DrinkPreset {
    75	  return DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    76	}
    77	
    78	export function estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType: DrinkType, amountMl: number): number {
    79	  if (drinkType === "water") return 0
    80	  const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    81	  const safeAmount = Math.max(1, amountMl)
    82	  return Math.max(0, Math.round(preset.baseCaffeineMg * (safeAmount / preset.baseAmountMl)))
    83	}
    84	
    85	export function inferDrinkTypeFromFoodItem(input: { name_fr: string; category_l1: string; category_l2: string | null }): DrinkType {
    86	  const name = input.name_fr.toLowerCase()
    87	  const category = `${input.category_l1 ?? ""} ${input.category_l2 ?? ""}`.toLowerCase()
    88	
    89	  if (input.category_l1 !== "drinks") return "water"
    90	  if (/espresso|expresso/.test(name)) return "espresso"
    91	  if (/lungo/.test(name)) return "lungo"
    92	  if (/(th[eé]|tisane|infusion|rooibos|camomille)/.test(name) || /(th[eé]|tisane|infusion|rooibos|camomille)/.test(category)) return "tea"
    93	  if (/cafe|coffee|cappuccino|latte|macchiato|ristretto/.test(name)) return "coffee"
    94	  if (/chauds?/.test(category)) return "coffee"
    95	  return "water"
    96	}
