     1	export type NutritionAlertCode =
     2	  | 'protein_low'
     3	  | 'carbs_limit'
     4	  | 'hydration_low'
     5	  | 'lunch_missing'
     6	
     7	export type NutritionAlertSeverity = 'info' | 'warning' | 'critical'
     8	
     9	export type NutritionAlert = {
    10	  code: NutritionAlertCode
    11	  severity: NutritionAlertSeverity
    12	  title: string
    13	  body?: string
    14	  delta?: number
    15	}
    16	
    17	export type NutritionConsumed = {
    18	  kcal: number
    19	  protein_g: number
    20	  carbs_g: number
    21	  fat_g: number
    22	  water_ml: number
    23	  caffeine_mg?: number
    24	}
    25	
    26	export type NutritionInput = {
    27	  consumed: NutritionConsumed
    28	  target: NutritionConsumed
    29	  currentHour: number
    30	  hasLunchLog: boolean
    31	}
    32	
    33	export function computeNutritionAlerts(input: NutritionInput): NutritionAlert[] {
    34	  const alerts: NutritionAlert[] = []
    35	  const { consumed, target, currentHour, hasLunchLog } = input
    36	
    37	  // Rule 1: protein_low (warning) — after 14h, behind schedule
    38	  if (currentHour >= 14) {
    39	    const expected = target.protein_g * (currentHour / 22)
    40	    const threshold = expected * 0.8
    41	    if (consumed.protein_g < threshold) {
    42	      const delta = Math.round(target.protein_g - consumed.protein_g)
    43	      alerts.push({
    44	        code: 'protein_low',
    45	        severity: 'warning',
    46	        title: 'PROTÉINES EN RETARD',
    47	        body: `il te reste ${delta}g pour atteindre ${target.protein_g}g`,
    48	        delta,
    49	      })
    50	    }
    51	  }
    52	
    53	  // Rule 2: carbs_limit (critical) — over target
    54	  if (consumed.carbs_g > target.carbs_g) {
    55	    const delta = Math.round(consumed.carbs_g - target.carbs_g)
    56	    alerts.push({
    57	      code: 'carbs_limit',
    58	      severity: 'critical',
    59	      title: 'LIMITE GLUCIDES ATTEINTE',
    60	      body: `-${delta}g sur ta cible`,
    61	      delta,
    62	    })
    63	  }
    64	
    65	  // Rule 3: hydration_low (warning) — after 14h, <50% of target
    66	  if (currentHour >= 14) {
    67	    const ratio = target.water_ml > 0 ? consumed.water_ml / target.water_ml : 1
    68	    if (ratio < 0.5) {
    69	      const deltaMl = target.water_ml - consumed.water_ml
    70	      const deltaL = (deltaMl / 1000).toFixed(1)
    71	      alerts.push({
    72	        code: 'hydration_low',
    73	        severity: 'warning',
    74	        title: 'HYDRATATION FAIBLE',
    75	        body: `il manque ${deltaL}L`,
    76	        delta: deltaMl,
    77	      })
    78	    }
    79	  }
    80	
    81	  // Rule 4: lunch_missing (info) — between 13-14h, no lunch log
    82	  if (currentHour >= 13 && currentHour < 15 && !hasLunchLog) {
    83	    alerts.push({
    84	      code: 'lunch_missing',
    85	      severity: 'info',
    86	      title: 'PAS DE DÉJEUNER LOGUÉ',
    87	    })
    88	  }
    89	
    90	  return alerts
    91	}

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	/**
     2	 * Macro Calculator — Forensic Metabolic Analysis v2
     3	 *
     4	 * Methodology stack (peer-reviewed sources) :
     5	 * ─ BMR       : Katch-McArdle (LBM-based) — Katch & McArdle 1975, MSSE
     6	 *               Mifflin-St Jeor fallback — Mifflin et al. 1990, AJCN
     7	 *               Measured BMR from impedance scale (priority)
     8	 * ─ LBM       : Boer formula — Boer 1984, Clin Physiol
     9	 *               Direct muscle mass from DEXA / InBody (priority)
    10	 * ─ NEAT      : Steps × 0.0005 × BW (Hall et al. 2012, NIDDK)
    11	 *               Occupation multiplier (Ainsworth MET compendium 2011)
    12	 *               Work-hours correction (forced sedentarism)
    13	 * ─ EAT       : MET-weighted by training type (Ainsworth 2011)
    14	 *               Tracker override if delta > 20% vs table
    15	 *               Cardio EAT computed separately (Swain & Franklin 2002)
    16	 * ─ TEF       : 10% of BMR — Westerterp 2004, Physiol Behav
    17	 * ─ Alcohol   : 7 kcal/g ethanol, TDEE addition (Lieber 1991, Hepatology)
    18	 * ─ Caffeine  : Metabolic stimulant +3–5% BMR correction (Dulloo et al. 1989, AJCN)
    19	 * ─ Menstrual : +150–200 kcal luteal phase (Webb 1986, Eur J Appl Physiol)
    20	 * ─ Visceral  : Risk stratification — IDF 2006, Despres 2001 NEJM
    21	 * ─ Deficit   : BF%-stratified (Helms et al. 2014, IJSNEM)
    22	 * ─ Protein   : LBM-based — Helms 2014, Morton 2018 (Br J Sports Med)
    23	 * ─ Fats min  : Gender-based minimum (Volek 2002, JSCR; Hamalainen 1984)
    24	 * ─ Recovery  : Stress × sleep adaptation (Dattilo 2011, Med Hyp)
    25	 */
    26

   375	    });
   376	  }

   381	    suggestions.push({
   382	      id: 'alcohol_impact',

   387	      action: `Réduire à < 4 verres/semaine idéalement. Consommer post-entraînement minimum 3h après pour minimiser l\'impact MPS.`,

   395	  const stress = input.stressLevel ?? 0;

   397	    suggestions.push({

   403	      action: `Priorité absolue : atteindre 7–9h. Aucune optimisation nutritionnelle ne compense un déficit de sommeil chronique.`,
   404	      source: 'Dattilo et al., Med Hypotheses 2011 ; Spiegel et al., Sleep 1999',
   405	    });

   413	      action: `Viser 7h30 minimum. En attendant, réduire le déficit de 5%.`,

   415	    });
   416	  }
   417

   422	      category: 'recovery',
   423	      title: 'Stress chronique — cortisol élevé',

   425	      action: `Réduire le déficit à 10% max. Introduire des techniques de récupération (cohérence cardiaque, déload). Prioriser les glucides peri-workout pour tamponner le cortisol.`,
   426	      source: 'Lennartsson et al., Psychoneuroendocrinology 2012',
   427	    });

   431

   433	    suggestions.push({
   434	      id: 'caffeine_high',
   435	      priority: 'low',
   436	      category: 'recovery',
   437	      title: 'Caféine élevée — impact sommeil et calculs',

     1	// lib/i18n/clientTranslations.ts
     2	
     3	export type ClientLang = 'fr' | 'en' | 'es'

FILE: lib/lab/useLabClientSearch.ts

45:  caffeine_daily_mg:   number | null;

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	'use client';
     2	
     3	import { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
     4	
     5	export type LabClient = {
     6	  id:    string;
     7	  name:  string;
     8	  email: string | null;
     9	  // Profile (coach_clients)
    10	  gender:             string | null;
    11	  age:                number | null;
    12	  weekly_frequency:   number | null;
    13	  fitness_level:      string | null;
    14	  training_goal:      string | null;
    15	  sport_practice:     string | null;
    16	  equipment_category: string | null;
    17	  // Biometrics — most recent bilan
    18	  height_cm:          number | null;
    19	  weight_kg:          number | null;
    20	  body_fat_pct:       number | null;
    21	  muscle_mass_kg:     number | null;
    22	  lean_mass_kg:       number | null;
    23	  bmr_kcal_measured:  number | null;
    24	  visceral_fat_level: number | null;
    25	  body_water_pct:     number | null;
    26	  waist_cm:           number | null;
    27	  // Training — most recent bilan
    28	  session_duration_min:     number | null;
    29	  training_calories_weekly: number | null;
    30	  perceived_intensity:      number | null;
    31	  training_types:           string[] | null;
    32	  // Cardio — most recent bilan
    33	  daily_steps:         number | null;
    34	  cardio_frequency:    number | null;
    35	  cardio_duration_min: number | null;
    36	  cardio_types:        string[] | null;
    37	  // Wellness — avg last 3 bilans
    38	  stress_level:          number | null;
    39	  sleep_duration_h:      number | null;
    40	  sleep_quality:         number | null;
    41	  energy_level:          number | null;
    42	  recovery_score:        number | null;
    43	  post_session_recovery: number | null;
    44	  // Lifestyle — most recent bilan
    45	  caffeine_daily_mg:   number | null;
    46	  alcohol_weekly:      number | null;
    47	  work_hours_per_week: number | null;
    48	  menstrual_cycle:     string | null;
    49	  // General
    50	  occupation:           string | null;
    51	  occupation_multiplier: number | null;
    52	};
    53	
    54	type SearchState = {
    55	  query:   string;
    56	  results: LabClient[];
    57	  loading: boolean;
    58	  selected: LabClient | null;
    59	};
    60	
    61	export function useLabClientSearch() {
    62	  const [state, setState] = useState<SearchState>({
    63	    query: '', results: [], loading: false, selected: null,
    64	  });
    65	
    66	  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
    67	
    68	  const search = useCallback((query: string) => {
    69	    setState((s) => ({ ...s, query }));
    70	    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
    71	
    72	    if (!query.trim() || query.trim().length < 1) {
    73	      setState((s) => ({ ...s, results: [], loading: false }));
    74	      return;
    75	    }
    76	    setState((s) => ({ ...s, loading: true }));
    77	
    78	    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {
    79	      try {
    80	        const res  = await fetch(`/api/lab/client-search?q=${encodeURIComponent(query.trim())}`);
    81	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Search failed');
    82	        const data = await res.json();
    83	        setState((s) => ({ ...s, results: data.clients ?? [], loading: false }));
    84	      } catch {
    85	        setState((s) => ({ ...s, results: [], loading: false }));
    86	      }
    87	    }, 300);
    88	  }, []);
    89	
    90	  const select = useCallback((client: LabClient) => {
    91	    setState((s) => ({ ...s, selected: client, results: [], query: client.name }));
    92	  }, []);
    93	
    94	  const clear = useCallback(() => {
    95	    setState({ query: '', results: [], loading: false, selected: null });
    96	  }, []);
    97	
    98	  useEffect(() => {
    99	    return () => { if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current); };
   100	  }, []);
   101	
   102	  return { ...state, search, select, clear };
   103	}

     1	export type NutritionDataMode = "bilan" | "realtime";
     2	
     3	export type NutritionSignalCategory =
     4	  | "structural"
     5	  | "dynamic"
     6	  | "hybrid";
     7	
     8	export type NutritionSignalSource =
     9	  | "assessment"
    10	  | "checkin"
    11	  | "manual_override"
    12	  | "profile"
    13	  | "derived";
    14	
    15	export type NutritionSignalKey =
    16	  | "weight_kg"
    17	  | "height_cm"
    18	  | "body_fat_pct"
    19	  | "lean_mass_kg"
    20	  | "muscle_mass_kg"

   114	function normalizeText(value: string): string {
   115	  return value
   116	    .toLowerCase()
   117	    .normalize("NFD")
   118	    .replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g, "")
   119	    .replace(/œ/g, "oe")
   120	    .replace(/æ/g, "ae")

     1	import { calculateMacros, type MacroGoal, type MacroGender } from "@/lib/formulas/macros";
     2	
     3	export type PublicTdeeMenstrualPhase = "follicular" | "luteal" | "unknown";
     4	
     5	export interface PublicTdeeInput {
     6	  gender: MacroGender;
     7	  age: number;
     8	  heightCm: number;
     9	  weightKg: number;
    10	  goal: MacroGoal;
    11	  dailySteps?: number;
    12	  occupationMultiplier?: number;
    13	  workoutsPerWeek?: number;
    14	  sessionDurationMin?: number;
    15	  cardioSessionsPerWeek?: number;
    16	  cardioDurationMin?: number;
    17	  bodyFatPct?: number;
    18	  bmrMeasuredKcal?: number;
    19	  sleepHours?: number;
    20	  stressLevel?: number;
    21	  caffeineDailyMg?: number;
    22	  alcoholWeekly?: number;
    23	  menstrualPhase?: PublicTdeeMenstrualPhase;
    24	}
    25	
    26	export interface PublicTdeeMacros {
    27	  calories: number;
    28	  protein_g: number;
    29	  carbs_g: number;
    30	  fat_g: number;
    31	}
    32	
    33	export interface PublicTdeeDaySplit {
    34	  trainingDays: number;
    35	  restDays: number;
    36	  spreadKcal: number;
    37	  trainingDayCalories: number;
    38	  restDayCalories: number;
    39	  averageCalories: number;
    40	  weeklyCalories: number;
    41	  trainingMacros: PublicTdeeMacros;
    42	  restMacros: PublicTdeeMacros;
    43	}
    44	
    45	export interface PublicTdeePlan {
    46	  input: PublicTdeeInput;
    47	  result: ReturnType<typeof calculateMacros>;
    48	  split: PublicTdeeDaySplit;
    49	  confidence: {
    50	    score: number;
    51	    label: "high" | "medium" | "low";
    52	  };
    53	  assumptions: string[];
    54	  guardrails: string[];
    55	  premiumSummary: string[];
    56	  exportText: string;
    57	  shareQuery: string;
    58	}
    59	
    60	export interface PublicTdeeValidationIssue {
    61	  field: keyof PublicTdeeInput | "unknown";
    62	  message: string;
    63	}
    64	
    65	function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number) {
    66	  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value));
    67	}
    68	
    69	function round(value: number) {
    70	  return Math.round(value);
    71	}
    72	
    73	function buildMacros(calories: number, protein: number, fat: number): PublicTdeeMacros {
    74	  const proteinCalories = round(protein * 4);
    75	  const maxFatCalories = Math.max(0, calories - proteinCalories);
    76	  const cappedFatCalories = Math.min(round(fat * 9), maxFatCalories);
    77	  const carbs = Math.max(0, round((calories - proteinCalories - cappedFatCalories) / 4));
    78	  return {
    79	    calories: round(proteinCalories + cappedFatCalories + carbs * 4),
    80	    protein_g: round(protein),
    81	    carbs_g: carbs,
    82	    fat_g: round(cappedFatCalories / 9),
    83	  };
    84	}
    85	
    86	export function validatePublicTdeeInput(input: Partial<PublicTdeeInput>): PublicTdeeValidationIssue[] {
    87	  const issues: PublicTdeeValidationIssue[] = [];
    88	
    89	  if (input.gender !== "male" && input.gender !== "female") {
    90	    issues.push({ field: "gender", message: "Le sexe est requis." });
    91	  }
    92	
    93	  if (input.age == null || Number.isNaN(input.age) || input.age < 15 || input.age > 85) {
    94	    issues.push({ field: "age", message: "L'âge doit être compris entre 15 et 85 ans." });
    95	  }
    96	
    97	  if (input.heightCm == null || Number.isNaN(input.heightCm) || input.heightCm < 140 || input.heightCm > 220) {
    98	    issues.push({ field: "heightCm", message: "La taille doit être comprise entre 140 et 220 cm." });
    99	  }
   100	
   101	  if (input.weightKg == null || Number.isNaN(input.weightKg) || input.weightKg < 40 || input.weightKg > 250) {
   102	    issues.push({ field: "weightKg", message: "Le poids doit être compris entre 40 et 250 kg." });
   103	  }
   104	
   105	  if (input.goal !== "deficit" && input.goal !== "maintenance" && input.goal !== "surplus") {
   106	    issues.push({ field: "goal", message: "L'objectif est requis." });
   107	  }
   108	
   109	  return issues;
   110	}
   111	
   112	function buildConfidenceScore(input: PublicTdeeInput, result: ReturnType<typeof calculateMacros>) {
   113	  let score = 45;
   114	
   115	  if (input.bodyFatPct != null) score += 10;
   116	  if (input.bmrMeasuredKcal != null) score += 15;
   117	  if ((input.dailySteps ?? 0) > 0) score += 8;
   118	  if ((input.workoutsPerWeek ?? 0) > 0) score += 8;
   119	  if ((input.sessionDurationMin ?? 0) > 0) score += 4;
   120	  if ((input.cardioSessionsPerWeek ?? 0) > 0 && (input.cardioDurationMin ?? 0) > 0) score += 4;

    48	// Local state for a day being edited in the tool (includes unsaved changes)
    49	export interface DayDraft {
    50	  localId: string        // temp id for new days not yet saved
    51	  dbId?: string          // undefined until saved
    52	  name: string
    53	  calories: string       // string for input binding
    54	  protein_g: string
    55	  carbs_g: string
    56	  fat_g: string
    57	  hydration_ml: string
    58	  carb_cycle_type: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | ''
    59	  cycle_sync_phase: 'follicular' | 'ovulatory' | 'luteal' | 'menstrual' | ''
    60	  recommendations: string
    61	}
    62	
    63	export function emptyDayDraft(name = 'Nouveau jour'): DayDraft {
    64	  return {
    65	    localId: crypto.randomUUID(),
    66	    name,
    67	    calories: '',
    68	    protein_g: '',
    69	    carbs_g: '',
    70	    fat_g: '',
    71	    hydration_ml: '',
    72	    carb_cycle_type: '',
    73	    cycle_sync_phase: '',
    74	    recommendations: '',
    75	  }
    76	}
    77	
    78	export function dayDraftFromDb(day: NutritionProtocolDay): DayDraft {
    79	  return {
    80	    localId: day.id,
    81	    dbId: day.id,
    82	    name: day.name,
    83	    calories: day.calories != null ? String(day.calories) : '',
    84	    protein_g: day.protein_g != null ? String(day.protein_g) : '',
    85	    carbs_g: day.carbs_g != null ? String(day.carbs_g) : '',
    86	    fat_g: day.fat_g != null ? String(day.fat_g) : '',
    87	    hydration_ml: day.hydration_ml != null ? String(day.hydration_ml) : '',
    88	    carb_cycle_type: day.carb_cycle_type ?? '',
    89	    cycle_sync_phase: day.cycle_sync_phase ?? '',
    90	    recommendations: day.recommendations ?? '',
    91	  }
    92	}

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'
     2	import { selectAdvice, type AdviceInput } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/adviceRules'
     3	
     4	const base: AdviceInput = {
     5	  facts: {
     6	    dayKind: 'training',
     7	    session: { planned: 'Push A', status: 'completed' },
     8	    nutrition: { kcalLogged: 2000, kcalTarget: 2000, deltaKcal: 0, pctKcal: 100, proteinLogged: 150, proteinTarget: 150, proteinShort: false, status: 'on_track' },
     9	    hydration: { ml: 2500, targetMl: 2500, pct: 100 },
    10	    steps: 9000,
    11	    checkin: {},
    12	  },
    13	  trend: { kcalOverDays: 0, proteinShortDays: 0 },
    14	  freedom: 'safe',
    15	}
    16	
    17	describe('selectAdvice', () => {
    18	  it('cancelled session => silent coach_alert, NO client reprogramming tip', () => {
    19	    const out = selectAdvice({ ...base, facts: { ...base.facts, dayKind: 'cancelled', session: { planned: 'Push A', status: 'cancelled' } } })
    20	    expect(out.coachAlerts.map((a) => a.category)).toContain('program_signal')
    21	    expect(out.tips.join(' ')).not.toMatch(/reprogramm|décale|charge/i)
    22	  })
    23	
    24	  it('never emits program-touching tips for soreness (D9)', () => {
    25	    const out = selectAdvice({ ...base, facts: { ...base.facts, checkin: { soreness: 4 } } })
    26	    expect(out.tips.join(' ')).not.toMatch(/baisse|charge|repose-toi|écoute ton corps/i)
    27	    expect(out.coachAlerts.map((a) => a.category)).toContain('recovery_flag')
    28	  })
    29	
    30	  it('3-day kcal over => firm tip + coach_alert nutrition_trend', () => {
    31	    const out = selectAdvice({ ...base, trend: { kcalOverDays: 3, proteinShortDays: 0 } })
    32	    expect(out.coachAlerts.map((a) => a.category)).toContain('nutrition_trend')
    33	    expect(out.tips.length).toBeGreaterThan(0)
    34	  })
    35	
    36	  it('freedom=none emits zero client tips (still alerts coach)', () => {
    37	    const out = selectAdvice({ ...base, freedom: 'none', facts: { ...base.facts, hydration: { ml: 500, targetMl: 2500, pct: 20 } } })
    38	    expect(out.tips).toEqual([])
    39	  })
    40	
    41	  it('hydration tip uses coach method (gorgées, no 2L bottle)', () => {
    42	    const out = selectAdvice({ ...base, facts: { ...base.facts, hydration: { ml: 500, targetMl: 2500, pct: 20 } } })
    43	    expect(out.tips.join(' ')).toMatch(/gorgées/i)
    44	    expect(out.tips.join(' ')).not.toMatch(/bouteille de 2 ?L/i)
    45	  })
    46	
    47	  it('sleep tip makes no caffeine assumption (D13)', () => {
    48	    const out = selectAdvice({ ...base, freedom: 'extended', facts: { ...base.facts, checkin: { sleepHours: 5 } } })
    49	    expect(out.tips.join(' ')).not.toMatch(/caféine|café/i)
    50	  })
    51	
    52	  it('caps client tips at 2', () => {
    53	    const out = selectAdvice({
    54	      ...base,
    55	      freedom: 'extended',
    56	      facts: { ...base.facts, checkin: { sleepHours: 5, stress: 4 }, hydration: { ml: 300, targetMl: 2500, pct: 12 }, nutrition: { ...base.facts.nutrition, proteinLogged: 80, proteinShort: true } },
    57	    })
    58	    expect(out.tips.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(2)
    59	  })
    60	})

     1	import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
     2	import { estimateCaffeineMg, inferDrinkTypeFromFoodItem } from '@/lib/client/nutrition/drinks'
     3	
     4	describe('drink presets', () => {
     5	  it('scales caffeine for an espresso preset', () => {
     6	    expect(estimateCaffeineMg('espresso', 40)).toBe(80)
     7	  })
     8	
     9	  it('detects tea from drink names', () => {
    10	    expect(inferDrinkTypeFromFoodItem({
    11	      name_fr: 'Thé vert',
    12	      category_l1: 'drinks',
    13	      category_l2: 'chauds',
    14	    })).toBe('tea')
    15	  })
    16	
    17	  it('detects coffee from generic hot drinks', () => {
    18	    expect(inferDrinkTypeFromFoodItem({
    19	      name_fr: 'Café filtre',
    20	      category_l1: 'drinks',
    21	      category_l2: 'chauds',
    22	    })).toBe('coffee')
    23	  })
    24	})
    25

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'
     2	import { buildTimeline, type TimelineSource, type TimelineEntry } from '@/lib/client/smart/timelineBuilder'
     3	
     4	describe('buildTimeline', () => {
     5	  const ISO = (h: number, m = 0) => `2026-05-17T${String(h).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(m).padStart(2,'0')}:00Z`
     6	
     7	  it('returns empty array when no data', () => {
     8	    const r = buildTimeline({ meals: [], waterLogs: [], session: null, activities: [], checkins: [] })
     9	    expect(r).toEqual([])
    10	  })
    11	
    12	  it('orders entries chronologically by start time', () => {
    13	    const src: TimelineSource = {
    14	      meals: [
    15	        { id: 'm1', logged_at: ISO(13), title: 'Déjeuner', meal_type: 'lunch', kcal: 620, protein_g: 42, carbs_g: 58, fat_g: 18 },
    16	        { id: 'm2', logged_at: ISO(7,30), title: 'Petit-déjeuner', meal_type: 'breakfast', kcal: 450, protein_g: 28, carbs_g: 50, fat_g: 12 },
    17	      ],
    18	      waterLogs: [],
    19	      session: null,
    20	      activities: [],
    21	      checkins: [],
    22	    }
    23	    const r = buildTimeline(src)
    24	    expect(r[0].id).toBe('m2')
    25	    expect(r[1].id).toBe('m1')
    26	  })
    27	
    28	  it('aggregates water logs into time-of-day buckets', () => {
    29	    const src: TimelineSource = {
    30	      meals: [],
    31	      waterLogs: [
    32	        { logged_at: ISO(7), amount_ml: 250 },
    33	        { logged_at: ISO(9), amount_ml: 500 },
    34	      ],
    35	      session: null,
    36	      activities: [],
    37	      checkins: [],
    38	    }
    39	    const r = buildTimeline(src, 'UTC')
    40	    const water = r.filter(e => e.kind === 'water')
    41	    expect(water.length).toBe(1) // morning bucket aggregated
    42	    expect(water[0].title).toContain('matin')
    43	    expect(water[0].subtitle).toContain('750')
    44	  })
    45	
    46	  it('includes session if present', () => {
    47	    const src: TimelineSource = {
    48	      meals: [],
    49	      waterLogs: [],
    50	      session: {
    51	        id: 's1',
    52	        completed_at: ISO(11),
    53	        title: 'Push Force',
    54	        duration_min: 58,
    55	        exercises_count: 8,
    56	      },
    57	      activities: [],
    58	      checkins: [],
    59	    }
    60	    const r = buildTimeline(src)
    61	    expect(r.find(e => e.kind === 'workout')?.title).toBe('Push Force')
    62	  })
    63	
    64	  it('includes activity logs with custom_label when provided', () => {
    65	    const src: TimelineSource = {
    66	      meals: [],
    67	      waterLogs: [],
    68	      session: null,
    69	      activities: [{
    70	        id: 'a1', started_at: ISO(18), activity_type: 'other', custom_label: 'Tennis',
    71	        duration_min: 60, intensity: 6,
    72	      }],
    73	      checkins: [],
    74	    }
    75	    const r = buildTimeline(src)
    76	    expect(r[0].title).toBe('Tennis')
    77	    expect(r[0].kind).toBe('activity')
    78	  })
    79	})

FILE: tests/lib/nutrition/dataQuality.test.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
35:  caffeine_daily_mg: 180,

----- imports + début fichier -----
     1	import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
     2	import { buildNutritionDataQualitySummary } from "@/lib/nutrition/dataQuality";
     3	import {
     4	  buildNutritionDataQualityHeadline,
     5	  getNutritionDataConfidenceLabel,
     6	  getNutritionDataQualityIssues,
     7	} from "@/lib/nutrition/dataQualityPresentation";
     8	import type { NutritionClientData } from "@/lib/nutrition/types";
     9	import { calculateMacros } from "@/lib/formulas/macros";
    10	
    11	const baseClient: NutritionClientData = {
    12	  id: "c1",
    13	  name: "Test Client",
    14	  gender: "male",
    15	  age: 30,
    16	  height_cm: 180,
    17	  weight_kg: 80,
    18	  body_fat_pct: 15,
    19	  muscle_mass_kg: 60,
    20	  lean_mass_kg: 68,
    21	  bmr_kcal_measured: 1760,
    22	  visceral_fat_level: 7,
    23	  weekly_frequency: 4,
    24	  training_goal: "fat_loss",
    25	  sport_practice: null,
    26	  session_duration_min: 75,
    27	  training_calories_weekly: 2400,
    28	  cardio_frequency: 1,
    29	  cardio_duration_min: 30,
    30	  daily_steps: 9500,
    31	  stress_level: 4,
    32	  sleep_duration_h: 7.5,
    33	  sleep_quality: 4,
    34	  energy_level: 7,
    35	  caffeine_daily_mg: 180,
    36	  alcohol_weekly: 1,
    37	  work_hours_per_week: 40,
    38	  menstrual_cycle: null,
    39	  occupation: null,
    40	  occupation_multiplier: 1,
    41	};
    42	
    43	describe("nutrition data quality", () => {
    44	  it("scores a strong realtime payload as high confidence", () => {
    45	    const summary = buildNutritionDataQualitySummary({
    46	      clientData: baseClient,
    47	      dataMode: "realtime",
    48	      dataSource: {
    49	        weight_kg: "selected",
    50	        bmr_kcal_measured: "selected",
    51	        daily_steps: "selected",
    52	        sleep_duration_h: "selected",
    53	        stress_level: "selected",
    54	      },
    55	    });
    56	
    57	    expect(summary).not.toBeNull();
    58	    expect(summary?.confidence).toBe("high");
    59	    expect(summary?.score).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(75);
    60	  });
    61	
    62	  it("penalizes fallback-heavy data and tempers recommendations", () => {
    63	    const summary = buildNutritionDataQualitySummary({
    64	      clientData: {
    65	        ...baseClient,
    66	        body_fat_pct: null,
    67	        lean_mass_kg: null,
    68	        muscle_mass_kg: null,
    69	        daily_steps: null,
    70	      },
    71	      dataMode: "bilan",
    72	      dataSource: {
    73	        weight_kg: "fallback",
    74	        body_fat_pct: "fallback",
    75	        daily_steps: "fallback",
    76	      },
    77	    });
    78	
    79	    expect(summary).not.toBeNull();
    80	    expect(summary?.confidence).toBe("low");
    81	
    82	    const result = calculateMacros({
    83	      weight: 80,
    84	      height: 180,
    85	      age: 30,
    86	      gender: "male",
    87	      goal: "deficit",
    88	      steps: 0,
    89	      workouts: 4,
    90	      sleepDurationH: 6,
    91	      stressLevel: 8,
    92	      dataQuality: summary,
    93	    });
    94	
    95	    expect(result.dataQuality?.confidence).toBe("low");
    96	    expect(result.smartProtocol[0]?.id).toBe("data_quality_low");
    97	    expect(result.contextFlags.some((flag) => flag.key === "data_quality_low")).toBe(true);
    98	  });
    99	
   100	  it("turns weak signals into actionable french guidance", () => {
   101	    const summary = buildNutritionDataQualitySummary({
   102	      clientData: {
   103	        ...baseClient,
   104	        body_fat_pct: null,
   105	        daily_steps: null,
   106	      },
   107	      dataMode: "realtime",
   108	      dataSource: {
   109	        height_cm: "fallback",
   110	      },
   111	    });
   112	
   113	    const issues = getNutritionDataQualityIssues(summary, "realtime");
   114	    const headline = buildNutritionDataQualityHeadline(summary, "realtime");
   115	
   116	    expect(getNutritionDataConfidenceLabel(summary?.confidence)).toBe("moyenne");
   117	    expect(issues.some((issue) => issue.label === "nombre de pas")).toBe(true);
   118	    expect(issues.some((issue) => issue.action.includes("check-in du soir"))).toBe(true);
   119	    expect(headline).toContain("à consolider en priorité");
   120	  });
